 34183Ôćĺ+
 34184Ôćĺ+	return nil
 34185Ôćĺ+}
 34186Ôćĺ+
 34187Ôćĺ+// Shutdown flushes pending spans/metrics and shuts down both providers.
 34188Ôćĺ+// Safe to call even when Init was never called or telemetry is disabled.
 34189Ôćĺ+// For short-lived CLIs, this performs explicit ForceFlush calls before shutdown
 34190Ôćĺ+// to ensure all data is exported before the process exits.
 34191Ôćĺ+func Shutdown(ctx context.Context) error {
 34192Ôćĺ+	var errs []error
 34193Ôćĺ+
 34194Ôćĺ+	if traceProvider != nil {
 34195Ôćĺ+		telemetryLogger().Info("Flushing and shutting down trace provider")
 34196Ôćĺ+		// ForceFlush ensures all pending spans are exported before shutdown.
 34197Ôćĺ+		// This is critical for short-lived CLIs that may exit before the
 34198Ôćĺ+		// periodic exporter has time to run.
 34199Ôćĺ+		if err := traceProvider.ForceFlush(ctx); err != nil {
 34200Ôćĺ+			telemetryLogger().Warn("Failed to flush trace provider", "error", err)
 34201Ôćĺ+		}
 34202Ôćĺ+		if err := traceProvider.Shutdown(ctx); err != nil {
 34203Ôćĺ+			errs = append(errs, fmt.Errorf("shutdown trace provider: %w", err))
 34204Ôćĺ+		}
 34205Ôćĺ+	}
 34206Ôćĺ+
 34207Ôćĺ+	if meterProvider != nil {
 34208Ôćĺ+		telemetryLogger().Info("Flushing and shutting down meter provider")
 34209Ôćĺ+		// ForceFlush ensures all pending metrics are exported before shutdown.
 34210Ôćĺ+		// The periodic reader has a 10-second interval, so without this,
 34211Ôćĺ+		// metrics from short CLI runs would never be sent.
 34212Ôćĺ+		if err := meterProvider.ForceFlush(ctx); err != nil {
 34213Ôćĺ+			telemetryLogger().Warn("Failed to flush meter provider", "error", err)
 34214Ôćĺ+		}
 34215Ôćĺ+		if err := meterProvider.Shutdown(ctx); err != nil {
 34216Ôćĺ+			errs = append(errs, fmt.Errorf("shutdown meter provider: %w", err))
 34217Ôćĺ+		}
 34218Ôćĺ+	}
 34219Ôćĺ+
 34220Ôćĺ+	if len(errs) > 0 {
 34221Ôćĺ+		return errs[0] // Return first error
 34222Ôćĺ+	}
 34223Ôćĺ+	return nil
 34224Ôćĺ+}
 34225Ôćĺ+
 34226Ôćĺ+// ForceFlush explicitly flushes all pending spans and metrics.
 34227Ôćĺ+// Call this at the end of short-lived commands to ensure data is exported
 34228Ôćĺ+// before the command returns. Safe to call when telemetry is disabled.
 34229Ôćĺ+func ForceFlush(ctx context.Context) error {
 34230Ôćĺ+	var errs []error
 34231Ôćĺ+
 34232Ôćĺ+	if traceProvider != nil {
 34233Ôćĺ+		telemetryLogger().Debug("Force flushing trace provider")
 34234Ôćĺ+		if err := traceProvider.ForceFlush(ctx); err != nil {
 34235Ôćĺ+			telemetryLogger().Warn("Failed to force flush trace provider", "error", err)
 34236Ôćĺ+			errs = append(errs, err)
 34237Ôćĺ+		}
 34238Ôćĺ+	}
 34239Ôćĺ+
 34240Ôćĺ+	if meterProvider != nil {
 34241Ôćĺ+		telemetryLogger().Debug("Force flushing meter provider")
 34242Ôćĺ+		if err := meterProvider.ForceFlush(ctx); err != nil {
 34243Ôćĺ+			telemetryLogger().Warn("Failed to force flush meter provider", "error", err)
 34244Ôćĺ+			errs = append(errs, err)
 34245Ôćĺ+		}
 34246Ôćĺ+	}
 34247Ôćĺ+
 34248Ôćĺ+	if len(errs) > 0 {
 34249Ôćĺ+		return errs[0]
 34250Ôćĺ+	}
 34251Ôćĺ+	return nil
 34252Ôćĺ+}
 34253Ôćĺ+
 34254Ôćĺ+// Tracer returns a named tracer from the global provider. When telemetry is
 34255Ôćĺ+// disabled the returned tracer is a no-op (standard OTel behaviour).
 34256Ôćĺ+func Tracer(name string) trace.Tracer {
 34257Ôćĺ+	return otel.Tracer(name)
 34258Ôćĺ+}
 34259Ôćĺ+
 34260Ôćĺ+// Meter returns the meter instance. When telemetry is disabled, returns the
 34261Ôćĺ+// global no-op meter.
 34262Ôćĺ+func Meter() metric.Meter {
 34263Ôćĺ+	if meter != nil {
 34264Ôćĺ+		return meter
 34265Ôćĺ+	}
 34266Ôćĺ+	return otel.Meter("specstory-cli")
 34267Ôćĺ+}
 34268Ôćĺ+
 34269Ôćĺ+// ContextWithSessionTrace returns a context that will cause any spans started
 34270Ôćĺ+// from it to share the same trace ID (derived deterministically from sessionID).
 34271Ôćĺ+// This groups all spans for a given session into a single trace, even across
 34272Ôćĺ+// multiple invocations (e.g., in autosave mode where processSingleSession is
 34273Ôćĺ+// called repeatedly as the session file grows).
 34274Ôćĺ+func ContextWithSessionTrace(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) context.Context {
 34275Ôćĺ+	traceID := traceIDFromSessionID(sessionID)
 34276Ôćĺ+	spanID := spanIDFromSessionID(sessionID)
 34277Ôćĺ+
 34278Ôćĺ+	// Create a SpanContext with both deterministic trace ID and span ID.
 34279Ôćĺ+	// In OpenTelemetry-Go, a SpanContext is only valid if both TraceID and SpanID
 34280Ôćĺ+	// are valid. We mark it as Remote so child spans inherit the trace ID.
 34281Ôćĺ+	sc := trace.NewSpanContext(trace.SpanContextConfig{
 34282Ôćĺ+		TraceID:    traceID,
 34283Ôćĺ+		SpanID:     spanID,
 34284Ôćĺ+		TraceFlags: trace.FlagsSampled, // Ensure it's sampled
 34285Ôćĺ+		Remote:     true,               // Mark as remote parent
 34286Ôćĺ+	})
 34287Ôćĺ+
 34288Ôćĺ+	// Inject the SpanContext as a remote parent so child spans inherit the trace ID
 34289Ôćĺ+	return trace.ContextWithRemoteSpanContext(ctx, sc)
 34290Ôćĺ+}
 34291Ôćĺ+
 34292Ôćĺ+// traceIDFromSessionID generates a deterministic 16-byte trace ID from a session ID
 34293Ôćĺ+// by hashing the session ID with SHA-256 and taking the first 16 bytes.
 34294Ôćĺ+func traceIDFromSessionID(sessionID string) trace.TraceID {
 34295Ôćĺ+	hash := sha256.Sum256([]byte(sessionID))
 34296Ôćĺ+	var traceID trace.TraceID
 34297Ôćĺ+	copy(traceID[:], hash[:16])
 34298Ôćĺ+	return traceID
 34299Ôćĺ+}
 34300Ôćĺ+
 34301Ôćĺ+// spanIDFromSessionID generates a deterministic 8-byte span ID from a session ID
 34302Ôćĺ+// by hashing the session ID with SHA-256 and taking bytes 16-24.
 34303Ôćĺ+// This ensures the span ID is different from the trace ID but still deterministic.
 34304Ôćĺ+func spanIDFromSessionID(sessionID string) trace.SpanID {
 34305Ôćĺ+	hash := sha256.Sum256([]byte(sessionID))
 34306Ôćĺ+	var spanID trace.SpanID
 34307Ôćĺ+	copy(spanID[:], hash[16:24])
 34308Ôćĺ+	return spanID
 34309Ôćĺ+}
 34310Ôćĺ+
 34311Ôćĺ+// --- Metric Recording Functions ---
 34312Ôćĺ+// These are internal functions called by RecordSessionMetrics in session_helpers.go.
 34313Ôćĺ+// The metricsEnabled check is done once in RecordSessionMetrics.
 34314Ôćĺ+
 34315Ôćĺ+// buildMetricAttrs combines specific metric attributes with common attributes from OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES.
 34316Ôćĺ+func buildMetricAttrs(specific ...attribute.KeyValue) []attribute.KeyValue {
 34317Ôćĺ+	attrs := make([]attribute.KeyValue, 0, len(specific)+len(commonMetricAttrs))
 34318Ôćĺ+	attrs = append(attrs, specific...)
 34319Ôćĺ+	attrs = append(attrs, commonMetricAttrs...)
 34320Ôćĺ+	return attrs
 34321Ôćĺ+}
 34322Ôćĺ+
 34323Ôćĺ+// recordSessionProcessed increments the sessions processed counter.
 34324Ôćĺ+func recordSessionProcessed(ctx context.Context, agent string, sessionID string) {
 34325Ôćĺ+	attrs := buildMetricAttrs(
 34326Ôćĺ+		attribute.String("specstory.agent", agent),
 34327Ôćĺ+		attribute.String("specstory.session.id", sessionID),
 34328Ôćĺ+	)
 34329Ôćĺ+	sessionsProcessed.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributes(attrs...))
 34330Ôćĺ+}
 34331Ôćĺ+
 34332Ôćĺ+// recordExchanges increments the exchanges counter by the given count.
 34333Ôćĺ+func recordExchanges(ctx context.Context, agent string, sessionID string, count int64) {
 34334Ôćĺ+	attrs := buildMetricAttrs(
 34335Ôćĺ+		attribute.String("specstory.agent", agent),
 34336Ôćĺ+		attribute.String("specstory.session.id", sessionID),
 34337Ôćĺ+	)
 34338Ôćĺ+	exchangesProcessed.Add(ctx, count, metric.WithAttributes(attrs...))
 34339Ôćĺ+}
 34340Ôćĺ+
 34341Ôćĺ+// recordMessages increments the messages counter by the given count.
 34342Ôćĺ+func recordMessages(ctx context.Context, agent string, sessionID string, count int64) {
 34343Ôćĺ+	attrs := buildMetricAttrs(
 34344Ôćĺ+		attribute.String("specstory.agent", agent),
 34345Ôćĺ+		attribute.String("specstory.session.id", sessionID),
 34346Ôćĺ+	)
 34347Ôćĺ+	messagesProcessed.Add(ctx, count, metric.WithAttributes(attrs...))
 34348Ôćĺ+}
 34349Ôćĺ+
 34350Ôćĺ+// recordToolUsage increments the tool usage counter by the given count.
 34351Ôćĺ+func recordToolUsage(ctx context.Context, agent string, sessionID string, count int64) {
 34352Ôćĺ+	attrs := buildMetricAttrs(
 34353Ôćĺ+		attribute.String("specstory.agent", agent),
 34354Ôćĺ+		attribute.String("specstory.session.id", sessionID),
 34355Ôćĺ+	)
 34356Ôćĺ+	toolsUsed.Add(ctx, count, metric.WithAttributes(attrs...))
 34357Ôćĺ+}
 34358Ôćĺ+
 34359Ôćĺ+// recordProcessingDuration records the session processing duration.
 34360Ôćĺ+func recordProcessingDuration(ctx context.Context, agent string, sessionID string, duration time.Duration) {
 34361Ôćĺ+	attrs := buildMetricAttrs(
 34362Ôćĺ+		attribute.String("specstory.agent", agent),
 34363Ôćĺ+		attribute.String("specstory.session.id", sessionID),
 34364Ôćĺ+	)
 34365Ôćĺ+	processingDuration.Record(ctx, duration.Seconds(), metric.WithAttributes(attrs...))
 34366Ôćĺ+}
 34367Ôćĺ+
 34368Ôćĺ+// TokenUsage holds aggregated token counts for telemetry recording.
 34369Ôćĺ+// Different providers track different token types:
 34370Ôćĺ+//   - Claude Code: InputTokens, OutputTokens, CacheCreationInputTokens, CacheReadInputTokens
 34371Ôćĺ+//   - Codex CLI: InputTokens, OutputTokens, CachedInputTokens, ReasoningOutputTokens
 34372Ôćĺ+//   - Gemini CLI: InputTokens, OutputTokens, CachedTokens, ThoughtTokens, ToolTokens
 34373Ôćĺ+//   - Droid CLI: InputTokens, OutputTokens, CacheCreationInputTokens, CacheReadInputTokens, ThinkingTokens
 34374Ôćĺ+type TokenUsage struct {
 34375Ôćĺ+	// Common fields (all providers)
 34376Ôćĺ+	InputTokens  int
 34377Ôćĺ+	OutputTokens int
 34378Ôćĺ+
 34379Ôćĺ+	// Claude Code specific (also used by Droid CLI)
 34380Ôćĺ+	CacheCreationInputTokens int
 34381Ôćĺ+	CacheReadInputTokens     int
 34382Ôćĺ+
 34383Ôćĺ+	// Codex CLI specific
 34384Ôćĺ+	CachedInputTokens     int
 34385Ôćĺ+	ReasoningOutputTokens int
 34386Ôćĺ+
 34387Ôćĺ+	// Gemini CLI specific
 34388Ôćĺ+	CachedTokens  int
 34389Ôćĺ+	ThoughtTokens int
 34390Ôćĺ+	ToolTokens    int
 34391Ôćĺ+
 34392Ôćĺ+	// Droid CLI specific
 34393Ôćĺ+	ThinkingTokens int
 34394Ôćĺ+}
 34395Ôćĺ+
 34396Ôćĺ+// recordTokenUsage records token usage metrics for a session.
 34397Ôćĺ+// Only non-zero values are recorded.
 34398Ôćĺ+func recordTokenUsage(ctx context.Context, agent string, sessionID string, usage TokenUsage) {
 34399Ôćĺ+	attrs := buildMetricAttrs(
 34400Ôćĺ+		attribute.String("specstory.agent", agent),
 34401Ôćĺ+		attribute.String("specstory.session.id", sessionID),
 34402Ôćĺ+	)
 34403Ôćĺ+
 34404Ôćĺ+	// Common metrics
 34405Ôćĺ+	if usage.InputTokens > 0 {
 34406Ôćĺ+		inputTokensTotal.Add(ctx, int64(usage.InputTokens), metric.WithAttributes(attrs...))
 34407Ôćĺ+	}
 34408Ôćĺ+	if usage.OutputTokens > 0 {
 34409Ôćĺ+		outputTokensTotal.Add(ctx, int64(usage.OutputTokens), metric.WithAttributes(attrs...))
 34410Ôćĺ+	}
 34411Ôćĺ+
 34412Ôćĺ+	// Claude Code specific
 34413Ôćĺ+	if usage.CacheCreationInputTokens > 0 {
 34414Ôćĺ+		cacheCreationTokens.Add(ctx, int64(usage.CacheCreationInputTokens), metric.WithAttributes(attrs...))
 34415Ôćĺ+	}
 34416Ôćĺ+	if usage.CacheReadInputTokens > 0 {
 34417Ôćĺ+		cacheReadTokens.Add(ctx, int64(usage.CacheReadInputTokens), metric.WithAttributes(attrs...))
 34418Ôćĺ+	}
 34419Ôćĺ+
 34420Ôćĺ+	// Codex CLI specific
 34421Ôćĺ+	if usage.CachedInputTokens > 0 {

   250Ôćĺfunc createRunCommand() *cobra.Command {
   251Ôćĺ	registry := factory.GetRegistry()
   252Ôćĺ	ids := registry.ListIDs()
   253Ôćĺ	providerList := registry.GetProviderList()
   254Ôćĺ
   255Ôćĺ	// Build dynamic examples
   256Ôćĺ	examples := `
   257Ôćĺ# Run default agent with auto-saving
   258Ôćĺspecstory run`
   259Ôćĺ
   260Ôćĺ	if len(ids) > 0 {
   261Ôćĺ		examples += "\n\n# Run specific agent"
   262Ôćĺ		for _, id := range ids {
   263Ôćĺ			examples += fmt.Sprintf("\nspecstory run %s", id)
   264Ôćĺ		}
   265Ôćĺ
   266Ôćĺ		// Use first provider for custom command example
   267Ôćĺ		examples += fmt.Sprintf("\n\n# Run with custom command\nspecstory run %s -c \"/custom/path/to/agent\"", ids[0])
   268Ôćĺ	}
   269Ôćĺ
   270Ôćĺ	examples += `
   271Ôćĺ
   272Ôćĺ# Resume a specific session
   273Ôćĺspecstory run --resume 5c5c2876-febd-4c87-b80c-d0655f1cd3fd
   274Ôćĺ
   275Ôćĺ# Run with custom output directory
   276Ôćĺspecstory run --output-dir ~/my-sessions`
   277Ôćĺ
   278Ôćĺ	// Determine default agent name
   279Ôćĺ	defaultAgent := "the default agent"
   280Ôćĺ	if len(ids) > 0 {
   281Ôćĺ		if provider, err := registry.Get(ids[0]); err == nil {
   282Ôćĺ			defaultAgent = provider.Name()
   283Ôćĺ		}
   284Ôćĺ	}
   285Ôćĺ
   286Ôćĺ	longDesc := fmt.Sprintf(`Launch terminal coding agents in interactive mode with auto-save markdown file generation.
   287Ôćĺ
   288ÔćĺBy default, launches %s. Specify a specific agent ID to use a different agent.`, defaultAgent)
   289Ôćĺ	if providerList != "No providers registered" {
   290Ôćĺ		longDesc += "\n\nAvailable provider IDs: " + providerList + "."
   291Ôćĺ	}
   292Ôćĺ
   293Ôćĺ	return &cobra.Command{
   294Ôćĺ		Use:     "run [provider-id]",
   295Ôćĺ		Aliases: []string{"r"},
   296Ôćĺ		Short:   "Launch terminal coding agents in interactive mode with auto-save",
   297Ôćĺ		Long:    longDesc,
   298Ôćĺ		Example: examples,
   299Ôćĺ		Args:    cobra.MaximumNArgs(1), // Accept 0 or 1 argument (provider ID)
   300Ôćĺ		PreRunE: func(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {
   301Ôćĺ			// Get custom command if provided via flag
   302Ôćĺ			customCmd, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("command")
   303Ôćĺ
   304Ôćĺ			// Validate that -c flag requires a provider
   305Ôćĺ			if customCmd != "" && len(args) == 0 {
   306Ôćĺ				registry := factory.GetRegistry()
   307Ôćĺ				ids := registry.ListIDs()
   308Ôćĺ				example := "specstory run <provider> -c \"/custom/path/to/agent\""
   309Ôćĺ				if len(ids) > 0 {
   310Ôćĺ					example = fmt.Sprintf("specstory run %s -c \"/custom/path/to/agent\"", ids[0])
   311Ôćĺ				}
   312Ôćĺ				return utils.ValidationError{
   313Ôćĺ					Message: "The -c/--command flag requires a provider to be specified.\n" +
   314Ôćĺ						"Example: " + example,
   315Ôćĺ				}
   316Ôćĺ			}
   317Ôćĺ			return nil
   318Ôćĺ		},
   319Ôćĺ		RunE: func(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {
   320Ôćĺ			config.EnsureDefaultProjectConfig()
   321Ôćĺ			slog.Info("Running in interactive mode")
   322Ôćĺ
   323Ôćĺ			// Get custom command if provided via flag
   324Ôćĺ			customCmd, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("command")
   325Ôćĺ
   326Ôćĺ			// Get the provider
   327Ôćĺ			registry := factory.GetRegistry()
   328Ôćĺ			var providerID string
   329Ôćĺ			if len(args) == 0 {
   330Ôćĺ				// Default to first registered provider
   331Ôćĺ				ids := registry.ListIDs()
   332Ôćĺ				if len(ids) > 0 {
   333Ôćĺ					providerID = ids[0]
   334Ôćĺ				} else {
   335Ôćĺ					return fmt.Errorf("no providers registered")
   336Ôćĺ				}
   337Ôćĺ			} else {
   338Ôćĺ				providerID = args[0]
   339Ôćĺ			}
   340Ôćĺ
   341Ôćĺ			provider, err := registry.Get(providerID)
   342Ôćĺ			if err != nil {
   343Ôćĺ				// Provider not found - show helpful error
   344Ôćĺ				fmt.Printf("ÔŁî Provider '%s' is not a valid provider implementation\n\n", providerID)
   345Ôćĺ
   346Ôćĺ				ids := registry.ListIDs()
   347Ôćĺ				if len(ids) > 0 {
   348Ôćĺ					fmt.Println("The registered providers are:")
   349Ôćĺ					for _, id := range ids {
   350Ôćĺ						if p, _ := registry.Get(id); p != nil {
   351Ôćĺ							fmt.Printf("  ÔÇó %s - %s\n", id, p.Name())
   352Ôćĺ						}
   353Ôćĺ					}
   354Ôćĺ					fmt.Println("\nExample: specstory run " + ids[0])
   355Ôćĺ				}
   356Ôćĺ				return err
   357Ôćĺ			}
   358Ôćĺ
   359Ôćĺ			// Fall back to config file provider command if -c flag wasn't provided
   360Ôćĺ			if customCmd == "" && loadedConfig != nil {
   361Ôćĺ				customCmd = loadedConfig.GetProviderCmd(providerID)
   362Ôćĺ			}
   363Ôćĺ
   364Ôćĺ			slog.Info("Launching agent", "provider", provider.Name())
   365Ôćĺ
   366Ôćĺ			// Set the agent provider for analytics
   367Ôćĺ			analytics.SetAgentProviders([]string{provider.Name()})
   368Ôćĺ
   369Ôćĺ			// Setup output configuration
   370Ôćĺ			config, err := utils.SetupOutputConfig(outputDir, debugDir)
   371Ôćĺ			if err != nil {
   372Ôćĺ				return err
   373Ôćĺ			}
   374Ôćĺ			// Ensure history directory exists for interactive mode
   375Ôćĺ			if err := utils.EnsureHistoryDirectoryExists(config); err != nil {
   376Ôćĺ				return err
   377Ôćĺ			}
   378Ôćĺ
   379Ôćĺ			// Initialize project identity
   380Ôćĺ			cwd, err := os.Getwd()
   381Ôćĺ			if err != nil {
   382Ôćĺ				slog.Error("Failed to get current working directory", "error", err)
   383Ôćĺ				return err
   384Ôćĺ			}
   385Ôćĺ			identityManager := utils.NewProjectIdentityManager(cwd)
   386Ôćĺ			if _, err := identityManager.EnsureProjectIdentity(); err != nil {
   387Ôćĺ				// Log error but don't fail the command
   388Ôćĺ				slog.Error("Failed to ensure project identity", "error", err)
   389Ôćĺ			}
   390Ôćĺ
   391Ôćĺ			// Create context for graceful cancellation (Ctrl+C handling)
   392Ôćĺ			ctx, cancel := signal.NotifyContext(context.Background(), os.Interrupt, syscall.SIGTERM)
   393Ôćĺ			defer cancel()
   394Ôćĺ
   395Ôćĺ			// Start provenance infrastructure before the agent so all file changes are captured
   396Ôćĺ			provenanceEngine, provenanceCleanup, err := provenance.StartEngine(provenanceEnabled)
   397Ôćĺ			if err != nil {
   398Ôćĺ				return err
   399Ôćĺ			}
   400Ôćĺ			defer provenanceCleanup()
   401Ôćĺ
   402Ôćĺ			fsCleanup, err := provenance.StartFSWatcher(ctx, provenanceEngine, cwd)
   403Ôćĺ			if err != nil {
   404Ôćĺ				return err
   405Ôćĺ			}
   406Ôćĺ			defer fsCleanup()
   407Ôćĺ
   408Ôćĺ			// Check authentication for cloud sync
   409Ôćĺ			cmdpkg.CheckAndWarnAuthentication(noCloudSync)
   410Ôćĺ			// Track extension activation
   411Ôćĺ			analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventExtensionActivated, nil)
   412Ôćĺ
   413Ôćĺ			// Get resume session ID if provided
   414Ôćĺ			resumeSessionID, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("resume")
   415Ôćĺ			if resumeSessionID != "" {
   416Ôćĺ				resumeSessionID = strings.TrimSpace(resumeSessionID)
   417Ôćĺ				// Note: Different providers may have different session ID formats
   418Ôćĺ				// Let the provider validate its own format
   419Ôćĺ				slog.Info("Resuming session", "sessionId", resumeSessionID)
   420Ôćĺ			}
   421Ôćĺ
   422Ôćĺ			// Get debug-raw flag value (must be before callback to capture in closure)
   423Ôćĺ			debugRaw, _ := cmd.Flags().GetBool("debug-raw")
   424Ôćĺ			useUTC := !localTimeZone
   425Ôćĺ
   426Ôćĺ			// This callback pattern enables real-time processing of agent sessions
   427Ôćĺ			// without blocking the agent's execution. As the agent writes updates to its
   428Ôćĺ			// data files, the provider's watcher detects changes and invokes this callback,
   429Ôćĺ			// allowing immediate markdown generation and cloud sync. Errors are logged but
   430Ôćĺ			// don't stop execution because transient failures (e.g., network issues) shouldn't
   431Ôćĺ			// interrupt the user's coding session.
   432Ôćĺ			sessionCallback := func(session *spi.AgentChatSession) {
   433Ôćĺ				if session == nil {
   434Ôćĺ					return
   435Ôćĺ				}
   436Ôćĺ
   437Ôćĺ				// Track the session ID for deep linking on exit
   438Ôćĺ				lastRunSessionID = session.SessionID
   439Ôćĺ
   440Ôćĺ				// Process the session (write markdown and sync to cloud)
   441Ôćĺ				// Don't show output during interactive run mode
   442Ôćĺ				// This is autosave mode (true)
   443Ôćĺ				_, err := sessionpkg.ProcessSingleSession(context.Background(), session, config, onlyCloudSync, false, true, debugRaw, useUTC, noTelemetryPrompts)
   444Ôćĺ				if err != nil {
   445Ôćĺ					// Log error but continue - don't fail the whole run
   446Ôćĺ					// In interactive mode, we prioritize keeping the agent running.
   447Ôćĺ					// Failed markdown writes or cloud syncs can be retried later via
   448Ôćĺ					// the sync command, so we just log and continue.
   449Ôćĺ					slog.Error("Failed to process session update",
   450Ôćĺ						"sessionId", session.SessionID,
   451Ôćĺ						"error", err)
   452Ôćĺ				}
   453Ôćĺ
   454Ôćĺ				// Push agent events to provenance engine for correlation
   455Ôćĺ				provenance.ProcessEvents(ctx, provenanceEngine, session)
   456Ôćĺ			}
   457Ôćĺ
   458Ôćĺ			// Execute the agent and watch for updates
   459Ôćĺ			slog.Info("Starting agent execution and monitoring", "provider", provider.Name())
   460Ôćĺ			err = provider.ExecAgentAndWatch(cwd, customCmd, resumeSessionID, debugRaw, sessionCallback)
   461Ôćĺ
   462Ôćĺ			if err != nil {
   463Ôćĺ				slog.Error("Agent execution failed", "provider", provider.Name(), "error", err)
   464Ôćĺ			}
   465Ôćĺ
   466Ôćĺ			return err
   467Ôćĺ		},
   468Ôćĺ	}
   469Ôćĺ}
   470Ôćĺ
   471Ôćĺvar runCmd *cobra.Command
   472Ôćĺ
   473Ôćĺ// createSyncCommand dynamically creates the sync command with provider information
   474Ôćĺfunc createSyncCommand() *cobra.Command {
   475Ôćĺ	registry := factory.GetRegistry()
   476Ôćĺ	ids := registry.ListIDs()
   477Ôćĺ	providerList := registry.GetProviderList()
   478Ôćĺ
   479Ôćĺ	// Build dynamic examples
   480Ôćĺ	examples := `
   481Ôćĺ# Sync all agents with activity
   482Ôćĺspecstory sync`
   483Ôćĺ
   484Ôćĺ	if len(ids) > 0 {
   485Ôćĺ		examples += "\n\n# Sync specific agent"
   486Ôćĺ		for _, id := range ids {
   487Ôćĺ			examples += fmt.Sprintf("\nspecstory sync %s", id)
   488Ôćĺ		}
   489Ôćĺ	}
   490Ôćĺ
   491Ôćĺ	examples += `
   492Ôćĺ
   493Ôćĺ# Sync a specific session by UUID
   494Ôćĺspecstory sync -s <session-id>
   495Ôćĺ
   496Ôćĺ# Sync multiple sessions
   497Ôćĺspecstory sync -s <session-id-1> -s <session-id-2> -s <session-id-3>
   498Ôćĺ
   499Ôćĺ# Output session markdown to stdout without saving
   500Ôćĺspecstory sync -s <session-id> --print
   501Ôćĺ
   502Ôćĺ# Output multiple sessions to stdout
   503Ôćĺspecstory sync -s <session-id-1> -s <session-id-2> --print
   504Ôćĺ
   505Ôćĺ# Sync all sessions for the current directory, with console output
   506Ôćĺspecstory sync --console
   507Ôćĺ
   508Ôćĺ# Sync all sessions for the current directory, with a log file
   509Ôćĺspecstory sync --log`
   510Ôćĺ
   511Ôćĺ	longDesc := `Create or update markdown files for the agent sessions in the current working directory.
   512Ôćĺ
   513ÔćĺBy default, syncs all registered providers that have activity.
   514ÔćĺProvide a specific agent ID to sync a specific provider.`
   515Ôćĺ	if providerList != "No providers registered" {
   516Ôćĺ		longDesc += "\n\nAvailable provider IDs: " + providerList + "."
   517Ôćĺ	}
   518Ôćĺ
   519Ôćĺ	return &cobra.Command{
   520Ôćĺ		Use:     "sync [provider-id]",
   521Ôćĺ		Aliases: []string{"s"},
   522Ôćĺ		Short:   "Sync markdown files for terminal coding agent sessions",
   523Ôćĺ		Long:    longDesc,
   524Ôćĺ		Example: examples,
   525Ôćĺ		Args:    cobra.MaximumNArgs(1), // Accept 0 or 1 argument (provider ID)
   526Ôćĺ		PreRunE: func(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {
   527Ôćĺ			// Validate that --print requires -s flag
   528Ôćĺ			sessionIDs, _ := cmd.Flags().GetStringSlice("session")
   529Ôćĺ			if printToStdout && len(sessionIDs) == 0 {
   530Ôćĺ				return utils.ValidationError{Message: "--print requires the -s/--session flag to specify which sessions to output"}
   531Ôćĺ			}
   532Ôćĺ			return nil
   533Ôćĺ		},
   534Ôćĺ		RunE: func(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {
   535Ôćĺ			config.EnsureDefaultProjectConfig()
   536Ôćĺ
   537Ôćĺ			// Get session IDs if provided via flag
   538Ôćĺ			sessionIDs, _ := cmd.Flags().GetStringSlice("session")
   539Ôćĺ
   540Ôćĺ			// Handle specific session sync if -s flag is provided
   541Ôćĺ			if len(sessionIDs) > 0 {
   542Ôćĺ				return syncSpecificSessions(cmd, args, sessionIDs)
   543Ôćĺ			}
   544Ôćĺ
   545Ôćĺ			slog.Info("Running sync command")
   546Ôćĺ			registry := factory.GetRegistry()
   547Ôćĺ
   548Ôćĺ			// Check if user specified a provider
   549Ôćĺ			if len(args) > 0 {
   550Ôćĺ				// Sync specific provider
   551Ôćĺ				return syncSingleProvider(registry, args[0], cmd)
   552Ôćĺ			} else {
   553Ôćĺ				// Sync all providers with activity
   554Ôćĺ				return syncAllProviders(registry, cmd)
   555Ôćĺ			}
   556Ôćĺ		},
   557Ôćĺ	}
   558Ôćĺ}
   559Ôćĺ
   560Ôćĺ// syncSpecificSessions syncs one or more sessions by their IDs
   561Ôćĺ// When printToStdout is set, outputs markdown to stdout instead of saving to files.
   562Ôćĺ// args[0] is the optional provider ID
   563Ôćĺfunc syncSpecificSessions(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string, sessionIDs []string) error {
   564Ôćĺ	if len(sessionIDs) == 1 {
   565Ôćĺ		slog.Info("Running single session sync", "sessionId", sessionIDs[0])
   566Ôćĺ	} else {
   567Ôćĺ		slog.Info("Running multiple session sync", "sessionCount", len(sessionIDs))
   568Ôćĺ	}
   569Ôćĺ
   570Ôćĺ	// Get debug-raw flag value
   571Ôćĺ	debugRaw, _ := cmd.Flags().GetBool("debug-raw")
   572Ôćĺ	useUTC := !localTimeZone
   573Ôćĺ
   574Ôćĺ	cwd, err := os.Getwd()
   575Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
   576Ôćĺ		slog.Error("Failed to get current working directory", "error", err)
   577Ôćĺ		return err
   578Ôćĺ	}
   579Ôćĺ
   580Ôćĺ	// Setup file output and cloud sync (not needed for --print mode)
   581Ôćĺ	var config utils.OutputConfig
   582Ôćĺ	if !printToStdout {
   583Ôćĺ		config, err = utils.SetupOutputConfig(outputDir, debugDir)
   584Ôćĺ		if err != nil {
   585Ôćĺ			return err
   586Ôćĺ		}
   587Ôćĺ
   588Ôćĺ		identityManager := utils.NewProjectIdentityManager(cwd)
   589Ôćĺ		if _, err := identityManager.EnsureProjectIdentity(); err != nil {
   590Ôćĺ			slog.Error("Failed to ensure project identity", "error", err)
   591Ôćĺ		}
   592Ôćĺ
   593Ôćĺ		cmdpkg.CheckAndWarnAuthentication(noCloudSync)
   594Ôćĺ
   595Ôćĺ		if err := utils.EnsureHistoryDirectoryExists(config); err != nil {
   596Ôćĺ			return err
   597Ôćĺ		}
   598Ôćĺ	}
   599Ôćĺ
   600Ôćĺ	registry := factory.GetRegistry()
   601Ôćĺ
   602Ôćĺ	// Track statistics for summary output
   603Ôćĺ	var successCount, notFoundCount, errorCount int
   604Ôćĺ	var lastError error
   605Ôćĺ
   606Ôćĺ	// Resolve provider once if specified (fail fast if provider not found)
   607Ôćĺ	var specifiedProvider spi.Provider
   608Ôćĺ	if len(args) > 0 {
   609Ôćĺ		providerID := args[0]
   610Ôćĺ		provider, err := registry.Get(providerID)
   611Ôćĺ		if err != nil {
   612Ôćĺ			if !printToStdout {
   613Ôćĺ				fmt.Printf("ÔŁî Provider '%s' not found\n", providerID)
   614Ôćĺ			}
   615Ôćĺ			return fmt.Errorf("provider '%s' not found: %w", providerID, err)
   616Ôćĺ		}
   617Ôćĺ		specifiedProvider = provider
   618Ôćĺ	}
   619Ôćĺ
   620Ôćĺ	// Process each session ID
   621Ôćĺ	var printedSessions int // tracks sessions printed to stdout for separator logic
   622Ôćĺ	for _, sessionID := range sessionIDs {
   623Ôćĺ		sessionID = strings.TrimSpace(sessionID)
   624Ôćĺ		if sessionID == "" {
   625Ôćĺ			continue // Skip empty session IDs
   626Ôćĺ		}
   627Ôćĺ
   628Ôćĺ		// Find session across providers
   629Ôćĺ		var session *spi.AgentChatSession
   630Ôćĺ
   631Ôćĺ		// Case A: Provider was specified - use it directly
   632Ôćĺ		if specifiedProvider != nil {
   633Ôćĺ			session, err = specifiedProvider.GetAgentChatSession(cwd, sessionID, debugRaw)
   634Ôćĺ			if err != nil {
   635Ôćĺ				if !printToStdout {
   636Ôćĺ					fmt.Printf("ÔŁî Error getting session '%s' from %s: %v\n", sessionID, specifiedProvider.Name(), err)
   637Ôćĺ				}
   638Ôćĺ				slog.Error("Error getting session from provider", "sessionId", sessionID, "provider", specifiedProvider.Name(), "error", err)
   639Ôćĺ				errorCount++
   640Ôćĺ				lastError = err
   641Ôćĺ				continue
   642Ôćĺ			}
   643Ôćĺ			if session == nil {
   644Ôćĺ				if !printToStdout {
   645Ôćĺ					fmt.Printf("ÔŁî Session '%s' not found in %s\n", sessionID, specifiedProvider.Name())
   646Ôćĺ				}
   647Ôćĺ				slog.Warn("Session not found in provider", "sessionId", sessionID, "provider", specifiedProvider.Name())
   648Ôćĺ				notFoundCount++
   649Ôćĺ				continue
   650Ôćĺ			}
   651Ôćĺ		} else {
   652Ôćĺ			// Case B: No provider specified - try all providers
   653Ôćĺ			providerIDs := registry.ListIDs()
   654Ôćĺ			for _, id := range providerIDs {
   655Ôćĺ				provider, err := registry.Get(id)
   656Ôćĺ				if err != nil {
   657Ôćĺ					continue
   658Ôćĺ				}
   659Ôćĺ
   660Ôćĺ				session, err = provider.GetAgentChatSession(cwd, sessionID, debugRaw)
   661Ôćĺ				if err != nil {
   662Ôćĺ					slog.Debug("Error checking provider for session", "provider", id, "sessionId", sessionID, "error", err)
   663Ôćĺ					continue
   664Ôćĺ				}
   665Ôćĺ				if session != nil {
   666Ôćĺ					if !silent && !printToStdout {
   667Ôćĺ						fmt.Printf("Ôťů Found session '%s' for %s\n", sessionID, provider.Name())
   668Ôćĺ					}
   669Ôćĺ					break // Found it, don't check other providers
   670Ôćĺ				}
   671Ôćĺ			}
   672Ôćĺ
   673Ôćĺ			if session == nil {
   674Ôćĺ				if !printToStdout {
   675Ôćĺ					fmt.Printf("ÔŁî Session '%s' not found in any provider\n", sessionID)
   676Ôćĺ				}
   677Ôćĺ				slog.Warn("Session not found in any provider", "sessionId", sessionID)
   678Ôćĺ				notFoundCount++
   679Ôćĺ				continue
   680Ôćĺ			}
   681Ôćĺ		}
   682Ôćĺ
   683Ôćĺ		// Process the found session
   684Ôćĺ		if printToStdout {
   685Ôćĺ			sessionpkg.ValidateSessionData(session, debugRaw)
   686Ôćĺ			sessionpkg.WriteDebugSessionData(session, debugRaw)
   687Ôćĺ
   688Ôćĺ			markdownContent, err := sessionpkg.GenerateMarkdownFromAgentSession(session.SessionData, false, useUTC)
   689Ôćĺ			if err != nil {
   690Ôćĺ				slog.Error("Failed to generate markdown", "sessionId", session.SessionID, "error", err)
   691Ôćĺ				analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventSyncMarkdownError, analytics.Properties{
   692Ôćĺ					"session_id": session.SessionID,
   693Ôćĺ					"error":      err.Error(),
   694Ôćĺ					"mode":       "print",
   695Ôćĺ				})
   696Ôćĺ				errorCount++
   697Ôćĺ				lastError = err
   698Ôćĺ				continue
   699Ôćĺ			}
   700Ôćĺ
   701Ôćĺ			// Separate multiple sessions with a horizontal rule
   702Ôćĺ			if printedSessions > 0 {
   703Ôćĺ				fmt.Print("\n---\n\n")
   704Ôćĺ			}
   705Ôćĺ			fmt.Print(markdownContent)
   706Ôćĺ			printedSessions++
   707Ôćĺ			successCount++
   708Ôćĺ			analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventSyncMarkdownSuccess, analytics.Properties{
   709Ôćĺ				"session_id": session.SessionID,
   710Ôćĺ				"mode":       "print",
   711Ôćĺ			})
   712Ôćĺ		} else {
   713Ôćĺ			// Normal sync: write to file and optionally cloud sync
   714Ôćĺ			if _, err := sessionpkg.ProcessSingleSession(context.Background(), session, config, onlyCloudSync, true, false, debugRaw, useUTC, noTelemetryPrompts); err != nil {
   715Ôćĺ				errorCount++
   716Ôćĺ				lastError = err
   717Ôćĺ			} else {
   718Ôćĺ				successCount++
   719Ôćĺ			}
   720Ôćĺ		}
   721Ôćĺ	}
   722Ôćĺ
   723Ôćĺ	// Print summary if multiple sessions were processed (not for --print mode)
   724Ôćĺ	if !printToStdout && len(sessionIDs) > 1 && !silent {
   725Ôćĺ		fmt.Println()
   726Ôćĺ		fmt.Println("­čôŐ Session sync summary:")
   727Ôćĺ		fmt.Printf("  Ôťů %d %s successfully synced\n", successCount, pluralSession(successCount))
   728Ôćĺ		if notFoundCount > 0 {
   729Ôćĺ			fmt.Printf("  ÔŁî %d %s not found\n", notFoundCount, pluralSession(notFoundCount))
   730Ôćĺ		}
   731Ôćĺ		if errorCount > 0 {
   732Ôćĺ			fmt.Printf("  ÔŁî %d %s failed with errors\n", errorCount, pluralSession(errorCount))
   733Ôćĺ		}
   734Ôćĺ		fmt.Println()
   735Ôćĺ	}
   736Ôćĺ
   737Ôćĺ	// Return error if any sessions failed
   738Ôćĺ	if errorCount > 0 || (notFoundCount > 0 && successCount == 0) {
   739Ôćĺ		if lastError != nil {
   740Ôćĺ			return lastError
   741Ôćĺ		}
   742Ôćĺ		return fmt.Errorf("%d %s not found", notFoundCount, pluralSession(notFoundCount))
   743Ôćĺ	}
   744Ôćĺ
   745Ôćĺ	return nil
   746Ôćĺ}
   747Ôćĺ
   748Ôćĺ// preloadBulkSessionSizesIfNeeded optimizes bulk syncs by fetching all session sizes upfront.
   749Ôćĺ// This avoids making individual HEAD requests for each session during sync operations.
   750Ôćĺ//
   751Ôćĺ// The function only performs the preload if:
   752Ôćĺ//   - Cloud sync is enabled (noCloudSync flag is false)
   753Ôćĺ//   - User is authenticated with SpecStory Cloud
   754Ôćĺ//   - A valid projectID can be determined from the identity manager
   755Ôćĺ//
   756Ôćĺ// Parameters:
   757Ôćĺ//   - identityManager: Provides project identity (git_id or workspace_id) for the current project
   758Ôćĺ//
   759Ôćĺ// The preloaded sizes are cached in the SyncManager and shared across all providers since they
   760Ôćĺ// use the same projectID. If the bulk fetch fails or if projectID cannot be determined, individual
   761Ôćĺ// sessions will gracefully fall back to HEAD requests during sync.
   762Ôćĺ//
   763Ôćĺ// This function is safe to call multiple times but should typically be called once before processing
   764Ôćĺ// multiple sessions in batch sync operations.
   765Ôćĺfunc preloadBulkSessionSizesIfNeeded(identityManager *utils.ProjectIdentityManager) {
   766Ôćĺ	// Skip if cloud sync is disabled or user is not authenticated
   767Ôćĺ	if noCloudSync || !cloud.IsAuthenticated() {
   768Ôćĺ		return
   769Ôćĺ	}
   770Ôćĺ
   771Ôćĺ	// Get projectID from identity manager - required for cloud sync
   772Ôćĺ	projectID, err := identityManager.GetProjectID()
   773Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
   774Ôćĺ		slog.Warn("Cannot preload session sizes: failed to get project ID", "error", err)
   775Ôćĺ		return
   776Ôćĺ	}
   777Ôćĺ
   778Ôćĺ	// Preload bulk sizes once - shared across all providers since they use same projectID
   779Ôćĺ	if syncMgr := cloud.GetSyncManager(); syncMgr != nil {
   780Ôćĺ		syncMgr.PreloadSessionSizes(projectID)
   781Ôćĺ	} else {
   782Ôćĺ		slog.Warn("Cannot preload session sizes: sync manager is nil despite authentication")
   783Ôćĺ	}
   784Ôćĺ}
   785Ôćĺ
   786Ôćĺ// syncProvider performs the actual sync for a single provider
   787Ôćĺ// Returns (sessionCount, error) for analytics tracking
   788Ôćĺfunc syncProvider(provider spi.Provider, providerID string, config utils.OutputConfig, debugRaw bool, useUTC bool) (int, error) {
   789Ôćĺ	cwd, err := os.Getwd()
   790Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
   791Ôćĺ		slog.Error("Failed to get current working directory", "error", err)
   792Ôćĺ		return 0, err
   793Ôćĺ	}
   794Ôćĺ
   795Ôćĺ	// Create progress callback for parsing phase
   796Ôćĺ	// The callback updates the "Parsing..." line in place with [n/m] progress
   797Ôćĺ	var parseProgress spi.ProgressCallback
   798Ôćĺ	if !silent {
   799Ôćĺ		providerName := provider.Name()
   800Ôćĺ		parseProgress = func(current, total int) {
   801Ôćĺ			fmt.Printf("\rParsing %s sessions [%d/%d]", providerName, current, total)
   802Ôćĺ			_ = os.Stdout.Sync()
   803Ôćĺ		}
   804Ôćĺ	}
   805Ôćĺ
   806Ôćĺ	// Get all sessions from the provider
   807Ôćĺ	sessions, err := provider.GetAgentChatSessions(cwd, debugRaw, parseProgress)
   808Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
   809Ôćĺ		return 0, fmt.Errorf("failed to get sessions: %w", err)
   810Ôćĺ	}
   811Ôćĺ
   812Ôćĺ	sessionCount := len(sessions)
   813Ôćĺ
   814Ôćĺ	if sessionCount == 0 && !silent {
   815Ôćĺ		// This comes after "Parsing..." message, on the same line
   816Ôćĺ		fmt.Printf(", no non-empty sessions found for %s\n", provider.Name())
   817Ôćĺ		fmt.Println()
   818Ôćĺ		return 0, nil
   819Ôćĺ	}
   820Ôćĺ
   821Ôćĺ	if !silent {
   822Ôćĺ		fmt.Printf("\nSyncing markdown files for %s", provider.Name())
   823Ôćĺ	}
   824Ôćĺ
   825Ôćĺ	// Initialize statistics
   826Ôćĺ	stats := &SyncStats{
   827Ôćĺ		TotalSessions: sessionCount,
   828Ôćĺ	}
   829Ôćĺ
   830Ôćĺ	historyPath := config.GetHistoryDir()
   831Ôćĺ	agentName := provider.Name()
   832Ôćĺ	ctx := context.Background()
   833Ôćĺ
   834Ôćĺ	// Process each session
   835Ôćĺ	for i := range sessions {
   836Ôćĺ		session := &sessions[i]
   837Ôćĺ
   838Ôćĺ		// Process session in a closure so defers scope to each iteration,
   839Ôćĺ		// ensuring spans are ended and metrics recorded even on early returns.
   840Ôćĺ		func() {
   841Ôćĺ			processingStart := time.Now()
   842Ôćĺ
   843Ôćĺ			// Create a context with a deterministic trace ID from the session ID
   844Ôćĺ			sessionCtx := telemetry.ContextWithSessionTrace(ctx, session.SessionID)
   845Ôćĺ
   846Ôćĺ			// Start an OTel span for this session processing
   847Ôćĺ			sessionCtx, span := telemetry.Tracer("specstory").Start(sessionCtx, "process_session")
   848Ôćĺ			defer span.End()
   849Ôćĺ
   850Ôćĺ			// Compute session statistics
   851Ôćĺ			sessionStats := telemetry.ComputeSessionStats(agentName, session)
   852Ôćĺ			defer func() {
   853Ôćĺ				telemetry.RecordSessionMetrics(sessionCtx, sessionStats, time.Since(processingStart))
   854Ôćĺ			}()
   855Ôćĺ
   856Ôćĺ			// Set session span attributes
   857Ôćĺ			telemetry.SetSessionSpanAttributes(span, sessionStats)
   858Ôćĺ
   859Ôćĺ			// Create child spans for each exchange
   860Ôćĺ			if session.SessionData != nil && len(session.SessionData.Exchanges) > 0 {
   861Ôćĺ				telemetry.ProcessExchangeSpans(sessionCtx, sessionStats, session.SessionData.Exchanges, noTelemetryPrompts)
   862Ôćĺ			}
   863Ôćĺ
   864Ôćĺ			sessionpkg.ValidateSessionData(session, debugRaw)
   865Ôćĺ			sessionpkg.WriteDebugSessionData(session, debugRaw)
   866Ôćĺ
   867Ôćĺ			// Generate markdown from SessionData
   868Ôćĺ			markdownContent, err := sessionpkg.GenerateMarkdownFromAgentSession(session.SessionData, false, useUTC)
   869Ôćĺ			if err != nil {
   870Ôćĺ				slog.Error("Failed to generate markdown from SessionData",
   871Ôćĺ					"sessionId", session.SessionID,
   872Ôćĺ					"error", err)
   873Ôćĺ				// Track sync error
   874Ôćĺ				analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventSyncMarkdownError, analytics.Properties{
   875Ôćĺ					"session_id": session.SessionID,
   876Ôćĺ					"error":      err.Error(),
   877Ôćĺ				})
   878Ôćĺ				return
   879Ôćĺ			}
   880Ôćĺ
   881Ôćĺ			// Generate filename from timestamp and slug
   882Ôćĺ			fileFullPath := sessionpkg.BuildSessionFilePath(session, historyPath, useUTC)
   883Ôćĺ
   884Ôćĺ			// Check if file already exists with same content
   885Ôćĺ			identicalContent := false
   886Ôćĺ			fileExists := false
   887Ôćĺ			if existingContent, err := os.ReadFile(fileFullPath); err == nil {
   888Ôćĺ				fileExists = true
   889Ôćĺ				if string(existingContent) == markdownContent {
   890Ôćĺ					identicalContent = true
   891Ôćĺ					slog.Info("Markdown file already exists with same content, skipping write",
   892Ôćĺ						"sessionId", session.SessionID,
   893Ôćĺ						"path", fileFullPath)
   894Ôćĺ				}
   895Ôćĺ			}
   896Ôćĺ
   897Ôćĺ			// Write file if needed (skip if only-cloud-sync is enabled)
   898Ôćĺ			if !onlyCloudSync {
   899Ôćĺ				if !identicalContent {
   900Ôćĺ					// Ensure history directory exists (handles deletion during long-running sync)
   901Ôćĺ					if err := utils.EnsureHistoryDirectoryExists(config); err != nil {
   902Ôćĺ						slog.Error("Failed to ensure history directory", "error", err)
   903Ôćĺ						return
   904Ôćĺ					}
   905Ôćĺ					err := os.WriteFile(fileFullPath, []byte(markdownContent), 0644)
   906Ôćĺ					if err != nil {
   907Ôćĺ						slog.Error("Error writing markdown file",
   908Ôćĺ							"sessionId", session.SessionID,
   909Ôćĺ							"error", err)
   910Ôćĺ						// Track sync error
   911Ôćĺ						analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventSyncMarkdownError, analytics.Properties{
   912Ôćĺ							"session_id":      session.SessionID,
   913Ôćĺ							"error":           err.Error(),
   914Ôćĺ							"only_cloud_sync": onlyCloudSync,
   915Ôćĺ						})
   916Ôćĺ						return
   917Ôćĺ					}
   918Ôćĺ					slog.Info("Successfully wrote file",
   919Ôćĺ						"sessionId", session.SessionID,
   920Ôćĺ						"path", fileFullPath)
   921Ôćĺ
   922Ôćĺ					// Track successful sync
   923Ôćĺ					if !fileExists {
   924Ôćĺ						analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventSyncMarkdownNew, analytics.Properties{
   925Ôćĺ							"session_id":      session.SessionID,
   926Ôćĺ							"only_cloud_sync": onlyCloudSync,
   927Ôćĺ						})
   928Ôćĺ					} else {
   929Ôćĺ						analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventSyncMarkdownSuccess, analytics.Properties{
   930Ôćĺ							"session_id":      session.SessionID,
   931Ôćĺ							"only_cloud_sync": onlyCloudSync,
   932Ôćĺ						})
   933Ôćĺ					}
   934Ôćĺ				}
   935Ôćĺ
   936Ôćĺ				// Update statistics for normal mode
   937Ôćĺ				if identicalContent {
   938Ôćĺ					stats.SessionsSkipped++
   939Ôćĺ				} else if fileExists {
   940Ôćĺ					stats.SessionsUpdated++
   941Ôćĺ				} else {
   942Ôćĺ					stats.SessionsCreated++
   943Ôćĺ				}
   944Ôćĺ			} else {
   945Ôćĺ				// In cloud-only mode, count as skipped since no local file operation occurred
   946Ôćĺ				stats.SessionsSkipped++
   947Ôćĺ				slog.Info("Skipping local file write (only-cloud-sync mode)",
   948Ôćĺ					"sessionId", session.SessionID)
   949Ôćĺ			}
   950Ôćĺ
   951Ôćĺ			// Trigger cloud sync with provider-specific data
   952Ôćĺ			// Manual sync command: perform immediate sync with HEAD check (not autosave mode)
   953Ôćĺ			// In only-cloud-sync mode: always sync
   954Ôćĺ			cloud.SyncSessionToCloud(session.SessionID, fileFullPath, markdownContent, []byte(session.RawData), provider.Name(), false)
   955Ôćĺ		}()
   956Ôćĺ
   957Ôćĺ		// Print progress with [n/m] format
   958Ôćĺ		if !silent {
   959Ôćĺ			fmt.Printf("\rSyncing markdown files for %s [%d/%d]", provider.Name(), i+1, sessionCount)
   960Ôćĺ			_ = os.Stdout.Sync()
   961Ôćĺ		}
   962Ôćĺ	}
   963Ôćĺ
   964Ôćĺ	// Print newline after progress
   965Ôćĺ	if !silent && sessionCount > 0 && !onlyCloudSync {
   966Ôćĺ		fmt.Println()
   967Ôćĺ
   968Ôćĺ		// Calculate actual total of processed sessions
   969Ôćĺ		actualTotal := stats.SessionsSkipped + stats.SessionsUpdated + stats.SessionsCreated
   970Ôćĺ
   971Ôćĺ		// Print summary message with proper pluralization
   972Ôćĺ		fmt.Printf("\n%sÔťů %s sync complete!%s ­čôŐ %s%d%s %s processed\n",
   973Ôćĺ			log.ColorBoldGreen, provider.Name(), log.ColorReset,
   974Ôćĺ			log.ColorBoldCyan, actualTotal, log.ColorReset, pluralSession(actualTotal))
   975Ôćĺ		fmt.Println()
   976Ôćĺ
   977Ôćĺ		fmt.Printf("  ÔĆş´ŞĆ %s%d %s up to date (skipped)%s\n",
   978Ôćĺ			log.ColorCyan, stats.SessionsSkipped, pluralSession(stats.SessionsSkipped), log.ColorReset)
   979Ôćĺ		fmt.Printf("  ÔÖ╗´ŞĆ %s%d %s updated%s\n",
   980Ôćĺ			log.ColorYellow, stats.SessionsUpdated, pluralSession(stats.SessionsUpdated), log.ColorReset)
   981Ôćĺ		fmt.Printf("  ÔťĘ %s%d new %s created%s\n",
   982Ôćĺ			log.ColorGreen, stats.SessionsCreated, pluralSession(stats.SessionsCreated), log.ColorReset)
   983Ôćĺ		fmt.Println()
   984Ôćĺ	}
   985Ôćĺ
   986Ôćĺ	return sessionCount, nil
   987Ôćĺ}
   988Ôćĺ
   989Ôćĺ// syncAllProviders syncs all providers that have activity in the current directory
   990Ôćĺfunc syncAllProviders(registry *factory.Registry, cmd *cobra.Command) error {
   991Ôćĺ	// Get debug-raw flag value
   992Ôćĺ	debugRaw, _ := cmd.Flags().GetBool("debug-raw")
   993Ôćĺ	useUTC := !localTimeZone
   994Ôćĺ
   995Ôćĺ	cwd, err := os.Getwd()
   996Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
   997Ôćĺ		slog.Error("Failed to get current working directory", "error", err)
   998Ôćĺ		return err
   999Ôćĺ	}
  1000Ôćĺ
  1001Ôćĺ	providerIDs := registry.ListIDs()
  1002Ôćĺ	providersWithActivity := []string{}
  1003Ôćĺ
  1004Ôćĺ	// Check each provider for activity
  1005Ôćĺ	for _, id := range providerIDs {
  1006Ôćĺ		provider, err := registry.Get(id)
  1007Ôćĺ		if err != nil {
  1008Ôćĺ			slog.Warn("Failed to get provider", "id", id, "error", err)
  1009Ôćĺ			continue
  1010Ôćĺ		}
  1011Ôćĺ
  1012Ôćĺ		if provider.DetectAgent(cwd, false) {
  1013Ôćĺ			providersWithActivity = append(providersWithActivity, id)
  1014Ôćĺ		}
  1015Ôćĺ	}
  1016Ôćĺ
  1017Ôćĺ	// If no providers have activity, show helpful message
  1018Ôćĺ	if len(providersWithActivity) == 0 {
  1019Ôćĺ		if !silent {
  1020Ôćĺ			fmt.Println() // Add visual separation
  1021Ôćĺ			log.UserWarn("No coding agent activity found for this project directory.\n\n")
  1022Ôćĺ
  1023Ôćĺ			log.UserMessage("We checked for activity in '%s' from the following agents:\n", cwd)
  1024Ôćĺ			for _, id := range providerIDs {
  1025Ôćĺ				if provider, err := registry.Get(id); err == nil {
  1026Ôćĺ					log.UserMessage("- %s\n", provider.Name())
  1027Ôćĺ				}
  1028Ôćĺ			}
  1029Ôćĺ			log.UserMessage("\nBut didn't find any activity.\n\n")
  1030Ôćĺ
  1031Ôćĺ			log.UserMessage("To fix this:\n")
  1032Ôćĺ			log.UserMessage("  1. Run 'specstory run' to start the default agent in this directory\n")
  1033Ôćĺ			log.UserMessage("  2. Run 'specstory run <agent>' to start a specific agent in this directory\n")
  1034Ôćĺ			log.UserMessage("  3. Or run the agent directly first, then try syncing again\n")
  1035Ôćĺ			fmt.Println() // Add trailing newline
  1036Ôćĺ		}
  1037Ôćĺ		return nil
  1038Ôćĺ	}
  1039Ôćĺ
  1040Ôćĺ	// Collect provider names for analytics
  1041Ôćĺ	var providerNames []string
  1042Ôćĺ	for _, id := range providersWithActivity {
  1043Ôćĺ		if provider, err := registry.Get(id); err == nil {
  1044Ôćĺ			providerNames = append(providerNames, provider.Name())
  1045Ôćĺ		}
  1046Ôćĺ	}
  1047Ôćĺ	analytics.SetAgentProviders(providerNames)
  1048Ôćĺ
  1049Ôćĺ	// Setup output configuration (once for all providers)
  1050Ôćĺ	config, err := utils.SetupOutputConfig(outputDir, debugDir)
  1051Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
  1052Ôćĺ		return err
  1053Ôćĺ	}
  1054Ôćĺ
  1055Ôćĺ	// Initialize project identity (once for all providers)
  1056Ôćĺ	identityManager := utils.NewProjectIdentityManager(cwd)
  1057Ôćĺ	if _, err := identityManager.EnsureProjectIdentity(); err != nil {
  1058Ôćĺ		slog.Error("Failed to ensure project identity", "error", err)
  1059Ôćĺ	}
  1060Ôćĺ
  1061Ôćĺ	// Check authentication for cloud sync (once)
  1062Ôćĺ	cmdpkg.CheckAndWarnAuthentication(noCloudSync)
  1063Ôćĺ
  1064Ôćĺ	// Ensure history directory exists (once)
  1065Ôćĺ	if err := utils.EnsureHistoryDirectoryExists(config); err != nil {
  1066Ôćĺ		return err
  1067Ôćĺ	}
  1068Ôćĺ
  1069Ôćĺ	// Preload session sizes for batch sync optimization (ONCE for all providers)
  1070Ôćĺ	preloadBulkSessionSizesIfNeeded(identityManager)
  1071Ôćĺ
  1072Ôćĺ	// Sync each provider with activity
  1073Ôćĺ	totalSessionCount := 0
  1074Ôćĺ	var lastError error
  1075Ôćĺ
  1076Ôćĺ	for _, id := range providersWithActivity {
  1077Ôćĺ		provider, err := registry.Get(id)
  1078Ôćĺ		if err != nil {
  1079Ôćĺ			continue
  1080Ôćĺ		}
  1081Ôćĺ
  1082Ôćĺ		if !silent {
  1083Ôćĺ			fmt.Printf("\nParsing %s sessions", provider.Name())
  1084Ôćĺ		}
  1085Ôćĺ
  1086Ôćĺ		sessionCount, err := syncProvider(provider, id, config, debugRaw, useUTC)
  1087Ôćĺ		totalSessionCount += sessionCount
  1088Ôćĺ
  1089Ôćĺ		if err != nil {
  1090Ôćĺ			lastError = err
  1091Ôćĺ			slog.Error("Error syncing provider", "provider", id, "error", err)
  1092Ôćĺ		}
  1093Ôćĺ	}
  1094Ôćĺ
  1095Ôćĺ	// Track overall analytics
  1096Ôćĺ	if lastError != nil {
  1097Ôćĺ		analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventSyncMarkdownError, analytics.Properties{
  1098Ôćĺ			"provider":      "all",
  1099Ôćĺ			"error":         lastError.Error(),
  1100Ôćĺ			"session_count": totalSessionCount,
  1101Ôćĺ		})
  1102Ôćĺ		// Brief delay to ensure error event is sent before exit
  1103Ôćĺ		// TODO: This is a workaround for async analytics - should be fixed properly
  1104Ôćĺ		time.Sleep(500 * time.Millisecond)
  1105Ôćĺ	} else {
  1106Ôćĺ		analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventSyncMarkdownSuccess, analytics.Properties{
  1107Ôćĺ			"provider":      "all",
  1108Ôćĺ			"session_count": totalSessionCount,
  1109Ôćĺ		})
  1110Ôćĺ	}
  1111Ôćĺ
  1112Ôćĺ	return lastError
  1113Ôćĺ}
  1114Ôćĺ
  1115Ôćĺ// syncSingleProvider syncs a specific provider
  1116Ôćĺfunc syncSingleProvider(registry *factory.Registry, providerID string, cmd *cobra.Command) error {
  1117Ôćĺ	// Get debug-raw flag value
  1118Ôćĺ	debugRaw, _ := cmd.Flags().GetBool("debug-raw")
  1119Ôćĺ	useUTC := !localTimeZone
  1120Ôćĺ
  1121Ôćĺ	provider, err := registry.Get(providerID)
  1122Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
  1123Ôćĺ		// Provider not found - show helpful error
  1124Ôćĺ		fmt.Printf("ÔŁî Provider '%s' is not a valid provider implementation\n\n", providerID)
  1125Ôćĺ
  1126Ôćĺ		ids := registry.ListIDs()
  1127Ôćĺ		if len(ids) > 0 {
  1128Ôćĺ			fmt.Println("The registered providers are:")
  1129Ôćĺ			for _, id := range ids {
  1130Ôćĺ				if p, _ := registry.Get(id); p != nil {
  1131Ôćĺ					fmt.Printf("  ÔÇó %s - %s\n", id, p.Name())
  1132Ôćĺ				}
  1133Ôćĺ			}
  1134Ôćĺ			fmt.Println("\nExample: specstory sync " + ids[0])
  1135Ôćĺ		}
  1136Ôćĺ		return err
  1137Ôćĺ	}
  1138Ôćĺ
  1139Ôćĺ	// Set the agent provider for analytics
  1140Ôćĺ	analytics.SetAgentProviders([]string{provider.Name()})
  1141Ôćĺ
  1142Ôćĺ	cwd, err := os.Getwd()
  1143Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
  1144Ôćĺ		slog.Error("Failed to get current working directory", "error", err)
  1145Ôćĺ		return err
  1146Ôćĺ	}
  1147Ôćĺ
  1148Ôćĺ	// Check if provider has activity, with helpful output if not
  1149Ôćĺ	if !provider.DetectAgent(cwd, true) {
  1150Ôćĺ		// Provider already output helpful message
  1151Ôćĺ		return nil
  1152Ôćĺ	}
  1153Ôćĺ
  1154Ôćĺ	// Setup output configuration
  1155Ôćĺ	config, err := utils.SetupOutputConfig(outputDir, debugDir)
  1156Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
  1157Ôćĺ		return err
  1158Ôćĺ	}
  1159Ôćĺ
  1160Ôćĺ	// Initialize project identity
  1161Ôćĺ	identityManager := utils.NewProjectIdentityManager(cwd)
  1162Ôćĺ	if _, err := identityManager.EnsureProjectIdentity(); err != nil {
  1163Ôćĺ		slog.Error("Failed to ensure project identity", "error", err)
  1164Ôćĺ	}
  1165Ôćĺ
  1166Ôćĺ	// Check authentication for cloud sync
  1167Ôćĺ	cmdpkg.CheckAndWarnAuthentication(noCloudSync)
  1168Ôćĺ
  1169Ôćĺ	// Ensure history directory exists
  1170Ôćĺ	if err := utils.EnsureHistoryDirectoryExists(config); err != nil {
  1171Ôćĺ		return err
  1172Ôćĺ	}
  1173Ôćĺ
  1174Ôćĺ	// Preload session sizes for batch sync optimization
  1175Ôćĺ	preloadBulkSessionSizesIfNeeded(identityManager)
  1176Ôćĺ
  1177Ôćĺ	if !silent {
  1178Ôćĺ		fmt.Printf("\nParsing %s sessions", provider.Name())
  1179Ôćĺ	}
  1180Ôćĺ
  1181Ôćĺ	// Perform the sync
  1182Ôćĺ	sessionCount, syncErr := syncProvider(provider, providerID, config, debugRaw, useUTC)
  1183Ôćĺ
  1184Ôćĺ	// Track analytics
  1185Ôćĺ	if syncErr != nil {
  1186Ôćĺ		analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventSyncMarkdownError, analytics.Properties{
  1187Ôćĺ			"provider":      providerID,
  1188Ôćĺ			"error":         syncErr.Error(),
  1189Ôćĺ			"session_count": sessionCount,
  1190Ôćĺ		})
  1191Ôćĺ		// Brief delay to ensure error event is sent before exit
  1192Ôćĺ		// TODO: This is a workaround for async analytics - should be fixed properly
  1193Ôćĺ		time.Sleep(500 * time.Millisecond)
  1194Ôćĺ	} else {
  1195Ôćĺ		analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventSyncMarkdownSuccess, analytics.Properties{
  1196Ôćĺ			"provider":      providerID,
  1197Ôćĺ			"session_count": sessionCount,
  1198Ôćĺ		})
  1199Ôćĺ	}
  1200Ôćĺ
  1201Ôćĺ	return syncErr
  1202Ôćĺ}
  1203Ôćĺ
  1204Ôćĺvar syncCmd *cobra.Command
  1205Ôćĺ
  1206Ôćĺ// Main entry point for the CLI
  1207Ôćĺfunc main() {
  1208Ôćĺ	// Parse critical flags early by manually checking os.Args
  1209Ôćĺ	// This is necessary because cobra's ParseFlags doesn't work correctly before subcommands are added
  1210Ôćĺ	args := os.Args[1:]
  1211Ôćĺ	for i := 0; i < len(args); i++ {
  1212Ôćĺ		arg := args[i]
  1213Ôćĺ		switch arg {
  1214Ôćĺ		case "--no-usage-analytics":
  1215Ôćĺ			noAnalytics = true
  1216Ôćĺ		case "--console":
  1217Ôćĺ			console = true
  1218Ôćĺ		case "--log":
  1219Ôćĺ			logFile = true
  1220Ôćĺ		case "--debug":
  1221Ôćĺ			debug = true
  1222Ôćĺ		case "--silent":
  1223Ôćĺ			silent = true
  1224Ôćĺ		case "--no-version-check":
  1225Ôćĺ			noVersionCheck = true
  1226Ôćĺ		case "--no-telemetry-prompts":
  1227Ôćĺ			noTelemetryPrompts = true
  1228Ôćĺ		case "--output-dir":
  1229Ôćĺ			// Handle --output-dir <value> format (space-separated)
  1230Ôćĺ			if i+1 < len(args) && !strings.HasPrefix(args[i+1], "-") {
  1231Ôćĺ				outputDir = utils.ExpandTilde(args[i+1])
  1232Ôćĺ				i++ // Skip the value in next iteration
  1233Ôćĺ			}
  1234Ôćĺ		case "--telemetry-endpoint":
  1235Ôćĺ			if i+1 < len(args) && !strings.HasPrefix(args[i+1], "-") {
  1236Ôćĺ				telemetryEndpoint = args[i+1]
  1237Ôćĺ				i++ // Skip the value in next iteration
  1238Ôćĺ			}
  1239Ôćĺ		case "--telemetry-service-name":
  1240Ôćĺ			// Handle --telemetry-service-name <value> format (space-separated)
  1241Ôćĺ			if i+1 < len(args) && !strings.HasPrefix(args[i+1], "-") {
  1242Ôćĺ				telemetryServiceName = args[i+1]
  1243Ôćĺ				i++ // Skip the value in next iteration
  1244Ôćĺ			}
  1245Ôćĺ		case "--debug-dir":
  1246Ôćĺ			// Handle --debug-dir <value> format (space-separated)
  1247Ôćĺ			if i+1 < len(args) && !strings.HasPrefix(args[i+1], "-") {
  1248Ôćĺ				debugDir = utils.ExpandTilde(args[i+1])
  1249Ôćĺ				i++ // Skip the value in next iteration
  1250Ôćĺ			}
  1251Ôćĺ		case "--local-time-zone":
  1252Ôćĺ			localTimeZone = true
  1253Ôćĺ		}
  1254Ôćĺ		// Handle --output-dir=value format
  1255Ôćĺ		if strings.HasPrefix(arg, "--output-dir=") {
  1256Ôćĺ			outputDir = utils.ExpandTilde(strings.TrimPrefix(arg, "--output-dir="))
  1257Ôćĺ		}
  1258Ôćĺ		// Handle --debug-dir=value format
  1259Ôćĺ		if strings.HasPrefix(arg, "--debug-dir=") {
  1260Ôćĺ			debugDir = utils.ExpandTilde(strings.TrimPrefix(arg, "--debug-dir="))
  1261Ôćĺ		}
  1262Ôćĺ		// Handle --telemetry-endpoint=value format
  1263Ôćĺ		if strings.HasPrefix(arg, "--telemetry-endpoint=") {
  1264Ôćĺ			telemetryEndpoint = strings.TrimPrefix(arg, "--telemetry-endpoint=")
  1265Ôćĺ		}
  1266Ôćĺ		// Handle --telemetry-service-name=value format
  1267Ôćĺ		if strings.HasPrefix(arg, "--telemetry-service-name=") {
  1268Ôćĺ			telemetryServiceName = strings.TrimPrefix(arg, "--telemetry-service-name=")
  1269Ôćĺ		}
  1270Ôćĺ	}
  1271Ôćĺ
  1272Ôćĺ	// Load configuration early (before logging setup) so TOML settings can affect logging
  1273Ôćĺ	// Priority: CLI flags > local project config > user-level config
  1274Ôćĺ	// Note: OTEL_* env vars take highest priority for telemetry
  1275Ôćĺ	cfg, cfgErr := config.Load(&config.CLIOverrides{
  1276Ôćĺ		OutputDir:            outputDir,
  1277Ôćĺ		LocalTimeZone:        localTimeZone,
  1278Ôćĺ		NoVersionCheck:       noVersionCheck,
  1279Ôćĺ		NoCloudSync:          noCloudSync,
  1280Ôćĺ		OnlyCloudSync:        onlyCloudSync,
  1281Ôćĺ		DebugDir:             debugDir,
  1282Ôćĺ		Console:              console,
  1283Ôćĺ		Log:                  logFile,
  1284Ôćĺ		Debug:                debug,
  1285Ôćĺ		Silent:               silent,
  1286Ôćĺ		NoAnalytics:          noAnalytics,
  1287Ôćĺ		TelemetryEndpoint:    telemetryEndpoint,
  1288Ôćĺ		TelemetryServiceName: telemetryServiceName,
  1289Ôćĺ		NoTelemetryPrompts:   noTelemetryPrompts,
  1290Ôćĺ	})
  1291Ôćĺ	if cfgErr != nil {
  1292Ôćĺ		// Use fallback empty config if load fails - will log error after logging is set up
  1293Ôćĺ		cfg = &config.Config{}
  1294Ôćĺ	}
  1295Ôćĺ	// Store config for use by command functions (e.g., provider commands in run)
  1296Ôćĺ	loadedConfig = cfg
  1297Ôćĺ
  1298Ôćĺ	// Apply config values to flag variables so the rest of the code can use them unchanged.
  1299Ôćĺ	// This merges TOML config with CLI flags (CLI flags take precedence via config.Load).
  1300Ôćĺ	if cfg.GetOutputDir() != "" {
  1301Ôćĺ		outputDir = utils.ExpandTilde(cfg.GetOutputDir())
  1302Ôćĺ	}
  1303Ôćĺ	if cfg.GetDebugDir() != "" {
  1304Ôćĺ		debugDir = utils.ExpandTilde(cfg.GetDebugDir())
  1305Ôćĺ	}
  1306Ôćĺ	localTimeZone = cfg.IsLocalTimeZoneEnabled()
  1307Ôćĺ	noVersionCheck = !cfg.IsVersionCheckEnabled()
  1308Ôćĺ	noCloudSync = !cfg.IsCloudSyncEnabled()
  1309Ôćĺ	onlyCloudSync = !cfg.IsLocalSyncEnabled()
  1310Ôćĺ	noAnalytics = !cfg.IsAnalyticsEnabled()
  1311Ôćĺ	console = cfg.IsConsoleEnabled()
  1312Ôćĺ	logFile = cfg.IsLogEnabled()
  1313Ôćĺ	debug = cfg.IsDebugEnabled()
  1314Ôćĺ	silent = cfg.IsSilentEnabled()
  1315Ôćĺ
  1316Ôćĺ	noTelemetryPrompts = noTelemetryPrompts || cfg.IsTelemetryPromptsDisabled()
  1317Ôćĺ
  1318Ôćĺ	// Set SPI debug dir override before any commands run
  1319Ôćĺ	if debugDir != "" {
  1320Ôćĺ		spi.SetDebugBaseDir(debugDir)
  1321Ôćĺ	}
  1322Ôćĺ
  1323Ôćĺ	// Set up logging early before creating commands (which access the registry)
  1324Ôćĺ	if console || logFile {
  1325Ôćĺ		var logPath string
  1326Ôćĺ		if logFile {
  1327Ôćĺ			config, _ := utils.SetupOutputConfig(outputDir, debugDir)
  1328Ôćĺ			logPath = config.GetLogPath()
  1329Ôćĺ		}
  1330Ôćĺ		_ = log.SetupLogger(console, logFile, debug, logPath)
  1331Ôćĺ	} else {
  1332Ôćĺ		// Set up discard logger to prevent default slog output
  1333Ôćĺ		_ = log.SetupLogger(false, false, false, "")
  1334Ôćĺ	}
  1335Ôćĺ
  1336Ôćĺ	// NOW create the commands - after logging is configured
  1337Ôćĺ	rootCmd = createRootCommand()
  1338Ôćĺ	runCmd = createRunCommand()
  1339Ôćĺ	watchCmd := cmdpkg.CreateWatchCommand(&cloudURL, localTimeZone, debugDir)
  1340Ôćĺ	syncCmd = createSyncCommand()
  1341Ôćĺ	listCmd := cmdpkg.CreateListCommand()
  1342Ôćĺ	checkCmd := cmdpkg.CreateCheckCommand()
  1343Ôćĺ	versionCmd := cmdpkg.CreateVersionCommand(version)
  1344Ôćĺ	loginCmd := cmdpkg.CreateLoginCommand(&cloudURL)
  1345Ôćĺ	logoutCmd := cmdpkg.CreateLogoutCommand(&cloudURL)
  1346Ôćĺ
  1347Ôćĺ	// Set version for the automatic version flag
  1348Ôćĺ	rootCmd.Version = version
  1349Ôćĺ
  1350Ôćĺ	// Override the default version template to match our version command output
  1351Ôćĺ	rootCmd.SetVersionTemplate("{{.Version}} (SpecStory)")
  1352Ôćĺ
  1353Ôćĺ	// Set our custom help command (for "specstory help")
  1354Ôćĺ	helpCmd := cmdpkg.CreateHelpCommand(rootCmd)
  1355Ôćĺ	rootCmd.SetHelpCommand(helpCmd)
  1356Ôćĺ
  1357Ôćĺ	// Add the subcommands
  1358Ôćĺ	rootCmd.AddCommand(runCmd)
  1359Ôćĺ	rootCmd.AddCommand(watchCmd)
  1360Ôćĺ	rootCmd.AddCommand(syncCmd)
  1361Ôćĺ	rootCmd.AddCommand(listCmd)
  1362Ôćĺ	rootCmd.AddCommand(versionCmd)
  1363Ôćĺ	rootCmd.AddCommand(checkCmd)
  1364Ôćĺ	rootCmd.AddCommand(loginCmd)
  1365Ôćĺ	rootCmd.AddCommand(logoutCmd)
  1366Ôćĺ
  1367Ôćĺ	// Global flags available on all commands
  1368Ôćĺ	// Use current variable values as defaults so config file values are preserved
  1369Ôćĺ	rootCmd.PersistentFlags().BoolVar(&console, "console", console, "enable error/warn/info output to stdout")
  1370Ôćĺ	rootCmd.PersistentFlags().BoolVar(&logFile, "log", logFile, "write error/warn/info output to ./.specstory/debug/debug.log")
  1371Ôćĺ	rootCmd.PersistentFlags().BoolVar(&debug, "debug", debug, "enable debug-level output (requires --console or --log)")
  1372Ôćĺ	rootCmd.PersistentFlags().BoolVar(&noAnalytics, "no-usage-analytics", noAnalytics, "disable usage analytics")
  1373Ôćĺ	rootCmd.PersistentFlags().BoolVar(&silent, "silent", silent, "suppress all non-error output")
  1374Ôćĺ	rootCmd.PersistentFlags().BoolVar(&noVersionCheck, "no-version-check", noVersionCheck, "skip checking for newer versions")
  1375Ôćĺ	rootCmd.PersistentFlags().StringVar(&cloudToken, "cloud-token", "", "use a SpecStory Cloud refresh token for this session (bypasses login)")
  1376Ôćĺ	_ = rootCmd.PersistentFlags().MarkHidden("cloud-token") // Hidden flag
  1377Ôćĺ
  1378Ôćĺ	// Command-specific flags
  1379Ôćĺ	syncCmd.Flags().StringSliceP("session", "s", []string{}, "optional session IDs to sync (can be specified multiple times, provider-specific format)")
  1380Ôćĺ	syncCmd.Flags().BoolVar(&printToStdout, "print", printToStdout, "output session markdown to stdout instead of saving (requires -s flag)")
  1381Ôćĺ	syncCmd.Flags().StringVar(&outputDir, "output-dir", outputDir, "custom output directory for markdown files (default: ./.specstory/history)")
  1382Ôćĺ	syncCmd.Flags().StringVar(&debugDir, "debug-dir", debugDir, "custom output directory for debug data (default: ./.specstory/debug)")
  1383Ôćĺ	syncCmd.Flags().BoolVar(&noCloudSync, "no-cloud-sync", noCloudSync, "disable cloud sync functionality")
  1384Ôćĺ	syncCmd.Flags().BoolVar(&onlyCloudSync, "only-cloud-sync", onlyCloudSync, "skip local markdown file saves, only upload to cloud (requires authentication)")
  1385Ôćĺ	syncCmd.Flags().StringVar(&cloudURL, "cloud-url", "", "override the default cloud API base URL")
  1386Ôćĺ	_ = syncCmd.Flags().MarkHidden("cloud-url") // Hidden flag
  1387Ôćĺ	syncCmd.Flags().Bool("debug-raw", false, "debug mode to output pretty-printed raw data files")
  1388Ôćĺ	_ = syncCmd.Flags().MarkHidden("debug-raw") // Hidden flag
  1389Ôćĺ	syncCmd.Flags().BoolVar(&localTimeZone, "local-time-zone", localTimeZone, "use local timezone for file name and content timestamps (when not present: UTC)")
  1390Ôćĺ	syncCmd.Flags().StringVar(&telemetryEndpoint, "telemetry-endpoint", "", "Open Telemetry Protocol (OTLP) gRPC collector endpoint (default is off, e.g., localhost:4317)")
  1391Ôćĺ	syncCmd.Flags().StringVar(&telemetryServiceName, "telemetry-service-name", "", "override the default service name for telemetry, if telemetry is enabled")
  1392Ôćĺ	syncCmd.Flags().BoolVar(&noTelemetryPrompts, "no-telemetry-prompts", noTelemetryPrompts, "exclude prompt text from telemetry spans, if telemetry is enabled")
  1393Ôćĺ
  1394Ôćĺ	runCmd.Flags().BoolVar(&provenanceEnabled, "provenance", false, "enable AI provenance tracking (correlate file changes to agent activity)")
  1395Ôćĺ	_ = runCmd.Flags().MarkHidden("provenance") // Hidden flag
  1396Ôćĺ	runCmd.Flags().StringP("command", "c", "", "custom agent execution command for the provider")
  1397Ôćĺ	runCmd.Flags().String("resume", "", "resume a specific session by ID")
  1398Ôćĺ	runCmd.Flags().StringVar(&outputDir, "output-dir", outputDir, "custom output directory for markdown files (default: ./.specstory/history)")
  1399Ôćĺ	runCmd.Flags().StringVar(&debugDir, "debug-dir", debugDir, "custom output directory for debug data (default: ./.specstory/debug)")
  1400Ôćĺ	runCmd.Flags().BoolVar(&noCloudSync, "no-cloud-sync", noCloudSync, "disable cloud sync functionality")
  1401Ôćĺ	runCmd.Flags().BoolVar(&onlyCloudSync, "only-cloud-sync", onlyCloudSync, "skip local markdown file saves, only upload to cloud (requires authentication)")
  1402Ôćĺ	runCmd.Flags().StringVar(&cloudURL, "cloud-url", "", "override the default cloud API base URL")
  1403Ôćĺ	_ = runCmd.Flags().MarkHidden("cloud-url") // Hidden flag
  1404Ôćĺ	runCmd.Flags().Bool("debug-raw", false, "debug mode to output pretty-printed raw data files")
  1405Ôćĺ	_ = runCmd.Flags().MarkHidden("debug-raw") // Hidden flag
  1406Ôćĺ	runCmd.Flags().BoolVar(&localTimeZone, "local-time-zone", localTimeZone, "use local timezone for file name and content timestamps (when not present: UTC)")
  1407Ôćĺ	runCmd.Flags().StringVar(&telemetryEndpoint, "telemetry-endpoint", "", "Open Telemetry Protocol (OTLP) gRPC collector endpoint (default is off, e.g., localhost:4317)")
  1408Ôćĺ	runCmd.Flags().StringVar(&telemetryServiceName, "telemetry-service-name", "", "override the default service name for telemetry, if telemetry is enabled")
  1409Ôćĺ	runCmd.Flags().BoolVar(&noTelemetryPrompts, "no-telemetry-prompts", noTelemetryPrompts, "exclude prompt text from telemetry spans, if telemetry is enabled")
  1410Ôćĺ
  1411Ôćĺ	// Initialize analytics with the full CLI command (unless disabled)
  1412Ôćĺ	slog.Debug("Analytics initialization check", "noAnalytics", noAnalytics, "flag_should_disable", noAnalytics)
  1413Ôćĺ	if !noAnalytics {
  1414Ôćĺ		slog.Debug("Initializing analytics")
  1415Ôćĺ		fullCommand := strings.Join(os.Args, " ")
  1416Ôćĺ		if err := analytics.Init(fullCommand, version); err != nil {
  1417Ôćĺ			// Log error but don't fail - analytics should not break the app
  1418Ôćĺ			slog.Warn("Failed to initialize analytics", "error", err)
  1419Ôćĺ		}
  1420Ôćĺ		defer func() { _ = analytics.Close() }() // Analytics errors shouldn't break the app
  1421Ôćĺ	} else {
  1422Ôćĺ		slog.Debug("Analytics disabled by --no-usage-analytics flag")
  1423Ôćĺ	}
  1424Ôćĺ
  1425Ôćĺ	// Log config load error after logging is set up
  1426Ôćĺ	if cfgErr != nil {
  1427Ôćĺ		slog.Warn("Failed to load config file, using defaults", "error", cfgErr)
  1428Ôćĺ	}
  1429Ôćĺ
  1430Ôćĺ	// Initialize telemetry (after logging is configured)
  1431Ôćĺ	if err := telemetry.Init(context.Background(), telemetry.Options{
  1432Ôćĺ		ServiceName: cfg.GetTelemetryServiceName(),
  1433Ôćĺ		Endpoint:    cfg.GetTelemetryEndpoint(),
  1434Ôćĺ		Enabled:     cfg.IsTelemetryEnabled(),
  1435Ôćĺ	}); err != nil {
  1436Ôćĺ		slog.Warn("Failed to initialize telemetry", "error", err)
  1437Ôćĺ	}
  1438Ôćĺ	// Shutdown flushes pending spans/metrics before closing providers.
  1439Ôćĺ	defer func() {
  1440Ôćĺ		shutdownCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 10*time.Second)
  1441Ôćĺ		defer cancel()
  1442Ôćĺ		if err := telemetry.Shutdown(shutdownCtx); err != nil {
  1443Ôćĺ			slog.Warn("Failed to shutdown telemetry", "error", err)
  1444Ôćĺ		}
  1445Ôćĺ	}()
  1446Ôćĺ
  1447Ôćĺ	// Check for updates (blocking)
  1448Ôćĺ	utils.CheckForUpdates(version, noVersionCheck, silent)
  1449Ôćĺ
  1450Ôćĺ	// Ensure proper cleanup and logging on exit
  1451Ôćĺ	defer func() {
  1452Ôćĺ		if r := recover(); r != nil {
  1453Ôćĺ			slog.Error("=== SpecStory PANIC ===", "panic", r)
  1454Ôćĺ			// Still try to wait for cloud sync even on panic
  1455Ôćĺ			_ = cloud.Shutdown(cloud.CloudSyncTimeout)
  1456Ôćĺ			log.CloseLogger()
  1457Ôćĺ			panic(r) // Re-panic after logging
  1458Ôćĺ		}
  1459Ôćĺ		// Wait for cloud sync operations to complete before exiting
  1460Ôćĺ		cloudStats := cloud.Shutdown(cloud.CloudSyncTimeout)
  1461Ôćĺ
  1462Ôćĺ		// Track cloud sync analytics if we have stats
  1463Ôćĺ		if cloudStats != nil {
  1464Ôćĺ			// Calculate total attempted (all sessions that started sync)
  1465Ôćĺ			totalCloudSessions := cloudStats.SessionsAttempted
  1466Ôćĺ
  1467Ôćĺ			// Track cloud sync completion event
  1468Ôćĺ			if cloudStats.SessionsUpdated > 0 || cloudStats.SessionsCreated > 0 || cloudStats.SessionsErrored > 0 || cloudStats.SessionsTimedOut > 0 {
  1469Ôćĺ				analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventCloudSyncComplete, analytics.Properties{
  1470Ôćĺ					"sessions_created":   cloudStats.SessionsCreated,
  1471Ôćĺ					"sessions_updated":   cloudStats.SessionsUpdated,
  1472Ôćĺ					"sessions_skipped":   cloudStats.SessionsSkipped,
  1473Ôćĺ					"sessions_errored":   cloudStats.SessionsErrored,
  1474Ôćĺ					"sessions_timed_out": cloudStats.SessionsTimedOut,
  1475Ôćĺ					"total":              totalCloudSessions,
  1476Ôćĺ				})
  1477Ôćĺ			}
  1478Ôćĺ
  1479Ôćĺ			// Display cloud sync stats if not in silent mode
  1480Ôćĺ			if !silent && totalCloudSessions > 0 {
  1481Ôćĺ				fmt.Println() // Visual separation from provider sync output
  1482Ôćĺ
  1483Ôćĺ				// Determine if sync was complete or incomplete based on errors/timeouts
  1484Ôćĺ				if cloudStats.SessionsErrored > 0 || cloudStats.SessionsTimedOut > 0 {
  1485Ôćĺ					fmt.Printf("ÔŁî Cloud sync incomplete! ­čôŐ %s%d%s %s processed\n",

  1493Ôćĺ				fmt.Printf("  ÔĆş´ŞĆ %s%d %s up to date (skipped)%s\n",

  1497Ôćĺ				fmt.Printf("  ÔťĘ %s%d new %s created%s\n",

  1499Ôćĺ
  1500Ôćĺ				// Only show errors if there were any

  1519Ôćĺ						if lastRunSessionID != "" {

  1523Ôćĺ						} else {

  1526Ôćĺ								log.ColorBoldCyan, projectID, log.ColorReset)
  1527Ôćĺ						}
  1528Ôćĺ					}

  1531Ôćĺ		}
  1532Ôćĺ
  1533Ôćĺ		if console || logFile {
  1534Ôćĺ			slog.Info("=== SpecStory Exiting ===", "code", 0, "status", "normal termination")
  1535Ôćĺ		}
  1536Ôćĺ		log.CloseLogger()
  1537Ôćĺ	}()
  1538Ôćĺ
  1539Ôćĺ	if err := fang.Execute(context.Background(), rootCmd, fang.WithVersion(version)); err != nil {
  1540Ôćĺ		// Check if we're running the check command by looking at the executed command
  1541Ôćĺ		executedCmd, _, _ := rootCmd.Find(os.Args[1:])
  1542Ôćĺ		if executedCmd == checkCmd {
  1543Ôćĺ			if console || logFile {
  1544Ôćĺ				slog.Error("=== SpecStory Exiting ===", "code", 2, "status", "agent execution failure")
  1545Ôćĺ				slog.Error("Error", "error", err)
  1546Ôćĺ			}
  1547Ôćĺ			// For check command, the error details are handled by checkSingleProvider/checkAllProviders
  1548Ôćĺ			// So we just exit silently here
  1549Ôćĺ			_ = cloud.Shutdown(cloud.CloudSyncTimeout)
  1550Ôćĺ			os.Exit(2)
  1551Ôćĺ		} else {
  1552Ôćĺ			if console || logFile {
  1553Ôćĺ				slog.Error("=== SpecStory Exiting ===", "code", 1, "status", "error")
  1554Ôćĺ				slog.Error("Error", "error", err)
  1555Ôćĺ			}
  1556Ôćĺ			fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr) // Visual separation makes error output more noticeable
  1557Ôćĺ
  1558Ôćĺ			// Only show usage for actual command/flag errors from Cobra
  1559Ôćĺ			// These are errors like "unknown command", "unknown flag", "invalid argument", etc.
  1560Ôćĺ			// For all other errors (authentication, network, file system, etc.), we should NOT show usage
  1561Ôćĺ			errMsg := err.Error()
  1562Ôćĺ			isCommandError := strings.Contains(errMsg, "unknown command") ||
  1563Ôćĺ				strings.Contains(errMsg, "unknown flag") ||
  1564Ôćĺ				strings.Contains(errMsg, "invalid argument") ||
  1565Ôćĺ				strings.Contains(errMsg, "required flag") ||
  1566Ôćĺ				strings.Contains(errMsg, "accepts") || // e.g., "accepts 1 arg(s), received 2"
  1567Ôćĺ				strings.Contains(errMsg, "no such flag") ||
  1568Ôćĺ				strings.Contains(errMsg, "flag needs an argument")
  1569Ôćĺ
  1570Ôćĺ			if isCommandError {
  1571Ôćĺ				_ = rootCmd.Usage() // Ignore error; we're exiting anyway
  1572Ôćĺ				fmt.Println()       // Add visual separation after usage for better CLI readability
  1573Ôćĺ			}
  1574Ôćĺ			_ = cloud.Shutdown(cloud.CloudSyncTimeout)
  1575Ôćĺ			os.Exit(1)
  1576Ôćĺ		}
  1577Ôćĺ	}
  1578Ôćĺ}

     1Ôćĺ// Package telemetry provides OpenTelemetry trace and metric initialization for the SpecStory CLI.
     2Ôćĺ// It follows the same idempotent-init pattern as pkg/analytics: first call to Init wins,
     3Ôćĺ// disabled path uses the OTel no-op provider (zero overhead, no nil checks needed).
     4Ôćĺpackage telemetry
     5Ôćĺ
     6Ôćĺimport (
     7Ôćĺ	"context"
     8Ôćĺ	"crypto/sha256"
     9Ôćĺ	"fmt"

    11Ôćĺ	"net/url"

    13Ôćĺ	"strings"
    14Ôćĺ	"sync"

    17Ôćĺ	"go.opentelemetry.io/otel"

    21Ôćĺ	"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/metric"

    24Ôćĺ	sdktrace "go.opentelemetry.io/otel/sdk/trace"
    25Ôćĺ	"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/trace"
    26Ôćĺ	"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/trace/noop"

    28Ôćĺ
    29Ôćĺfunc telemetryLogger() *slog.Logger {
    30Ôćĺ	return slog.Default().With("component", "telemetry")
    31Ôćĺ}
    32Ôćĺ
    33Ôćĺconst (
    34Ôćĺ	// defaultEndpoint is the OTLP gRPC collector address used when
    35Ôćĺ	// OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT is set but Options.Endpoint is empty.
    36Ôćĺ	defaultEndpoint = "localhost:4317"
    37Ôćĺ
    38Ôćĺ	// metricExportInterval is how often metrics are exported to the collector.
    39Ôćĺ	metricExportInterval = 10 * time.Second
    40Ôćĺ)
    41Ôćĺ
    42Ôćĺ// Options configures telemetry initialisation.
    43Ôćĺtype Options struct {
    44Ôćĺ	ServiceName string // OTel service.name resource attribute (default "specstory-cli")
    45Ôćĺ	Endpoint    string // OTLP gRPC collector address (default "localhost:4317")
    46Ôćĺ	Enabled     bool   // When false, Init is a no-op and the global no-op provider is used
    47Ôćĺ}
    48Ôćĺ
    49Ôćĺvar (
    50Ôćĺ	initOnce       sync.Once
    51Ôćĺ	traceProvider  *sdktrace.TracerProvider
    52Ôćĺ	meterProvider  *sdkmetric.MeterProvider
    53Ôćĺ	meter          metric.Meter
    54Ôćĺ	metricsEnabled bool
    55Ôćĺ
    56Ôćĺ	// Metric instruments
    57Ôćĺ	sessionsProcessed  metric.Int64Counter
    58Ôćĺ	exchangesProcessed metric.Int64Counter
    59Ôćĺ	messagesProcessed  metric.Int64Counter
    60Ôćĺ	toolsUsed          metric.Int64Counter
    61Ôćĺ	processingDuration metric.Float64Histogram
    62Ôćĺ
    63Ôćĺ	// Token usage metrics (common)
    64Ôćĺ	inputTokensTotal  metric.Int64Counter
    65Ôćĺ	outputTokensTotal metric.Int64Counter
    66Ôćĺ
    67Ôćĺ	// Token usage metrics (Claude Code specific)
    68Ôćĺ	cacheCreationTokens metric.Int64Counter
    69Ôćĺ	cacheReadTokens     metric.Int64Counter
    70Ôćĺ
    71Ôćĺ	// Token usage metrics (Codex CLI specific)
    72Ôćĺ	cachedInputTokens     metric.Int64Counter
    73Ôćĺ	reasoningOutputTokens metric.Int64Counter
    74Ôćĺ
    75Ôćĺ	// Token usage metrics (Gemini CLI specific)

    77Ôćĺ	thoughtTokens metric.Int64Counter

    79Ôćĺ
