    69Ôćĺ// ProcessSingleSession writes markdown and triggers cloud sync for a single session.
    70Ôćĺ// ctx is used for OTel trace/span propagation (no-op when telemetry is disabled).
    71Ôćĺ// onlyCloudSync skips local markdown writes and only syncs to cloud.
    72Ôćĺ// isAutosave indicates if this is being called from run/watch (true) or sync command (false).
    73Ôćĺ// debugRaw enables schema validation (only run in debug mode to avoid overhead).
    74Ôćĺ// useUTC controls timestamp format (true=UTC, false=local).
    75Ôćĺ// noTelemetryPrompts excludes user prompt text from telemetry spans for privacy.
    76Ôćĺ// Returns the size of the markdown content in bytes.
    77Ôćĺfunc ProcessSingleSession(ctx context.Context, session *spi.AgentChatSession, config utils.OutputConfig, onlyCloudSync bool, showOutput bool, isAutosave bool, debugRaw bool, useUTC bool, noTelemetryPrompts bool) (int, error) {
    78Ôćĺ	if session == nil || session.SessionData == nil {
    79Ôćĺ		return 0, fmt.Errorf("session or session data is nil")
    80Ôćĺ	}
    81Ôćĺ
    82Ôćĺ	// Track processing start time for metrics
    83Ôćĺ	processingStart := time.Now()
    84Ôćĺ
    85Ôćĺ	// Create a context with a deterministic trace ID from the session ID.
    86Ôćĺ	// This groups all spans for the same session into a single trace, even
    87Ôćĺ	// across multiple invocations in autosave mode.
    88Ôćĺ	ctx = telemetry.ContextWithSessionTrace(ctx, session.SessionID)
    89Ôćĺ
    90Ôćĺ	// Start an OTel span for this session processing (no-op when telemetry is disabled)
    91Ôćĺ	ctx, span := telemetry.Tracer("specstory").Start(ctx, "process_session")
    92Ôćĺ	defer span.End()
    93Ôćĺ
    94Ôćĺ	// Compute session statistics
    95Ôćĺ	agentName := session.SessionData.Provider.Name
    96Ôćĺ	stats := telemetry.ComputeSessionStats(agentName, session)
    97Ôćĺ
    98Ôćĺ	// Record metrics (no-op when telemetry is disabled)
    99Ôćĺ	defer func() {
   100Ôćĺ		telemetry.RecordSessionMetrics(ctx, stats, time.Since(processingStart))
   101Ôćĺ	}()
   102Ôćĺ
   103Ôćĺ	// Set session span attributes
   104Ôćĺ	telemetry.SetSessionSpanAttributes(span, stats)
   105Ôćĺ
   106Ôćĺ	// Create child spans for each exchange
   107Ôćĺ	if len(session.SessionData.Exchanges) > 0 {
   108Ôćĺ		telemetry.ProcessExchangeSpans(ctx, stats, session.SessionData.Exchanges, noTelemetryPrompts)
   109Ôćĺ	}
   110Ôćĺ
   111Ôćĺ	ValidateSessionData(session, debugRaw)
   112Ôćĺ	WriteDebugSessionData(session, debugRaw)
   113Ôćĺ
   114Ôćĺ	// Generate markdown from SessionData
   115Ôćĺ	markdownContent, err := GenerateMarkdownFromAgentSession(session.SessionData, false, useUTC)
   116Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
   117Ôćĺ		slog.Error("Failed to generate markdown from SessionData", "sessionId", session.SessionID, "error", err)
   118Ôćĺ		return 0, fmt.Errorf("failed to generate markdown: %w", err)
   119Ôćĺ	}
   120Ôćĺ
   121Ôćĺ	// Calculate markdown size in bytes
   122Ôćĺ	markdownSize := len(markdownContent)
   123Ôćĺ
   124Ôćĺ	// Generate filename from timestamp and slug
   125Ôćĺ	fileFullPath := BuildSessionFilePath(session, config.GetHistoryDir(), useUTC)
   126Ôćĺ
   127Ôćĺ	if showOutput && !log.IsSilent() {
   128Ôćĺ		fmt.Printf("Processing session %s...", session.SessionID)
   129Ôćĺ	}
   130Ôćĺ
   131Ôćĺ	// Check if file already exists with same content
   132Ôćĺ	var outcome string
   133Ôćĺ	identicalContent := false
   134Ôćĺ	fileExists := false
   135Ôćĺ	if existingContent, err := os.ReadFile(fileFullPath); err == nil {
   136Ôćĺ		fileExists = true
   137Ôćĺ		if string(existingContent) == markdownContent {
   138Ôćĺ			identicalContent = true
   139Ôćĺ			slog.Info("Markdown file already exists with same content, skipping write",
   140Ôćĺ				"sessionId", session.SessionID,
   141Ôćĺ				"path", fileFullPath)
   142Ôćĺ		}
   143Ôćĺ	}
   144Ôćĺ
   145Ôćĺ	// Write file if needed (skip if only-cloud-sync is enabled)
   146Ôćĺ	if !onlyCloudSync {
   147Ôćĺ		if !identicalContent {
   148Ôćĺ			// Ensure history directory exists (handles deletion during long-running watch/run)
   149Ôćĺ			if err := utils.EnsureHistoryDirectoryExists(config); err != nil {
   150Ôćĺ				return 0, fmt.Errorf("failed to ensure history directory: %w", err)
   151Ôćĺ			}
   152Ôćĺ			err := os.WriteFile(fileFullPath, []byte(markdownContent), 0644)
   153Ôćĺ			if err != nil {
   154Ôćĺ				// Track write error
   155Ôćĺ				if isAutosave {
   156Ôćĺ					analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventAutosaveError, analytics.Properties{
   157Ôćĺ						"session_id":      session.SessionID,
   158Ôćĺ						"error":           err.Error(),
   159Ôćĺ						"only_cloud_sync": onlyCloudSync,
   160Ôćĺ					})
   161Ôćĺ				} else {
   162Ôćĺ					analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventSyncMarkdownError, analytics.Properties{
   163Ôćĺ						"session_id":      session.SessionID,
   164Ôćĺ						"error":           err.Error(),
   165Ôćĺ						"only_cloud_sync": onlyCloudSync,
   166Ôćĺ					})
   167Ôćĺ				}
   168Ôćĺ				return 0, fmt.Errorf("error writing markdown file: %w", err)
   169Ôćĺ			}
   170Ôćĺ
   171Ôćĺ			// Track successful write
   172Ôćĺ			if isAutosave {
   173Ôćĺ				if !fileExists {
   174Ôćĺ					// New file created during autosave
   175Ôćĺ					analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventAutosaveNew, analytics.Properties{
   176Ôćĺ						"session_id":      session.SessionID,
   177Ôćĺ						"only_cloud_sync": onlyCloudSync,
   178Ôćĺ					})
   179Ôćĺ				} else {
   180Ôćĺ					// File updated during autosave
   181Ôćĺ					analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventAutosaveSuccess, analytics.Properties{
   182Ôćĺ						"session_id":      session.SessionID,
   183Ôćĺ						"only_cloud_sync": onlyCloudSync,
   184Ôćĺ					})
   185Ôćĺ				}
   186Ôćĺ			} else {
   187Ôćĺ				if !fileExists {
   188Ôćĺ					// New file created during manual sync
   189Ôćĺ					analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventSyncMarkdownNew, analytics.Properties{
   190Ôćĺ						"session_id":      session.SessionID,
   191Ôćĺ						"only_cloud_sync": onlyCloudSync,
   192Ôćĺ					})
   193Ôćĺ				} else {
   194Ôćĺ					// File updated during manual sync
   195Ôćĺ					analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventSyncMarkdownSuccess, analytics.Properties{
   196Ôćĺ						"session_id":      session.SessionID,
   197Ôćĺ						"only_cloud_sync": onlyCloudSync,
   198Ôćĺ					})
   199Ôćĺ				}
   200Ôćĺ			}
   201Ôćĺ
   202Ôćĺ			slog.Info("Successfully wrote file",
   203Ôćĺ				"sessionId", session.SessionID,
   204Ôćĺ				"path", fileFullPath)
   205Ôćĺ		}
   206Ôćĺ
   207Ôćĺ		// Determine outcome for user feedback
   208Ôćĺ		if identicalContent {
   209Ôćĺ			outcome = "up to date (skipped)"
   210Ôćĺ		} else if fileExists {
   211Ôćĺ			outcome = "updated"
   212Ôćĺ		} else {
   213Ôćĺ			outcome = "created"
   214Ôćĺ		}
   215Ôćĺ	} else {
   216Ôćĺ		// Only cloud sync mode - no local file operations
   217Ôćĺ		outcome = "synced to cloud only"
   218Ôćĺ		slog.Info("Skipping local file write (only-cloud-sync mode)",
   219Ôćĺ			"sessionId", session.SessionID)
   220Ôćĺ	}
   221Ôćĺ
   222Ôćĺ	// Trigger cloud sync with provider-specific data
   223Ôćĺ	// In only-cloud-sync mode: always sync (no file to check for identical content)
   224Ôćĺ	// In normal mode: skip sync only if identical content AND in autosave mode
   225Ôćĺ	if onlyCloudSync || !identicalContent || !isAutosave {
   226Ôćĺ		cloud.SyncSessionToCloud(session.SessionID, fileFullPath, markdownContent, []byte(session.RawData), session.SessionData.Provider.Name, isAutosave)
   227Ôćĺ	}
   228Ôćĺ
   229Ôćĺ	if showOutput && !log.IsSilent() {
   230Ôćĺ		fmt.Printf(" %s\n", outcome)
   231Ôćĺ		fmt.Println() // Visual separation
   232Ôćĺ	}
   233Ôćĺ
   234Ôćĺ	return markdownSize, nil
   235Ôćĺ}

     1Ôćĺpackage schema

     6Ôćĺ
     7Ôćĺ// Role constants for message types

    29Ôćĺ
    30Ôćĺ// SessionData is the unified data format for sessions from all terminal coding agent providers
    31Ôćĺtype SessionData struct {
    32Ôćĺ	SchemaVersion string       `json:"schemaVersion"`
    33Ôćĺ	Provider      ProviderInfo `json:"provider"`
    34Ôćĺ	SessionID     string       `json:"sessionId"`
    35Ôćĺ	CreatedAt     string       `json:"createdAt"`
    36Ôćĺ	UpdatedAt     string       `json:"updatedAt,omitempty"`
    37Ôćĺ	Slug          string       `json:"slug,omitempty"`
    38Ôćĺ	WorkspaceRoot string       `json:"workspaceRoot"`
    39Ôćĺ	Exchanges     []Exchange   `json:"exchanges"`
    40Ôćĺ}
    41Ôćĺ
    42Ôćĺ// ProviderInfo is the information about the agent provider that created the session

    44Ôćĺ	ID      string `json:"id"`

    46Ôćĺ	Version string `json:"version"`
    47Ôćĺ}
    48Ôćĺ
    49Ôćĺ// Exchange is a conversational turn with ordered messages
    50Ôćĺtype Exchange struct {
    51Ôćĺ	ExchangeID string                 `json:"exchangeId"`
    52Ôćĺ	StartTime  string                 `json:"startTime,omitempty"`
    53Ôćĺ	EndTime    string                 `json:"endTime,omitempty"`
    54Ôćĺ	Messages   []Message              `json:"messages"`
    55Ôćĺ	Metadata   map[string]interface{} `json:"metadata,omitempty"`
    56Ôćĺ}
    57Ôćĺ
    58Ôćĺ// Message is either a user or agent message
    59Ôćĺtype Message struct {

    63Ôćĺ	Model     string                 `json:"model,omitempty"`
    64Ôćĺ	Content   []ContentPart          `json:"content,omitempty"`

    66Ôćĺ	PathHints []string               `json:"pathHints,omitempty"`

    75Ôćĺ}
    76Ôćĺ
    77Ôćĺ// Usage represents token usage for an agent message.
    78Ôćĺ// Different providers track different token types:
    79Ôćĺ//   - Claude Code: InputTokens, OutputTokens, CacheCreationInputTokens, CacheReadInputTokens
    80Ôćĺ//   - Codex CLI: InputTokens, OutputTokens, CachedInputTokens, ReasoningOutputTokens
    81Ôćĺ//   - Gemini CLI: InputTokens, OutputTokens, CachedTokens, ThoughtTokens, ToolTokens
    82Ôćĺ//   - Droid CLI: InputTokens, OutputTokens, CacheCreationInputTokens, CacheReadInputTokens, ThinkingTokens
    83Ôćĺ//
    84Ôćĺ// All fields use omitempty so only populated fields appear in JSON.
    85Ôćĺtype Usage struct {
    86Ôćĺ	// Common fields (all providers)
    87Ôćĺ	InputTokens  int `json:"inputTokens,omitempty"`
    88Ôćĺ	OutputTokens int `json:"outputTokens,omitempty"`
    89Ôćĺ
    90Ôćĺ	// Claude Code specific (also used by Droid CLI)

    92Ôćĺ	CacheReadInputTokens     int `json:"cacheReadInputTokens,omitempty"`
    93Ôćĺ
    94Ôćĺ	// Codex CLI specific
    95Ôćĺ	CachedInputTokens     int `json:"cachedInputTokens,omitempty"`
    96Ôćĺ	ReasoningOutputTokens int `json:"reasoningOutputTokens,omitempty"`
    97Ôćĺ
    98Ôćĺ	// Gemini CLI specific
    99Ôćĺ	CachedTokens  int `json:"cachedTokens,omitempty"`  // cached input tokens
   100Ôćĺ	ThoughtTokens int `json:"thoughtTokens,omitempty"` // reasoning/thinking tokens
   101Ôćĺ	ToolTokens    int `json:"toolTokens,omitempty"`    // tool-related tokens
   102Ôćĺ
   103Ôćĺ	// Droid CLI specific
   104Ôćĺ	ThinkingTokens int `json:"thinkingTokens,omitempty"` // thinking/reasoning tokens
   105Ôćĺ}
   106Ôćĺ
   107Ôćĺ// GetIntFromMap safely extracts an int from a map[string]interface{}.
   108Ôćĺ// JSON numbers are unmarshaled as float64, so we handle that case.
   109Ôćĺfunc GetIntFromMap(m map[string]interface{}, key string) int {
   110Ôćĺ	if m == nil {
   111Ôćĺ		return 0
   112Ôćĺ	}
   113Ôćĺ	if val, ok := m[key]; ok {
   114Ôćĺ		switch v := val.(type) {
   115Ôćĺ		case float64:
   116Ôćĺ			return int(v)
   117Ôćĺ		case int64:
   118Ôćĺ			return int(v)
   119Ôćĺ		case int:
   120Ôćĺ			return v
   121Ôćĺ		}
   122Ôćĺ	}
   123Ôćĺ	return 0
   124Ôćĺ}
   125Ôćĺ
   126Ôćĺ// ToolInfo is tool use information
   127Ôćĺtype ToolInfo struct {
   128Ôćĺ	Name string `json:"name"` // Name of the tool
   129Ôćĺ
   130Ôćĺ	// Tool type classification:
   131Ôćĺ	// Use `write` for tools that write to the file system
   132Ôćĺ	// Use `read` for tools that read from the file system
   133Ôćĺ	// Use `search` for tools that search the file system or the web (e.g. `grep`, `glob`, `find`, `web_search` etc.)
   134Ôćĺ	// Use `shell` for tools that run shell commands (e.g. `bash`, `sed`, `awk`, `ls` etc.)
   135Ôćĺ	// Use `task` for tools that manage tasks (e.g. `todo`, `todo_write`, `todo_read`, `tasklist`, `task_manager` etc.)
   136Ôćĺ	// Use `generic` for tools that the provider knows about but that don't map well to a specific type
   137Ôćĺ	// Use `unknown` for tools that the provider does not know about
   138Ôćĺ	Type string `json:"type"` // Type of the tool: write, read, search, shell, task, generic, unknown
   139Ôćĺ
   140Ôćĺ	UseID             string                 `json:"useId,omitempty"`             // ID of the tool use
   141Ôćĺ	Input             map[string]interface{} `json:"input,omitempty"`             // Input to the tool
   142Ôćĺ	Output            map[string]interface{} `json:"output,omitempty"`            // Output from the tool
   143Ôćĺ	Summary           *string                `json:"summary,omitempty"`           // Summary content (will be wrapped in <summary> tags by CLI)
   144Ôćĺ	FormattedMarkdown *string                `json:"formattedMarkdown,omitempty"` // Pre-formatted markdown from provider (will be wrapped in <formatted-markdown> tags by CLI)
   145Ôćĺ}
   146Ôćĺ
   147Ôćĺ// Validate checks the SessionData against schema constraints and logs warnings for any issues.
   148Ôćĺ// Returns true if validation passed, false if there were any issues.
   149Ôćĺfunc (s *SessionData) Validate() bool {
   150Ôćĺ	valid := true
   151Ôćĺ
   152Ôćĺ	// Check schema version
   153Ôćĺ	if s.SchemaVersion != "1.0" {
   154Ôćĺ		slog.Warn("schema validation: schemaVersion must be '1.0'", "got", s.SchemaVersion)
   155Ôćĺ		valid = false
   156Ôćĺ	}
   157Ôćĺ
   158Ôćĺ	// Check required root fields
   159Ôćĺ	if s.Provider.ID == "" {
   160Ôćĺ		slog.Warn("schema validation: provider.id is required")
   161Ôćĺ		valid = false
   162Ôćĺ	}
   163Ôćĺ	if s.Provider.Name == "" {
   164Ôćĺ		slog.Warn("schema validation: provider.name is required")
   165Ôćĺ		valid = false
   166Ôćĺ	}
   167Ôćĺ	if s.Provider.Version == "" {
   168Ôćĺ		slog.Warn("schema validation: provider.version is required")
   169Ôćĺ		valid = false
   170Ôćĺ	}
   171Ôćĺ	if s.SessionID == "" {
   172Ôćĺ		slog.Warn("schema validation: sessionId is required")
   173Ôćĺ		valid = false
   174Ôćĺ	}
   175Ôćĺ	if s.CreatedAt == "" {
   176Ôćĺ		slog.Warn("schema validation: createdAt is required")
   177Ôćĺ		valid = false
   178Ôćĺ	}
   179Ôćĺ	if s.WorkspaceRoot == "" {
   180Ôćĺ		slog.Warn("schema validation: workspaceRoot is required")
   181Ôćĺ		valid = false
   182Ôćĺ	}
   183Ôćĺ
   184Ôćĺ	// Validate each exchange
   185Ôćĺ	for i, exchange := range s.Exchanges {
   186Ôćĺ		if exchange.ExchangeID == "" {
   187Ôćĺ			slog.Warn("schema validation: exchange.exchangeId is required", "exchangeIndex", i)
   188Ôćĺ			valid = false
   189Ôćĺ		}
   190Ôćĺ
   191Ôćĺ		// Validate each message in the exchange
   192Ôćĺ		for j, msg := range exchange.Messages {
   193Ôćĺ			if !msg.validate(i, j) {
   194Ôćĺ				valid = false
   195Ôćĺ			}
   196Ôćĺ		}
   197Ôćĺ	}
   198Ôćĺ
   199Ôćĺ	return valid
   200Ôćĺ}
   201Ôćĺ
   202Ôćĺ// validate checks a single message against schema constraints.
   203Ôćĺfunc (m *Message) validate(exchangeIndex, messageIndex int) bool {
   204Ôćĺ	valid := true
   205Ôćĺ	logCtx := []any{"exchangeIndex", exchangeIndex, "messageIndex", messageIndex}
   206Ôćĺ
   207Ôćĺ	// Check role is valid
   208Ôćĺ	if m.Role != RoleUser && m.Role != RoleAgent {
   209Ôćĺ		slog.Warn("schema validation: message.role must be 'user' or 'agent'",
   210Ôćĺ			append(logCtx, "got", m.Role)...)
   211Ôćĺ		valid = false
   212Ôćĺ	}
   213Ôćĺ
   214Ôćĺ	// User message constraints
   215Ôćĺ	if m.Role == RoleUser {
   216Ôćĺ		if len(m.Content) == 0 {
   217Ôćĺ			slog.Warn("schema validation: user message must have non-empty content", logCtx...)
   218Ôćĺ			valid = false
   219Ôćĺ		}
   220Ôćĺ		if m.Tool != nil {
   221Ôćĺ			slog.Warn("schema validation: user message cannot have tool", logCtx...)
   222Ôćĺ			valid = false
   223Ôćĺ		}
   224Ôćĺ		if m.Model != "" {
   225Ôćĺ			slog.Warn("schema validation: user message cannot have model", logCtx...)
   226Ôćĺ			valid = false
   227Ôćĺ		}
   228Ôćĺ	}
   229Ôćĺ
   230Ôćĺ	// Agent message constraints: must have at least one of content, tool, or pathHints
   231Ôćĺ	if m.Role == RoleAgent {
   232Ôćĺ		hasContent := len(m.Content) > 0
   233Ôćĺ		hasTool := m.Tool != nil
   234Ôćĺ		hasPathHints := len(m.PathHints) > 0
   235Ôćĺ		if !hasContent && !hasTool && !hasPathHints {
   236Ôćĺ			slog.Warn("schema validation: agent message must have content, tool, or pathHints", logCtx...)
   237Ôćĺ			valid = false
   238Ôćĺ		}
   239Ôćĺ	}
   240Ôćĺ
   241Ôćĺ	// Validate content parts
   242Ôćĺ	for k, part := range m.Content {
   243Ôćĺ		if !part.validate(exchangeIndex, messageIndex, k) {
   244Ôćĺ			valid = false
   245Ôćĺ		}
   246Ôćĺ	}
   247Ôćĺ
   248Ôćĺ	// Validate tool if present
   249Ôćĺ	if m.Tool != nil {
   250Ôćĺ		if !m.Tool.validate(exchangeIndex, messageIndex) {
   251Ôćĺ			valid = false
   252Ôćĺ		}
   253Ôćĺ	}
   254Ôćĺ
   255Ôćĺ	return valid
   256Ôćĺ}
   257Ôćĺ
   258Ôćĺ// validate checks a single content part against schema constraints.
   259Ôćĺfunc (c *ContentPart) validate(exchangeIndex, messageIndex, partIndex int) bool {
   260Ôćĺ	valid := true
   261Ôćĺ	logCtx := []any{"exchangeIndex", exchangeIndex, "messageIndex", messageIndex, "partIndex", partIndex}
   262Ôćĺ
   263Ôćĺ	if c.Type != ContentTypeText && c.Type != ContentTypeThinking {
   264Ôćĺ		slog.Warn("schema validation: contentPart.type must be 'text' or 'thinking'",
   265Ôćĺ			append(logCtx, "got", c.Type)...)
   266Ôćĺ		valid = false
   267Ôćĺ	}
   268Ôćĺ
   269Ôćĺ	return valid
   270Ôćĺ}
   271Ôćĺ
   272Ôćĺ// validate checks tool info against schema constraints.
   273Ôćĺfunc (t *ToolInfo) validate(exchangeIndex, messageIndex int) bool {
   274Ôćĺ	valid := true
   275Ôćĺ	logCtx := []any{"exchangeIndex", exchangeIndex, "messageIndex", messageIndex}
   276Ôćĺ
   277Ôćĺ	if t.Name == "" {
   278Ôćĺ		slog.Warn("schema validation: tool.name is required", logCtx...)
   279Ôćĺ		valid = false
   280Ôćĺ	}
   281Ôćĺ
   282Ôćĺ	validTypes := map[string]bool{
   283Ôćĺ		ToolTypeWrite:   true,
   284Ôćĺ		ToolTypeRead:    true,
   285Ôćĺ		ToolTypeSearch:  true,
   286Ôćĺ		ToolTypeShell:   true,
   287Ôćĺ		ToolTypeTask:    true,
   288Ôćĺ		ToolTypeGeneric: true,
   289Ôćĺ		ToolTypeUnknown: true,
   290Ôćĺ	}
   291Ôćĺ	if !validTypes[t.Type] {
   292Ôćĺ		slog.Warn("schema validation: tool.type must be one of: write, read, search, shell, task, generic, unknown",
   293Ôćĺ			append(logCtx, "got", t.Type)...)
   294Ôćĺ		valid = false
   295Ôćĺ	}
   296Ôćĺ
   297Ôćĺ	return valid
   298Ôćĺ}

     9Ôćĺ	"github.com/specstoryai/getspecstory/specstory-cli/pkg/spi"
    10Ôćĺ	"github.com/specstoryai/getspecstory/specstory-cli/pkg/spi/schema"
    11Ôćĺ)
    12Ôćĺ
    13Ôćĺ// Type aliases for convenience - use the shared schema types
    14Ôćĺtype (
    15Ôćĺ	SessionData  = schema.SessionData
    16Ôćĺ	ProviderInfo = schema.ProviderInfo
    17Ôćĺ	Exchange     = schema.Exchange
    18Ôćĺ	Message      = schema.Message
    19Ôćĺ	ContentPart  = schema.ContentPart
    20Ôćĺ	ToolInfo     = schema.ToolInfo
    21Ôćĺ	Usage        = schema.Usage

    24Ôćĺ// GenerateAgentSession creates a SessionData from a Claude Code Session
    25Ôćĺ// The session should already be parsed from JSONL with records in chronological order
    26Ôćĺfunc GenerateAgentSession(session Session, workspaceRoot string) (*SessionData, error) {
    27Ôćĺ	slog.Info("GenerateAgentSession: Starting", "sessionID", session.SessionUuid, "recordCount", len(session.Records))
    28Ôćĺ
    29Ôćĺ	if len(session.Records) == 0 {
    30Ôćĺ		return nil, fmt.Errorf("session has no records")
    31Ôćĺ	}
    32Ôćĺ
    33Ôćĺ	// Extract metadata from records
    34Ôćĺ	createdAt := extractCreatedAtFromRecords(session.Records)
    35Ôćĺ	if workspaceRoot == "" {
    36Ôćĺ		workspaceRoot = extractWorkspaceRootFromRecords(session.Records)
    37Ôćĺ	}
    38Ôćĺ
    39Ôćĺ	// Group records into exchanges
    40Ôćĺ	exchanges, err := buildExchangesFromRecords(session.Records, workspaceRoot)
    41Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
    42Ôćĺ		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to build exchanges: %w", err)
    43Ôćĺ	}
    44Ôćĺ
    45Ôćĺ	// Assign exchangeId to each exchange (format: sessionId:index)
    46Ôćĺ	for i := range exchanges {
    47Ôćĺ		exchanges[i].ExchangeID = fmt.Sprintf("%s:%d", session.SessionUuid, i)
    48Ôćĺ	}
    49Ôćĺ
    50Ôćĺ	slog.Info("GenerateAgentSession: Built exchanges", "count", len(exchanges))
    51Ôćĺ
    52Ôćĺ	// Populate FormattedMarkdown for all tools
    53Ôćĺ	for i := range exchanges {
    54Ôćĺ		for j := range exchanges[i].Messages {
    55Ôćĺ			msg := &exchanges[i].Messages[j]
    56Ôćĺ			if msg.Tool != nil {
    57Ôćĺ				formattedMd := formatToolAsMarkdown(msg.Tool, workspaceRoot)
    58Ôćĺ				msg.Tool.FormattedMarkdown = &formattedMd
    59Ôćĺ			}
    60Ôćĺ		}
    61Ôćĺ	}
    62Ôćĺ
    63Ôćĺ	sessionData := &SessionData{
    64Ôćĺ		SchemaVersion: "1.0",
    65Ôćĺ		Provider: ProviderInfo{
    66Ôćĺ			ID:      "claude-code",
    67Ôćĺ			Name:    "Claude Code",
    68Ôćĺ			Version: "unknown",
    69Ôćĺ		},
    70Ôćĺ		SessionID:     session.SessionUuid,
    71Ôćĺ		CreatedAt:     createdAt,
    72Ôćĺ		WorkspaceRoot: workspaceRoot,
    73Ôćĺ		Exchanges:     exchanges,
    74Ôćĺ	}
    75Ôćĺ
    76Ôćĺ	return sessionData, nil
    77Ôćĺ}
    78Ôćĺ
    79Ôćĺ// extractCreatedAtFromRecords extracts the earliest timestamp from JSONL records
    80Ôćĺfunc extractCreatedAtFromRecords(records []JSONLRecord) string {
    81Ôćĺ	if len(records) == 0 {
    82Ôćĺ		return time.Now().Format(time.RFC3339)
    83Ôćĺ	}
    84Ôćĺ
    85Ôćĺ	// Get timestamp from first record
    86Ôćĺ	if timestamp, ok := records[0].Data["timestamp"].(string); ok && timestamp != "" {
    87Ôćĺ		return timestamp
    88Ôćĺ	}
    89Ôćĺ
    90Ôćĺ	return time.Now().Format(time.RFC3339)
    91Ôćĺ}
    92Ôćĺ
    93Ôćĺ// extractWorkspaceRootFromRecords extracts the workspace root from JSONL records
    94Ôćĺfunc extractWorkspaceRootFromRecords(records []JSONLRecord) string {
    95Ôćĺ	for _, record := range records {
    96Ôćĺ		if cwd, ok := record.Data["cwd"].(string); ok && cwd != "" {
    97Ôćĺ			return cwd
    98Ôćĺ		}
    99Ôćĺ	}
   100Ôćĺ	return ""
   101Ôćĺ}
   102Ôćĺ
   103Ôćĺ// buildExchangesFromRecords groups JSONL records into exchanges
   104Ôćĺ// An exchange is a user prompt followed by agent responses and tool results
   105Ôćĺ// Records are assumed to be in chronological order from JSONL parsing
   106Ôćĺfunc buildExchangesFromRecords(records []JSONLRecord, workspaceRoot string) ([]Exchange, error) {
   107Ôćĺ	var exchanges []Exchange
   108Ôćĺ	var currentExchange *Exchange
   109Ôćĺ	var exchangeStartTime string
   110Ôćĺ
   111Ôćĺ	for _, record := range records {
   112Ôćĺ		recordType, _ := record.Data["type"].(string)
   113Ôćĺ		timestamp, _ := record.Data["timestamp"].(string)
   114Ôćĺ
   115Ôćĺ		// Check if this is a sidechain message (subagent conversation)
   116Ôćĺ		// Note: warmup messages are filtered earlier by filterWarmupMessages
   117Ôćĺ		isSidechain, _ := record.Data["isSidechain"].(bool)
   118Ôćĺ
   119Ôćĺ		switch recordType {
   120Ôćĺ		case "user":
   121Ôćĺ			// Check if this is a tool result or a new user message
   122Ôćĺ			message, _ := record.Data["message"].(map[string]interface{})
   123Ôćĺ			messageContent, _ := message["content"].([]interface{})
   124Ôćĺ
   125Ôćĺ			isToolResult := false
   126Ôćĺ			if len(messageContent) > 0 {
   127Ôćĺ				if firstContent, ok := messageContent[0].(map[string]interface{}); ok {
   128Ôćĺ					if contentType, ok := firstContent["type"].(string); ok && contentType == "tool_result" {
   129Ôćĺ						isToolResult = true
   130Ôćĺ					}
   131Ôćĺ				}
   132Ôćĺ			}
   133Ôćĺ
   134Ôćĺ			if isToolResult {
   135Ôćĺ				// This is a tool result - merge it into the previous tool use
   136Ôćĺ				if currentExchange != nil {
   137Ôćĺ					mergeToolResultIntoExchange(currentExchange, messageContent, timestamp)
   138Ôćĺ					currentExchange.EndTime = timestamp
   139Ôćĺ				}
   140Ôćĺ			} else {
   141Ôćĺ				// This is a new user prompt
   142Ôćĺ
   143Ôćĺ				// Sidechain messages append to current exchange (parent agent talking to subagent)
   144Ôćĺ				// rather than starting a new exchange like regular user prompts do
   145Ôćĺ				if isSidechain {
   146Ôćĺ					if currentExchange == nil {
   147Ôćĺ						slog.Warn("Sidechain user message with no current exchange", "uuid", record.Data["uuid"])
   148Ôćĺ						continue
   149Ôćĺ					}
   150Ôćĺ					msg := buildUserMessage(record, isSidechain)
   151Ôćĺ					currentExchange.Messages = append(currentExchange.Messages, msg)
   152Ôćĺ					currentExchange.EndTime = timestamp
   153Ôćĺ					continue
   154Ôćĺ				}
   155Ôćĺ
   156Ôćĺ				// Non-sidechain: start a new exchange
   157Ôćĺ				if currentExchange != nil {
   158Ôćĺ					exchanges = append(exchanges, *currentExchange)
   159Ôćĺ				}
   160Ôćĺ
   161Ôćĺ				currentExchange = &Exchange{
   162Ôćĺ					StartTime: timestamp,
   163Ôćĺ					Messages:  []Message{buildUserMessage(record, isSidechain)},
   164Ôćĺ				}
   165Ôćĺ			}
   166Ôćĺ
   167Ôćĺ		case "assistant":
   168Ôćĺ			// Agent message - add to current exchange
   169Ôćĺ			if currentExchange == nil {
   170Ôćĺ				// Create exchange if we don't have one (shouldn't happen normally)
   171Ôćĺ				exchangeStartTime = timestamp
   172Ôćĺ				currentExchange = &Exchange{
   173Ôćĺ					StartTime: exchangeStartTime,
   174Ôćĺ					Messages:  []Message{},
   175Ôćĺ				}
   176Ôćĺ			}
   177Ôćĺ
   178Ôćĺ			msg := buildAgentMessage(record, workspaceRoot, isSidechain)
   179Ôćĺ			currentExchange.Messages = append(currentExchange.Messages, msg)
   180Ôćĺ			currentExchange.EndTime = timestamp
   181Ôćĺ		}
   182Ôćĺ	}
   183Ôćĺ
   184Ôćĺ	// Add the last exchange if exists
   185Ôćĺ	if currentExchange != nil && len(currentExchange.Messages) > 0 {
   186Ôćĺ		exchanges = append(exchanges, *currentExchange)
   187Ôćĺ	}
   188Ôćĺ
   189Ôćĺ	// Records are already in chronological order from JSONL parsing,
   190Ôćĺ	// so exchanges are also in order. No sorting needed.
   191Ôćĺ
   192Ôćĺ	return exchanges, nil
   193Ôćĺ}
   194Ôćĺ
   195Ôćĺ// mergeToolResultIntoExchange finds the tool use in the exchange and adds the result to it.
   196Ôćĺ// The resultTimestamp is the time the tool completed (from the tool_result JSONL record).
   197Ôćĺfunc mergeToolResultIntoExchange(exchange *Exchange, messageContent []interface{}, resultTimestamp string) {
   198Ôćĺ	// Extract tool_result data from message content
   199Ôćĺ	if len(messageContent) == 0 {
   200Ôćĺ		return
   201Ôćĺ	}
   202Ôćĺ
   203Ôćĺ	toolResultMap, ok := messageContent[0].(map[string]interface{})
   204Ôćĺ	if !ok {
   205Ôćĺ		return
   206Ôćĺ	}
   207Ôćĺ
   208Ôćĺ	// Get the tool_use_id that this result corresponds to
   209Ôćĺ	toolUseID, ok := toolResultMap["tool_use_id"].(string)
   210Ôćĺ	if !ok || toolUseID == "" {
   211Ôćĺ		return
   212Ôćĺ	}
   213Ôćĺ
   214Ôćĺ	// Extract result content and error status
   215Ôćĺ	// Content can be either a string or an array of text objects (for Task tool results)
   216Ôćĺ	var content string
   217Ôćĺ	if contentStr, ok := toolResultMap["content"].(string); ok {
   218Ôćĺ		content = contentStr
   219Ôćĺ	} else if contentArray, ok := toolResultMap["content"].([]interface{}); ok {
   220Ôćĺ		// Array of text objects like [{"type":"text","text":"..."}]
   221Ôćĺ		var parts []string
   222Ôćĺ		for _, item := range contentArray {
   223Ôćĺ			if itemMap, ok := item.(map[string]interface{}); ok {
   224Ôćĺ				if text, ok := itemMap["text"].(string); ok {
   225Ôćĺ					parts = append(parts, text)
   226Ôćĺ				}
   227Ôćĺ			}
   228Ôćĺ		}
   229Ôćĺ		content = strings.Join(parts, "\n")
   230Ôćĺ	}
   231Ôćĺ	isError, _ := toolResultMap["is_error"].(bool)
   232Ôćĺ
   233Ôćĺ	// Find the message with matching tool use ID and add the output
   234Ôćĺ	for i := range exchange.Messages {
   235Ôćĺ		msg := &exchange.Messages[i]
   236Ôćĺ		if msg.Tool != nil && msg.Tool.UseID == toolUseID {
   237Ôćĺ			msg.Tool.Output = map[string]interface{}{
   238Ôćĺ				"content":  content,
   239Ôćĺ				"is_error": isError,
   240Ôćĺ			}
   241Ôćĺ			// Update message timestamp to when the tool actually completed,
   242Ôćĺ			// not when the agent requested it (needed for provenance correlation)
   243Ôćĺ			msg.Timestamp = resultTimestamp
   244Ôćĺ			return
   245Ôćĺ		}
   246Ôćĺ	}
   247Ôćĺ}
   248Ôćĺ
   249Ôćĺ// buildUserMessage creates a Message from a user JSONL record
   250Ôćĺfunc buildUserMessage(record JSONLRecord, isSidechain bool) Message {
   251Ôćĺ	uuid, _ := record.Data["uuid"].(string)
   252Ôćĺ	timestamp, _ := record.Data["timestamp"].(string)
   253Ôćĺ
   254Ôćĺ	message, _ := record.Data["message"].(map[string]interface{})
   255Ôćĺ	var contentParts []ContentPart
   256Ôćĺ
   257Ôćĺ	// Handle different content formats
   258Ôćĺ	if content, ok := message["content"].(string); ok {
   259Ôćĺ		// Simple string content
   260Ôćĺ		contentParts = append(contentParts, ContentPart{
   261Ôćĺ			Type: "text",
   262Ôćĺ			Text: content,
   263Ôćĺ		})
   264Ôćĺ	} else if contentArray, ok := message["content"].([]interface{}); ok {
   265Ôćĺ		// Array of content parts
   266Ôćĺ		for _, item := range contentArray {
   267Ôćĺ			if contentMap, ok := item.(map[string]interface{}); ok {
   268Ôćĺ				contentType, _ := contentMap["type"].(string)
   269Ôćĺ
   270Ôćĺ				switch contentType {
   271Ôćĺ				case "text":
   272Ôćĺ					text, _ := contentMap["text"].(string)
   273Ôćĺ					contentParts = append(contentParts, ContentPart{
   274Ôćĺ						Type: "text",
   275Ôćĺ						Text: text,
   276Ôćĺ					})
   277Ôćĺ				case "thinking":
   278Ôćĺ					thinking, _ := contentMap["thinking"].(string)
   279Ôćĺ					contentParts = append(contentParts, ContentPart{
   280Ôćĺ						Type: "thinking",
   281Ôćĺ						Text: thinking,
   282Ôćĺ					})
   283Ôćĺ					// tool_result is now merged into tool use, not handled here
   284Ôćĺ				}
   285Ôćĺ			}
   286Ôćĺ		}
   287Ôćĺ	}
   288Ôćĺ
   289Ôćĺ	msg := Message{
   290Ôćĺ		ID:        uuid,
   291Ôćĺ		Timestamp: timestamp,
   292Ôćĺ		Role:      "user",
   293Ôćĺ		Content:   contentParts,
   294Ôćĺ	}
   295Ôćĺ
   296Ôćĺ	// For sidechain messages, treat as agent (parent agent talking to subagent, not actual user input)
   297Ôćĺ	if isSidechain {
   298Ôćĺ		msg.Role = "agent"
   299Ôćĺ		msg.Metadata = map[string]interface{}{
   300Ôćĺ			"isSidechain": true,
   301Ôćĺ		}
   302Ôćĺ	}
   303Ôćĺ
   304Ôćĺ	return msg
   305Ôćĺ}
   306Ôćĺ
   307Ôćĺ// buildAgentMessage creates a Message from an assistant JSONL record
   308Ôćĺfunc buildAgentMessage(record JSONLRecord, workspaceRoot string, isSidechain bool) Message {
   309Ôćĺ	uuid, _ := record.Data["uuid"].(string)
   310Ôćĺ	timestamp, _ := record.Data["timestamp"].(string)
   311Ôćĺ
   312Ôćĺ	message, _ := record.Data["message"].(map[string]interface{})
   313Ôćĺ	model, _ := message["model"].(string)
   314Ôćĺ
   315Ôćĺ	var contentParts []ContentPart
   316Ôćĺ	var toolInfo *ToolInfo
   317Ôćĺ	var pathHints []string
   318Ôćĺ
   319Ôćĺ	// Parse message content
   320Ôćĺ	if contentArray, ok := message["content"].([]interface{}); ok {
   321Ôćĺ		for _, item := range contentArray {
   322Ôćĺ			if contentMap, ok := item.(map[string]interface{}); ok {
   323Ôćĺ				contentType, _ := contentMap["type"].(string)
   324Ôćĺ
   325Ôćĺ				switch contentType {
   326Ôćĺ				case "text":
   327Ôćĺ					text, _ := contentMap["text"].(string)
   328Ôćĺ					if text != "" {
   329Ôćĺ						contentParts = append(contentParts, ContentPart{
   330Ôćĺ							Type: "text",
   331Ôćĺ							Text: text,
   332Ôćĺ						})
   333Ôćĺ					}
   334Ôćĺ
   335Ôćĺ				case "thinking":
   336Ôćĺ					// Preserve thinking content with its type
   337Ôćĺ					thinking, _ := contentMap["thinking"].(string)
   338Ôćĺ					if thinking != "" {
   339Ôćĺ						contentParts = append(contentParts, ContentPart{
   340Ôćĺ							Type: "thinking",
   341Ôćĺ							Text: thinking,
   342Ôćĺ						})
   343Ôćĺ					}
   344Ôćĺ
   345Ôćĺ				case "tool_use":
   346Ôćĺ					// Extract tool information
   347Ôćĺ					toolName, _ := contentMap["name"].(string)
   348Ôćĺ					toolUseID, _ := contentMap["id"].(string)
   349Ôćĺ					toolInput, _ := contentMap["input"].(map[string]interface{})
   350Ôćĺ
   351Ôćĺ					toolInfo = &ToolInfo{
   352Ôćĺ						Name:  toolName,
   353Ôćĺ						Type:  classifyToolType(toolName),
   354Ôćĺ						UseID: toolUseID,
   355Ôćĺ						Input: toolInput,
   356Ôćĺ					}
   357Ôćĺ
   358Ôćĺ					// Extract path hints using the record's cwd, which tracks the
   359Ôćĺ					// shell's actual working directory (changes after cd commands)
   360Ôćĺ					recordCwd, _ := record.Data["cwd"].(string)
   361Ôćĺ					if recordCwd == "" {
   362Ôćĺ						recordCwd = workspaceRoot
   363Ôćĺ					}
   364Ôćĺ					pathHints = extractPathHints(toolInput, recordCwd, workspaceRoot)
   365Ôćĺ				}
   366Ôćĺ			}
   367Ôćĺ		}
   368Ôćĺ	}
   369Ôćĺ
   370Ôćĺ	// Also check for tool use result in the record
   371Ôćĺ	if toolUseResult, ok := record.Data["toolUseResult"].(map[string]interface{}); ok {
   372Ôćĺ		if toolInfo != nil {
   373Ôćĺ			// Add output to existing tool info
   374Ôćĺ			toolInfo.Output = map[string]interface{}{
   375Ôćĺ				"type":     toolUseResult["type"],
   376Ôćĺ				"filePath": toolUseResult["filePath"],
   377Ôćĺ			}
   378Ôćĺ		}
   379Ôćĺ	}
   380Ôćĺ
   381Ôćĺ	// Extract usage data if present
   382Ôćĺ	var usageInfo *Usage
   383Ôćĺ	if usage, ok := message["usage"].(map[string]interface{}); ok {
   384Ôćĺ		usageInfo = &Usage{
   385Ôćĺ			InputTokens:              schema.GetIntFromMap(usage, "input_tokens"),
   386Ôćĺ			OutputTokens:             schema.GetIntFromMap(usage, "output_tokens"),
   387Ôćĺ			CacheCreationInputTokens: schema.GetIntFromMap(usage, "cache_creation_input_tokens"),
   388Ôćĺ			CacheReadInputTokens:     schema.GetIntFromMap(usage, "cache_read_input_tokens"),
   389Ôćĺ		}
   390Ôćĺ	}
   391Ôćĺ
   392Ôćĺ	msg := Message{
   393Ôćĺ		ID:        uuid,
   394Ôćĺ		Timestamp: timestamp,
   395Ôćĺ		Role:      "agent",
   396Ôćĺ		Model:     model,
   397Ôćĺ		Content:   contentParts,
   398Ôćĺ		Tool:      toolInfo,
   399Ôćĺ		PathHints: pathHints,
   400Ôćĺ		Usage:     usageInfo,
   401Ôćĺ	}
   402Ôćĺ
   403Ôćĺ	// Add sidechain flag to metadata if true
   404Ôćĺ	if isSidechain {
   405Ôćĺ		msg.Metadata = map[string]interface{}{
   406Ôćĺ			"isSidechain": true,
   407Ôćĺ		}
   408Ôćĺ	}
   409Ôćĺ
   410Ôćĺ	return msg
   411Ôćĺ}
   412Ôćĺ
   413Ôćĺ// classifyToolType maps tool names to standard tool types
   414Ôćĺfunc classifyToolType(toolName string) string {
   415Ôćĺ	toolName = strings.ToLower(toolName)
   416Ôćĺ
   417Ôćĺ	switch toolName {
   418Ôćĺ	// "str_replace_editor", "write_file", "edit_file", "create_file", "append_to_file" are legacy tools, no longer in the agent
   419Ôćĺ	case "write", "edit", "multiedit", "str_replace_editor", "write_file", "edit_file", "create_file", "append_to_file":
   420Ôćĺ		return "write"
   421Ôćĺ	case "read", "webfetch", "read_file", "view_file", "cat": // "read_file", "view_file", "cat" are legacy tools, no longer in the agent
   422Ôćĺ		return "read"
   423Ôćĺ	case "grep", "glob", "websearch":
   424Ôćĺ		return "search"
   425Ôćĺ	case "bash", "taskoutput", "killshell":
   426Ôćĺ		return "shell"
   427Ôćĺ	case "notebookedit", "todowrite":
   428Ôćĺ		return "task"
   429Ôćĺ	case "enterplanmode", "exitplanmode", "askuserquestion", "skill", "lsp", "task":
   430Ôćĺ		return "generic"
   431Ôćĺ	default:
   432Ôćĺ		return "unknown"
   433Ôćĺ	}
   434Ôćĺ}
   435Ôćĺ
   436Ôćĺ// extractPathHints extracts file paths from tool input.
   437Ôćĺ// cwd is the shell's working directory at the time of the tool call (from the
   438Ôćĺ// JSONL record's top-level cwd field), used to resolve relative paths in shell commands.
   439Ôćĺfunc extractPathHints(input map[string]interface{}, cwd, workspaceRoot string) []string {
   440Ôćĺ	var paths []string
   441Ôćĺ
   442Ôćĺ	// Common path field names
   443Ôćĺ	pathFields := []string{"file_path", "path", "filename", "old_path", "new_path"}
   444Ôćĺ	arrayFields := []string{"paths", "files", "targets"}
   445Ôćĺ
   446Ôćĺ	// Extract single path fields
   447Ôćĺ	for _, field := range pathFields {
   448Ôćĺ		if value, ok := input[field].(string); ok && value != "" {
   449Ôćĺ			normalizedPath := spi.NormalizePath(value, workspaceRoot)
   450Ôćĺ			if !contains(paths, normalizedPath) {
   451Ôćĺ				paths = append(paths, normalizedPath)
   452Ôćĺ			}
   453Ôćĺ		}
   454Ôćĺ	}
   455Ôćĺ
   456Ôćĺ	// Extract array path fields
   457Ôćĺ	for _, field := range arrayFields {
   458Ôćĺ		if arr, ok := input[field].([]interface{}); ok {
   459Ôćĺ			for _, item := range arr {
   460Ôćĺ				if path, ok := item.(string); ok && path != "" {
   461Ôćĺ					normalizedPath := spi.NormalizePath(path, workspaceRoot)
   462Ôćĺ					if !contains(paths, normalizedPath) {
   463Ôćĺ						paths = append(paths, normalizedPath)
   464Ôćĺ					}
   465Ôćĺ				}
   466Ôćĺ			}
   467Ôćĺ		}
   468Ôćĺ	}
   469Ôćĺ
   470Ôćĺ	// Extract paths from shell commands (redirect targets, file-creating commands)
   471Ôćĺ	if command, ok := input["command"].(string); ok && command != "" {
   472Ôćĺ		shellPaths := spi.ExtractShellPathHints(command, cwd, workspaceRoot)
   473Ôćĺ		for _, sp := range shellPaths {
   474Ôćĺ			if !contains(paths, sp) {
   475Ôćĺ				paths = append(paths, sp)
   476Ôćĺ			}
   477Ôćĺ		}
   478Ôćĺ	}
   479Ôćĺ
   480Ôćĺ	return paths
   481Ôćĺ}
   482Ôćĺ
   483Ôćĺ// contains checks if a string slice contains a value
   484Ôćĺfunc contains(slice []string, value string) bool {
   485Ôćĺ	for _, item := range slice {
   486Ôćĺ		if item == value {
   487Ôćĺ			return true
   488Ôćĺ		}
   489Ôćĺ	}
   490Ôćĺ	return false
   491Ôćĺ}
   492Ôćĺ
   493Ôćĺ// formatToolAsMarkdown generates formatted markdown for a tool (input + output)
   494Ôćĺ// Returns the inner content only (no <tool-use> tags)
   495Ôćĺfunc formatToolAsMarkdown(tool *ToolInfo, workspaceRoot string) string {
   496Ôćĺ	var markdown strings.Builder
   497Ôćĺ
   498Ôćĺ	// Add _cwd to input for path normalization in formatters
   499Ôćĺ	if tool.Input == nil {
   500Ôćĺ		tool.Input = make(map[string]interface{})
   501Ôćĺ	}
   502Ôćĺ	tool.Input["_cwd"] = workspaceRoot
   503Ôćĺ
   504Ôćĺ	// Extract description if present
   505Ôćĺ	description := ""
   506Ôćĺ	if desc, ok := tool.Input["description"].(string); ok {
   507Ôćĺ		description = desc
   508Ôćĺ	}
   509Ôćĺ
   510Ôćĺ	// Format tool use based on tool name using existing formatters
   511Ôćĺ	var toolContent string
   512Ôćĺ	if formatter, ok := toolFormatters[tool.Name]; ok {
   513Ôćĺ		// Use tool-specific formatter
   514Ôćĺ		toolContent = formatter(tool.Name, tool.Input, description)
   515Ôćĺ	} else {
   516Ôćĺ		// Use default formatter
   517Ôćĺ		toolContent = formatDefaultTool(tool.Name, tool.Input, description)
   518Ôćĺ	}
   519Ôćĺ
   520Ôćĺ	// Add formatted tool content
   521Ôćĺ	if toolContent != "" {
   522Ôćĺ		markdown.WriteString(toolContent)
   523Ôćĺ		markdown.WriteString("\n")
   524Ôćĺ	}
   525Ôćĺ
   526Ôćĺ	// Add tool result/output if present
   527Ôćĺ	if tool.Output != nil {
   528Ôćĺ		// Check for error first
   529Ôćĺ		if isError, ok := tool.Output["is_error"].(bool); ok && isError {
   530Ôćĺ			// Blank line before code fence helps parsers inside <details> tags
   531Ôćĺ			markdown.WriteString("\n```text\n")
   532Ôćĺ			if content, ok := tool.Output["content"].(string); ok {
   533Ôćĺ				cleaned := stripSystemReminders(content)
   534Ôćĺ				cleaned = stripANSIEscapeSequences(cleaned)
   535Ôćĺ				markdown.WriteString(cleaned)
   536Ôćĺ			}
   537Ôćĺ			markdown.WriteString("\n```\n")
   538Ôćĺ		} else {
   539Ôćĺ			// Regular result
   540Ôćĺ			if content, ok := tool.Output["content"].(string); ok {
   541Ôćĺ				cleaned := stripSystemReminders(content)
   542Ôćĺ				cleaned = stripANSIEscapeSequences(cleaned)
   543Ôćĺ				// Only trim trailing spaces/tabs, preserve all newlines
   544Ôćĺ				cleaned = strings.TrimRight(cleaned, " \t")
   545Ôćĺ
   546Ôćĺ				// Special handling for AskUserQuestion - parse and format the answer nicely
   547Ôćĺ				if tool.Name == "AskUserQuestion" {
   548Ôćĺ					answer := parseAskUserQuestionAnswer(cleaned)
   549Ôćĺ					if answer != "" {
   550Ôćĺ						fmt.Fprintf(&markdown, "\n**Answer:** %s\n", answer)
   551Ôćĺ					} else if cleaned != "" {
   552Ôćĺ						// Fallback to code block if parsing fails
   553Ôćĺ						markdown.WriteString("\n```text\n")
   554Ôćĺ						markdown.WriteString(cleaned)
   555Ôćĺ						markdown.WriteString("\n```\n")
   556Ôćĺ					}
   557Ôćĺ				} else if strings.TrimSpace(cleaned) != TodoWriteSuccessMessage && cleaned != "" {
   558Ôćĺ					// Skip TodoWrite success messages
   559Ôćĺ					// Blank line before code fence helps parsers inside <details> tags
   560Ôćĺ					markdown.WriteString("\n```text\n")
   561Ôćĺ					markdown.WriteString(cleaned)
   562Ôćĺ					markdown.WriteString("\n```\n")
   563Ôćĺ				}
   564Ôćĺ			}
   565Ôćĺ		}
   566Ôćĺ	}
   567Ôćĺ
   568Ôćĺ	return markdown.String()
   569Ôćĺ}
   570Ôćĺ
```

    15Ôćĺ// getSchemaPath returns the absolute path to the agent session schema
    16Ôćĺfunc getSchemaPath() string {
    17Ôćĺ	// Get the directory of this test file
    18Ôćĺ	_, filename, _, _ := runtime.Caller(0)
    19Ôćĺ	testDir := filepath.Dir(filename)
    20Ôćĺ
    21Ôćĺ	// Navigate to the schema file: pkg/providers/claudecode -> pkg/spi/schema
    22Ôćĺ	schemaPath := filepath.Join(testDir, "..", "..", "spi", "schema", "session-data-v1.json")
    23Ôćĺ	return schemaPath
    24Ôćĺ}
    25Ôćĺ
    26Ôćĺ// loadSchemaJSON loads the schema JSON from disk
    27Ôćĺfunc loadSchemaJSON() ([]byte, error) {
    28Ôćĺ	return os.ReadFile(getSchemaPath())
    29Ôćĺ}
    30Ôćĺ
    31Ôćĺ// validateJSONDocument validates the JSON document against the schema using xeipuuv/gojsonschema
    32Ôćĺfunc validateJSONDocument(t *testing.T, jsonData []byte) error {
    33Ôćĺ	// Load the schema
    34Ôćĺ	agentSessionSchemaJSON, err := loadSchemaJSON()
    35Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
    36Ôćĺ		return fmt.Errorf("failed to load schema: %w", err)
    37Ôćĺ	}
    38Ôćĺ
    39Ôćĺ	// Create schema loader from schema
    40Ôćĺ	schemaLoader := gojsonschema.NewBytesLoader(agentSessionSchemaJSON)
    41Ôćĺ
    42Ôćĺ	// Create document loader from generated JSON
    43Ôćĺ	documentLoader := gojsonschema.NewBytesLoader(jsonData)
    44Ôćĺ
    45Ôćĺ	// Validate
    46Ôćĺ	result, err := gojsonschema.Validate(schemaLoader, documentLoader)
    47Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
    48Ôćĺ		return fmt.Errorf("validation error: %w", err)
    49Ôćĺ	}
    50Ôćĺ
    51Ôćĺ	if result.Valid() {
    52Ôćĺ		t.Log("  The document is valid")
    53Ôćĺ		return nil
    54Ôćĺ	}
    55Ôćĺ
    56Ôćĺ	// Document is not valid, report errors
    57Ôćĺ	t.Log("  The document is NOT valid. Errors:")
    58Ôćĺ	for i, desc := range result.Errors() {
    59Ôćĺ		t.Logf("    %d. %s", i+1, desc)
    60Ôćĺ	}
    61Ôćĺ
    62Ôćĺ	return fmt.Errorf("document failed schema validation with %d error(s)", len(result.Errors()))
    63Ôćĺ}

    65Ôćĺ// TestAgentSessionTypes validates that our type definitions are correct
    66Ôćĺfunc TestAgentSessionTypes(t *testing.T) {

    68Ôćĺ	session := &SessionData{

   134Ôćĺfunc TestClassifyToolType(t *testing.T) {
   135Ôćĺ	tests := []struct {
   136Ôćĺ		name     string
   137Ôćĺ		toolName string
   138Ôćĺ		expected string
   139Ôćĺ	}{
   140Ôćĺ		// Write tools
   141Ôćĺ		{"Write tool", "Write", "write"},
   142Ôćĺ		{"Edit tool", "Edit", "write"},
   143Ôćĺ		{"write lowercase", "write", "write"},
   144Ôćĺ
   145Ôćĺ		// Read tools
   146Ôćĺ		{"Read tool", "Read", "read"},
   147Ôćĺ		{"WebFetch tool", "WebFetch", "read"},
   148Ôćĺ
   149Ôćĺ		// Search tools

   151Ôćĺ		{"Glob tool", "Glob", "search"},
   152Ôćĺ		{"WebSearch tool", "WebSearch", "search"},
   153Ôćĺ
   154Ôćĺ		// Shell tools
   155Ôćĺ		{"Bash tool", "Bash", "shell"},
   156Ôćĺ		{"TaskOutput tool", "TaskOutput", "shell"},
   157Ôćĺ		{"KillShell tool", "KillShell", "shell"},
   158Ôćĺ
   159Ôćĺ		// Task tools
   160Ôćĺ		{"NotebookEdit tool", "NotebookEdit", "task"},
   161Ôćĺ		{"TodoWrite tool", "TodoWrite", "task"},
   162Ôćĺ
   163Ôćĺ		// Generic tools

   169Ôćĺ		{"Task tool", "Task", "generic"},

   171Ôćĺ		// Unknown tools

   175Ôćĺ
   176Ôćĺ	for _, tt := range tests {

   181Ôćĺ			}
   182Ôćĺ		})
   183Ôćĺ	}

   186Ôćĺfunc TestExtractPathHints_ShellCommand(t *testing.T) {
   187Ôćĺ	workspaceRoot := "/Users/me/prov-1"
   188Ôćĺ
   189Ôćĺ	tests := []struct {
   190Ôćĺ		name      string
   191Ôćĺ		command   string
   192Ôćĺ		cwd       string // shell's working directory from the JSONL record
   193Ôćĺ		wantPaths []string
   194Ôćĺ	}{
   195Ôćĺ		{
   196Ôćĺ			name:      "absolute path via redirection",
   197Ôćĺ			command:   `echo "The moon spills silver on the sleeping sea." > /Users/me/prov-1/poem2.txt`,
   198Ôćĺ			cwd:       workspaceRoot,
   199Ôćĺ			wantPaths: []string{"poem2.txt"},
   200Ôćĺ		},
   201Ôćĺ		{
   202Ôćĺ			name:      "relative path via redirection",
   203Ôćĺ			command:   `echo "The moon spills silver on the sleeping sea." > ./prov-1/poem2.txt`,
   204Ôćĺ			cwd:       workspaceRoot,
   205Ôćĺ			wantPaths: []string{"prov-1/poem2.txt"},
   206Ôćĺ		},
   207Ôćĺ		{
   208Ôćĺ			name:      "bare filename via redirection",
   209Ôćĺ			command:   `echo "The moon spills silver on the sleeping sea." > poem2.txt`,
   210Ôćĺ			cwd:       workspaceRoot,
   211Ôćĺ			wantPaths: []string{"poem2.txt"},
   212Ôćĺ		},
   213Ôćĺ		{
   214Ôćĺ			name:      "bare filename after cd resolves against record cwd",
   215Ôćĺ			command:   `echo "hello" > 1.txt`,
   216Ôćĺ			cwd:       "/Users/me/prov-1/foo/bar",
   217Ôćĺ			wantPaths: []string{"foo/bar/1.txt"},
   218Ôćĺ		},
   219Ôćĺ	}
   220Ôćĺ
   221Ôćĺ	for _, tt := range tests {
   222Ôćĺ		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
   223Ôćĺ			input := map[string]interface{}{
   224Ôćĺ				"command": tt.command,
   225Ôćĺ			}
   226Ôćĺ			paths := extractPathHints(input, tt.cwd, workspaceRoot)
   227Ôćĺ			if len(paths) != len(tt.wantPaths) {
   228Ôćĺ				t.Fatalf("got %d paths %v, want %d paths %v", len(paths), paths, len(tt.wantPaths), tt.wantPaths)
   229Ôćĺ			}
   230Ôćĺ			for i, want := range tt.wantPaths {
   231Ôćĺ				if paths[i] != want {
   232Ôćĺ					t.Errorf("paths[%d] = %q, want %q", i, paths[i], want)
   233Ôćĺ				}
   234Ôćĺ			}
   235Ôćĺ		})
   236Ôćĺ	}
   237Ôćĺ}

   239Ôćĺfunc TestFormatToolAsMarkdown_AskUserQuestion(t *testing.T) {
   240Ôćĺ	tests := []struct {
   241Ôćĺ		name        string
   242Ôćĺ		tool        *ToolInfo
   243Ôćĺ		contains    []string
   244Ôćĺ		notContains []string
   245Ôćĺ	}{
   246Ôćĺ		{
   247Ôćĺ			name: "Parseable answer formats nicely",
   248Ôćĺ			tool: &ToolInfo{
   249Ôćĺ				Name:  "AskUserQuestion",
   250Ôćĺ				Input: map[string]interface{}{},
   251Ôćĺ				Output: map[string]interface{}{
   252Ôćĺ					"content": `User has answered your questions: "What color?"="Blue". You can now continue with the user's answers in mind.`,
   253Ôćĺ				},
   254Ôćĺ			},
   255Ôćĺ			contains:    []string{"**Answer:** Blue"},
   256Ôćĺ			notContains: []string{"```"},
   257Ôćĺ		},
   258Ôćĺ		{
   259Ôćĺ			name: "Unparseable content falls back to code block",
   260Ôćĺ			tool: &ToolInfo{
   261Ôćĺ				Name:  "AskUserQuestion",
   262Ôćĺ				Input: map[string]interface{}{},
   263Ôćĺ				Output: map[string]interface{}{
   264Ôćĺ					"content": "Some unexpected format that cannot be parsed",
   265Ôćĺ				},
   266Ôćĺ			},
   267Ôćĺ			contains:    []string{"```", "Some unexpected format that cannot be parsed"},
   268Ôćĺ			notContains: []string{"**Answer:**"},
   269Ôćĺ		},
   270Ôćĺ		{
   271Ôćĺ			name: "Empty content produces no output",
   272Ôćĺ			tool: &ToolInfo{
   273Ôćĺ				Name:  "AskUserQuestion",
   274Ôćĺ				Input: map[string]interface{}{},
   275Ôćĺ				Output: map[string]interface{}{
   276Ôćĺ					"content": "",
   277Ôćĺ				},
   278Ôćĺ			},
   279Ôćĺ			contains:    []string{},
   280Ôćĺ			notContains: []string{"**Answer:**", "```"},
   281Ôćĺ		},
   282Ôćĺ		{
   283Ôćĺ			name: "Whitespace-only content produces no output",
   284Ôćĺ			tool: &ToolInfo{
   285Ôćĺ				Name:  "AskUserQuestion",
   286Ôćĺ				Input: map[string]interface{}{},
   287Ôćĺ				Output: map[string]interface{}{
   288Ôćĺ					"content": "   \t  ",
   289Ôćĺ				},
   290Ôćĺ			},
   291Ôćĺ			contains:    []string{},
   292Ôćĺ			notContains: []string{"**Answer:**", "```"},
   293Ôćĺ		},
   294Ôćĺ	}
   295Ôćĺ
   296Ôćĺ	for _, tt := range tests {
   297Ôćĺ		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
   298Ôćĺ			result := formatToolAsMarkdown(tt.tool, "/workspace")
   299Ôćĺ			for _, substr := range tt.contains {
   300Ôćĺ				if !strings.Contains(result, substr) {
   301Ôćĺ					t.Errorf("formatToolAsMarkdown() result doesn't contain %q\nGot: %q", substr, result)
   302Ôćĺ				}
   303Ôćĺ			}
   304Ôćĺ			for _, substr := range tt.notContains {
   305Ôćĺ				if strings.Contains(result, substr) {
   306Ôćĺ					t.Errorf("formatToolAsMarkdown() result should not contain %q\nGot: %q", substr, result)
   307Ôćĺ				}
   308Ôćĺ			}
   309Ôćĺ		})
   310Ôćĺ	}
   311Ôćĺ}

   331Ôćĺ						},

   335Ôćĺ							"cache_creation_input_tokens": float64(5562),

   339Ôćĺ				},

   349Ôćĺ		{

   356Ôćĺ					"message": map[string]interface{}{

   358Ôćĺ						"content": []interface{}{

   367Ôćĺ
   368Ôćĺ	for _, tt := range tests {

   371Ôćĺ
   372Ôćĺ			if !tt.expectUsage {

   375Ôćĺ				}
   376Ôćĺ				return
   377Ôćĺ			}
   378Ôćĺ
   379Ôćĺ			if msg.Usage == nil {

   382Ôćĺ			if *msg.Usage != *tt.expectedUsage {

   106Ôćĺ	}
   107Ôćĺ

   111Ôćĺ	}

   128Ôćĺ

   132Ôćĺ		SchemaVersion: "1.0",
   133Ôćĺ		Provider: ProviderInfo{
   134Ôćĺ			ID:      "codex-cli",
   135Ôćĺ			Name:    "Codex CLI",
   136Ôćĺ			Version: "unknown", // Codex doesn't currently include version in JSONL
   137Ôćĺ		},
   138Ôćĺ		SessionID:     sessionID,
   139Ôćĺ		CreatedAt:     createdAt,
   140Ôćĺ		WorkspaceRoot: workspaceRoot,
   141Ôćĺ		Exchanges:     exchanges,
   142Ôćĺ	}
   143Ôćĺ
   144Ôćĺ	return sessionData, nil
   145Ôćĺ}
   146Ôćĺ
   147Ôćĺ// extractSessionMetadata parses the session_meta record (first line)
   148Ôćĺfunc extractSessionMetadata(records []map[string]interface{}) (sessionID, createdAt, cwd string, err error) {
   149Ôćĺ	if len(records) == 0 {
   150Ôćĺ		return "", "", "", fmt.Errorf("no records to extract metadata from")
   151Ôćĺ	}
   152Ôćĺ
   153Ôćĺ	firstRecord := records[0]
   154Ôćĺ	recordType, ok := firstRecord["type"].(string)
   155Ôćĺ	if !ok || recordType != "session_meta" {
   156Ôćĺ		return "", "", "", fmt.Errorf("first record is not session_meta: %v", recordType)
   157Ôćĺ	}
   158Ôćĺ
   159Ôćĺ	payload, ok := firstRecord["payload"].(map[string]interface{})
   160Ôćĺ	if !ok {
   161Ôćĺ		return "", "", "", fmt.Errorf("session_meta payload is missing or invalid")
   162Ôćĺ	}
   163Ôćĺ
   164Ôćĺ	sessionID, _ = payload["id"].(string)
   165Ôćĺ	createdAt, _ = payload["timestamp"].(string)
   166Ôćĺ	cwd, _ = payload["cwd"].(string)
   167Ôćĺ
   168Ôćĺ	if sessionID == "" {
   169Ôćĺ		return "", "", "", fmt.Errorf("session_meta is missing session ID")
   170Ôćĺ	}
   171Ôćĺ
   172Ôćĺ	if createdAt == "" {
   173Ôćĺ		// Fall back to record timestamp
   174Ôćĺ		createdAt, _ = firstRecord["timestamp"].(string)
   175Ôćĺ	}
   176Ôćĺ
   177Ôćĺ	return sessionID, createdAt, cwd, nil
   178Ôćĺ}
   179Ôćĺ
   180Ôćĺ// buildExchangesFromRecords groups JSONL records into exchanges
   181Ôćĺ// An exchange starts with a user message and contains all subsequent agent responses and tool uses
   182Ôćĺfunc buildExchangesFromRecords(records []map[string]interface{}, workspaceRoot string) ([]Exchange, error) {
   183Ôćĺ	var exchanges []Exchange
   184Ôćĺ	var currentExchange *Exchange
   185Ôćĺ	var currentModel string
   186Ôćĺ	pendingTools := make(map[string]*PendingToolCall) // callID -> pending tool call
   187Ôćĺ
   188Ôćĺ	for i, record := range records {
   189Ôćĺ		recordType, _ := record["type"].(string)
   190Ôćĺ		timestamp, _ := record["timestamp"].(string)
   191Ôćĺ
   192Ôćĺ		switch recordType {
   193Ôćĺ		case "session_meta":
   194Ôćĺ			// Skip session metadata - already processed
   195Ôćĺ			continue
   196Ôćĺ
   197Ôćĺ		case "turn_context":
   198Ôćĺ			// Update current model for subsequent agent messages
   199Ôćĺ			payload, ok := record["payload"].(map[string]interface{})
   200Ôćĺ			if ok {
   201Ôćĺ				if model, ok := payload["model"].(string); ok {
   202Ôćĺ					currentModel = model
   203Ôćĺ					slog.Debug("Updated current model", "model", currentModel)
   204Ôćĺ				}
   205Ôćĺ			}
   206Ôćĺ			continue
   207Ôćĺ
   208Ôćĺ		case "event_msg":
   209Ôćĺ			// Handle user messages, agent messages, and agent reasoning
   210Ôćĺ			payload, ok := record["payload"].(map[string]interface{})
   211Ôćĺ			if !ok {
   212Ôćĺ				continue
   213Ôćĺ			}
   214Ôćĺ
   215Ôćĺ			payloadType, _ := payload["type"].(string)
   216Ôćĺ
   217Ôćĺ			switch payloadType {
   218Ôćĺ			case "user_message":
   219Ôćĺ				// Start a new exchange
   220Ôćĺ				message, ok := payload["message"].(string)
   221Ôćĺ				if !ok || message == "" {
   222Ôćĺ					continue
   223Ôćĺ				}
   224Ôćĺ
   225Ôćĺ				// Save previous exchange if exists
   226Ôćĺ				if currentExchange != nil && len(currentExchange.Messages) > 0 {
   227Ôćĺ					exchanges = append(exchanges, *currentExchange)
   228Ôćĺ				}
   229Ôćĺ
   230Ôćĺ				// Start new exchange
   231Ôćĺ				currentExchange = &Exchange{
   232Ôćĺ					StartTime: timestamp,
   233Ôćĺ					Messages:  []Message{},
   234Ôćĺ				}
   235Ôćĺ
   236Ôćĺ				// Add user message
   237Ôćĺ				userMsg := Message{
   238Ôćĺ					ID:        fmt.Sprintf("u_%d", i),
   239Ôćĺ					Timestamp: timestamp,
   240Ôćĺ					Role:      "user",
   241Ôćĺ					Content: []ContentPart{
   242Ôćĺ						{Type: "text", Text: message},
   243Ôćĺ					},
   244Ôćĺ				}
   245Ôćĺ				currentExchange.Messages = append(currentExchange.Messages, userMsg)
   246Ôćĺ
   247Ôćĺ			case "agent_message":
   248Ôćĺ				// Agent text response - keep as separate message per user's requirement
   249Ôćĺ				message, ok := payload["message"].(string)
   250Ôćĺ				if !ok || message == "" {
   251Ôćĺ					continue
   252Ôćĺ				}
   253Ôćĺ
   254Ôćĺ				if currentExchange == nil {
   255Ôćĺ					// Create exchange if missing (shouldn't happen)
   256Ôćĺ					currentExchange = &Exchange{
   257Ôćĺ						StartTime: timestamp,
   258Ôćĺ						Messages:  []Message{},
   259Ôćĺ					}
   260Ôćĺ				}
   261Ôćĺ
   262Ôćĺ				agentMsg := Message{
   263Ôćĺ					ID:        fmt.Sprintf("a_%d", i),
   264Ôćĺ					Timestamp: timestamp,
   265Ôćĺ					Role:      "agent",
   266Ôćĺ					Model:     currentModel,
   267Ôćĺ					Content: []ContentPart{
   268Ôćĺ						{Type: "text", Text: message},
   269Ôćĺ					},
   270Ôćĺ				}
   271Ôćĺ				currentExchange.Messages = append(currentExchange.Messages, agentMsg)
   272Ôćĺ				currentExchange.EndTime = timestamp
   273Ôćĺ
   274Ôćĺ			case "agent_reasoning":
   275Ôćĺ				// Agent thinking - keep as separate message with thinking content type
   276Ôćĺ				text, ok := payload["text"].(string)
   277Ôćĺ				if !ok || text == "" {
   278Ôćĺ					continue
   279Ôćĺ				}
   280Ôćĺ
   281Ôćĺ				if currentExchange == nil {
   282Ôćĺ					// Create exchange if missing (shouldn't happen)
   283Ôćĺ					currentExchange = &Exchange{
   284Ôćĺ						StartTime: timestamp,
   285Ôćĺ						Messages:  []Message{},
   286Ôćĺ					}
   287Ôćĺ				}
   288Ôćĺ
   289Ôćĺ				reasoningMsg := Message{
   290Ôćĺ					ID:        fmt.Sprintf("r_%d", i),
   291Ôćĺ					Timestamp: timestamp,
   292Ôćĺ					Role:      "agent",
   293Ôćĺ					Model:     currentModel,
   294Ôćĺ					Content: []ContentPart{
   295Ôćĺ						{Type: "thinking", Text: text},
   296Ôćĺ					},
   297Ôćĺ				}
   298Ôćĺ				currentExchange.Messages = append(currentExchange.Messages, reasoningMsg)
   299Ôćĺ				currentExchange.EndTime = timestamp
   300Ôćĺ
   301Ôćĺ			case "token_count":
   302Ôćĺ				// Token usage event - attach to the most recent agent message
   303Ôćĺ				if currentExchange == nil || len(currentExchange.Messages) == 0 {
   304Ôćĺ					continue
   305Ôćĺ				}
   306Ôćĺ
   307Ôćĺ				usage := extractUsageFromTokenCount(payload)
   308Ôćĺ				if usage == nil {
   309Ôćĺ					continue
   310Ôćĺ				}
   311Ôćĺ
   312Ôćĺ				// Find the most recent agent message to attach usage to
   313Ôćĺ				for j := len(currentExchange.Messages) - 1; j >= 0; j-- {
   314Ôćĺ					if currentExchange.Messages[j].Role == "agent" {
   315Ôćĺ						currentExchange.Messages[j].Usage = usage
   316Ôćĺ						slog.Debug("Attached token usage to agent message",
   317Ôćĺ							"messageID", currentExchange.Messages[j].ID,
   318Ôćĺ							"inputTokens", usage.InputTokens,
   319Ôćĺ							"outputTokens", usage.OutputTokens,
   320Ôćĺ							"cachedInputTokens", usage.CachedInputTokens,
   321Ôćĺ							"reasoningOutputTokens", usage.ReasoningOutputTokens)
   322Ôćĺ						break
   323Ôćĺ					}
   324Ôćĺ				}
   325Ôćĺ			}
   326Ôćĺ
   327Ôćĺ		case "response_item":
   328Ôćĺ			// Handle function calls and custom tool calls
   329Ôćĺ			payload, ok := record["payload"].(map[string]interface{})
   330Ôćĺ			if !ok {
   331Ôćĺ				continue
   332Ôćĺ			}
   333Ôćĺ
   334Ôćĺ			payloadType, _ := payload["type"].(string)
   335Ôćĺ
   336Ôćĺ			switch payloadType {
   337Ôćĺ			case "function_call":
   338Ôćĺ				// Function call (e.g., shell command)
   339Ôćĺ				if currentExchange == nil {
   340Ôćĺ					currentExchange = &Exchange{
   341Ôćĺ						StartTime: timestamp,
   342Ôćĺ						Messages:  []Message{},
   343Ôćĺ					}
   344Ôćĺ				}
   345Ôćĺ
   346Ôćĺ				toolName, _ := payload["name"].(string)
   347Ôćĺ				argumentsJSON, _ := payload["arguments"].(string)
   348Ôćĺ				callID, _ := payload["call_id"].(string)
   349Ôćĺ
   350Ôćĺ				if toolName == "" {
   351Ôćĺ					continue
   352Ôćĺ				}
   353Ôćĺ
   354Ôćĺ				// Parse arguments to extract input
   355Ôćĺ				var input map[string]interface{}
   356Ôćĺ				if argumentsJSON != "" {
   357Ôćĺ					if err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(argumentsJSON), &input); err != nil {
   358Ôćĺ						slog.Warn("Failed to parse function call arguments", "error", err, "arguments", argumentsJSON)
   359Ôćĺ						input = map[string]interface{}{"raw": argumentsJSON}
   360Ôćĺ					}
   361Ôćĺ				}
   362Ôćĺ
   363Ôćĺ				// Create tool message
   364Ôćĺ				toolMsg := Message{
   365Ôćĺ					ID:        fmt.Sprintf("t_%d", i),
   366Ôćĺ					Timestamp: timestamp,
   367Ôćĺ					Role:      "agent",
   368Ôćĺ					Model:     currentModel,
   369Ôćĺ					Tool: &ToolInfo{
   370Ôćĺ						Name:   toolName,
   371Ôćĺ						Type:   classifyToolType(toolName),
   372Ôćĺ						UseID:  callID,
   373Ôćĺ						Input:  input,
   374Ôćĺ						Output: nil, // Will be filled when we find the output
   375Ôćĺ					},
   376Ôćĺ					PathHints: extractPathHints(toolName, input, "", workspaceRoot),
   377Ôćĺ				}
   378Ôćĺ
   379Ôćĺ				currentExchange.Messages = append(currentExchange.Messages, toolMsg)
   380Ôćĺ				currentExchange.EndTime = timestamp
   381Ôćĺ
   382Ôćĺ				// Track this tool call to match with output later
   383Ôćĺ				if callID != "" {
   384Ôćĺ					pendingTools[callID] = &PendingToolCall{
   385Ôćĺ						message:   &currentExchange.Messages[len(currentExchange.Messages)-1],
   386Ôćĺ						toolInfo:  currentExchange.Messages[len(currentExchange.Messages)-1].Tool,
   387Ôćĺ						timestamp: timestamp,
   388Ôćĺ					}
   389Ôćĺ				}
   390Ôćĺ
   391Ôćĺ			case "function_call_output":
   392Ôćĺ				// Function call output - merge into the pending tool call
   393Ôćĺ				callID, _ := payload["call_id"].(string)
   394Ôćĺ				outputJSON, _ := payload["output"].(string)
   395Ôćĺ
   396Ôćĺ				if callID == "" || outputJSON == "" {
   397Ôćĺ					continue
   398Ôćĺ				}
   399Ôćĺ
   400Ôćĺ				// Find the pending tool call
   401Ôćĺ				if pending, exists := pendingTools[callID]; exists {
   402Ôćĺ					// Parse the output JSON
   403Ôćĺ					var outputData map[string]interface{}
   404Ôćĺ					if err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(outputJSON), &outputData); err == nil {
   405Ôćĺ						pending.toolInfo.Output = outputData
   406Ôćĺ					} else {
   407Ôćĺ						pending.toolInfo.Output = map[string]interface{}{"raw": outputJSON}
   408Ôćĺ					}
   409Ôćĺ					delete(pendingTools, callID)
   410Ôćĺ				}
   411Ôćĺ
   412Ôćĺ			case "custom_tool_call":
   413Ôćĺ				// Custom tool call (e.g., apply_patch)
   414Ôćĺ				if currentExchange == nil {
   415Ôćĺ					currentExchange = &Exchange{
   416Ôćĺ						StartTime: timestamp,
   417Ôćĺ						Messages:  []Message{},
   418Ôćĺ					}
   419Ôćĺ				}
   420Ôćĺ
   421Ôćĺ				toolName, _ := payload["name"].(string)
   422Ôćĺ				inputText, _ := payload["input"].(string)
   423Ôćĺ				callID, _ := payload["call_id"].(string)
   424Ôćĺ
   425Ôćĺ				if toolName == "" {
   426Ôćĺ					continue
   427Ôćĺ				}
   428Ôćĺ
   429Ôćĺ				// For custom tools, input is plain text, not JSON
   430Ôćĺ				input := map[string]interface{}{
   431Ôćĺ					"input": inputText,
   432Ôćĺ				}
   433Ôćĺ
   434Ôćĺ				// Create tool message
   435Ôćĺ				toolMsg := Message{
   436Ôćĺ					ID:        fmt.Sprintf("ct_%d", i),
   437Ôćĺ					Timestamp: timestamp,
   438Ôćĺ					Role:      "agent",
   439Ôćĺ					Model:     currentModel,
   440Ôćĺ					Tool: &ToolInfo{
   441Ôćĺ						Name:   toolName,
   442Ôćĺ						Type:   classifyToolType(toolName),
   443Ôćĺ						UseID:  callID,
   444Ôćĺ						Input:  input,
   445Ôćĺ						Output: nil, // Will be filled when we find the output
   446Ôćĺ					},
   447Ôćĺ					PathHints: extractPathHints(toolName, input, inputText, workspaceRoot),
   448Ôćĺ				}
   449Ôćĺ
   450Ôćĺ				currentExchange.Messages = append(currentExchange.Messages, toolMsg)
   451Ôćĺ				currentExchange.EndTime = timestamp
   452Ôćĺ
   453Ôćĺ				// Track this tool call to match with output later
   454Ôćĺ				if callID != "" {
   455Ôćĺ					pendingTools[callID] = &PendingToolCall{
   456Ôćĺ						message:   &currentExchange.Messages[len(currentExchange.Messages)-1],
   457Ôćĺ						toolInfo:  currentExchange.Messages[len(currentExchange.Messages)-1].Tool,
   458Ôćĺ						timestamp: timestamp,
   459Ôćĺ					}
   460Ôćĺ				}
   461Ôćĺ
   462Ôćĺ			case "custom_tool_call_output":
   463Ôćĺ				// Custom tool call output - merge into the pending tool call
   464Ôćĺ				callID, _ := payload["call_id"].(string)
   465Ôćĺ				outputJSON, _ := payload["output"].(string)
   466Ôćĺ
   467Ôćĺ				if callID == "" || outputJSON == "" {
   468Ôćĺ					continue
   469Ôćĺ				}
   470Ôćĺ
   471Ôćĺ				// Find the pending tool call
   472Ôćĺ				if pending, exists := pendingTools[callID]; exists {
   473Ôćĺ					// Parse the output JSON
   474Ôćĺ					var outputData map[string]interface{}
   475Ôćĺ					if err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(outputJSON), &outputData); err == nil {
   476Ôćĺ						pending.toolInfo.Output = outputData
   477Ôćĺ					} else {
   478Ôćĺ						pending.toolInfo.Output = map[string]interface{}{"raw": outputJSON}
   479Ôćĺ					}
   480Ôćĺ					delete(pendingTools, callID)
   481Ôćĺ				}
   482Ôćĺ			}
   483Ôćĺ		}
   484Ôćĺ	}
   485Ôćĺ
   486Ôćĺ	// Add the last exchange if exists
   487Ôćĺ	if currentExchange != nil && len(currentExchange.Messages) > 0 {
   488Ôćĺ		exchanges = append(exchanges, *currentExchange)
   489Ôćĺ	}
   490Ôćĺ
   491Ôćĺ	return exchanges, nil
   492Ôćĺ}
   493Ôćĺ
   494Ôćĺ// formatToolWithSummary generates custom summary and formatted markdown for a Codex tool
   495Ôćĺ// Returns (summary, formattedMarkdown) where summary is the custom content for <summary> tag
   496Ôćĺ// and formattedMarkdown is additional content to display in the tool-use block
   497Ôćĺfunc formatToolWithSummary(tool *ToolInfo, workspaceRoot string) (string, string) {
   498Ôćĺ	var summary string
   499Ôćĺ	var formattedMd strings.Builder
   500Ôćĺ
   501Ôćĺ	// Format tool input based on whether it's a function call or custom tool
   502Ôćĺ	if tool.Input != nil {
   503Ôćĺ		// Check if this is a custom tool (has string input in "input" field)
   504Ôćĺ		if inputStr, ok := tool.Input["input"].(string); ok {
   505Ôćĺ			// Custom tool with text input (e.g., apply_patch)
   506Ôćĺ			formattedMd.WriteString(formatCustomToolCall(tool.Name, inputStr))
   507Ôćĺ		} else if tool.Name == "shell_command" || tool.Name == "exec_command" {
   508Ôćĺ			// Shell command: normalize "cmd" Ôćĺ "command" for exec_command
   509Ôćĺ			toolInput := tool.Input
   510Ôćĺ			if _, ok := toolInput["cmd"]; ok {
   511Ôćĺ				if _, hasCommand := toolInput["command"]; !hasCommand {
   512Ôćĺ					toolInput["command"] = toolInput["cmd"]
   513Ôćĺ				}
   514Ôćĺ			}
   515Ôćĺ			inputJSON, _ := json.Marshal(toolInput)
   516Ôćĺ			shellSummary, shellBody := formatShellWithSummary(string(inputJSON))
   517Ôćĺ			if shellSummary != "" {
   518Ôćĺ				// Single-line command goes in summary
   519Ôćĺ				summary = fmt.Sprintf("Tool use: **%s** %s", tool.Name, shellSummary)
   520Ôćĺ			}
   521Ôćĺ			if shellBody != "" {
   522Ôćĺ				formattedMd.WriteString(shellBody)
   523Ôćĺ			}
   524Ôćĺ		} else {
   525Ôćĺ			// Other function calls with JSON arguments
   526Ôćĺ			inputJSON, _ := json.Marshal(tool.Input)
   527Ôćĺ			formattedMd.WriteString(formatToolCall(tool.Name, string(inputJSON)))
   528Ôćĺ		}
   529Ôćĺ	}
   530Ôćĺ
   531Ôćĺ	// Format tool output if present
   532Ôćĺ	if tool.Output != nil {
   533Ôćĺ		if outputStr, ok := tool.Output["raw"].(string); ok {
   534Ôćĺ			// Clean and truncate output if needed
   535Ôćĺ			cleaned := strings.TrimSpace(outputStr)
   536Ôćĺ			// Only show output if there's actual content
   537Ôćĺ			if cleaned != "" {
   538Ôćĺ				if formattedMd.Len() > 0 {
   539Ôćĺ					formattedMd.WriteString("\n")
   540Ôćĺ				}
   541Ôćĺ				if len(cleaned) > 5000 {
   542Ôćĺ					cleaned = cleaned[:5000] + "\n... (truncated)"
   543Ôćĺ				}
   544Ôćĺ				formattedMd.WriteString("```\n" + cleaned + "\n```")
   545Ôćĺ			}
   546Ôćĺ		}
   547Ôćĺ	}
   548Ôćĺ
   549Ôćĺ	return summary, strings.TrimSpace(formattedMd.String())
   550Ôćĺ}
   551Ôćĺ
   552Ôćĺ// classifyToolType maps Codex tool names to standard tool types
   553Ôćĺfunc classifyToolType(toolName string) string {
   554Ôćĺ	switch toolName {
   555Ôćĺ	case "shell", "shell_command", "exec_command": // `shell` is legacy
   556Ôćĺ		return "shell"
   557Ôćĺ	case "update_plan":
   558Ôćĺ		return "task"
   559Ôćĺ	case "view_image":
   560Ôćĺ		return "read"
   561Ôćĺ	case "apply_patch":
   562Ôćĺ		return "write"
   563Ôćĺ	case "list_mcp_resources", "list_mcp_resource_templates", "read_mcp_resource":
   564Ôćĺ		return "generic"
   565Ôćĺ	default:
   566Ôćĺ		return "unknown"
   567Ôćĺ	}
   568Ôćĺ}
   569Ôćĺ
   570Ôćĺ// extractPathHints extracts file paths from tool inputs.
   571Ôćĺ// For apply_patch: parses patch format for file paths.
   572Ôćĺ// For other tools: checks common path fields like "path", "file", etc.
   573Ôćĺfunc extractPathHints(toolName string, input map[string]interface{}, inputText string, workspaceRoot string) []string {
   574Ôćĺ	var paths []string
   575Ôćĺ
   576Ôćĺ	if toolName == "apply_patch" {
   577Ôćĺ		// Parse patch format to extract file paths
   578Ôćĺ		// Look for lines like "*** Modify File: path", "*** Create File: path", "*** Delete File: path"
   579Ôćĺ		if inputText != "" {
   580Ôćĺ			paths = extractPathsFromPatch(inputText, workspaceRoot)
   581Ôćĺ		} else if inputStr, ok := input["input"].(string); ok {
   582Ôćĺ			paths = extractPathsFromPatch(inputStr, workspaceRoot)
   583Ôćĺ		}
   584Ôćĺ	} else {
   585Ôćĺ		// For other tools, check common path fields
   586Ôćĺ		pathFields := []string{"path", "file", "filename", "file_path"}
   587Ôćĺ		for _, field := range pathFields {
   588Ôćĺ			if value, ok := input[field].(string); ok && value != "" {
   589Ôćĺ				normalizedPath := spi.NormalizePath(value, workspaceRoot)
   590Ôćĺ				if !contains(paths, normalizedPath) {
   591Ôćĺ					paths = append(paths, normalizedPath)
   592Ôćĺ				}
   593Ôćĺ			}
   594Ôćĺ		}
   595Ôćĺ
   596Ôćĺ		// Extract paths from shell commands (redirect targets, file-creating commands)
   597Ôćĺ		// exec_command uses "cmd", shell_command uses "command"
   598Ôćĺ		command, _ := input["command"].(string)
   599Ôćĺ		if command == "" {
   600Ôćĺ			command, _ = input["cmd"].(string)
   601Ôćĺ		}
   602Ôćĺ		if command != "" {
   603Ôćĺ			cwd, _ := input["workdir"].(string)
   604Ôćĺ			if cwd == "" {
   605Ôćĺ				cwd = workspaceRoot
   606Ôćĺ			}
   607Ôćĺ			shellPaths := spi.ExtractShellPathHints(command, cwd, workspaceRoot)
   608Ôćĺ			for _, sp := range shellPaths {
   609Ôćĺ				if !contains(paths, sp) {
   610Ôćĺ					paths = append(paths, sp)
   611Ôćĺ				}
   612Ôćĺ			}
   613Ôćĺ		}
   614Ôćĺ	}
   615Ôćĺ
   616Ôćĺ	return paths
   617Ôćĺ}
   618Ôćĺ
   619Ôćĺ// extractPathsFromPatch parses apply_patch input to find file paths
   620Ôćĺfunc extractPathsFromPatch(patchText string, workspaceRoot string) []string {
   621Ôćĺ	var paths []string
   622Ôćĺ	lines := strings.Split(patchText, "\n")
   623Ôćĺ
   624Ôćĺ	for _, line := range lines {
   625Ôćĺ		line = strings.TrimSpace(line)
   626Ôćĺ
   627Ôćĺ		// Look for patch markers - both "Create File" and "Add File" are valid
   628Ôćĺ		markers := []string{
   629Ôćĺ			"*** Modify File:",
   630Ôćĺ			"*** Update File:",
   631Ôćĺ			"*** Create File:",
   632Ôćĺ			"*** Add File:",
   633Ôćĺ			"*** Delete File:",
   634Ôćĺ			"*** Rename File:",
   635Ôćĺ			"*** Remove File:",
   636Ôćĺ		}
   637Ôćĺ
   638Ôćĺ		for _, marker := range markers {
   639Ôćĺ			if strings.HasPrefix(line, marker) {
   640Ôćĺ				path := strings.TrimSpace(strings.TrimPrefix(line, marker))
   641Ôćĺ				if path != "" {
   642Ôćĺ					normalizedPath := spi.NormalizePath(path, workspaceRoot)
   643Ôćĺ					if !contains(paths, normalizedPath) {
   644Ôćĺ						paths = append(paths, normalizedPath)
   645Ôćĺ					}
   646Ôćĺ				}
   647Ôćĺ				break
   648Ôćĺ			}
   649Ôćĺ		}
   650Ôćĺ
   651Ôćĺ		// For rename, also check for "*** New Name:" marker
   652Ôćĺ		if strings.HasPrefix(line, "*** New Name:") {
   653Ôćĺ			path := strings.TrimSpace(strings.TrimPrefix(line, "*** New Name:"))
   654Ôćĺ			if path != "" {
   655Ôćĺ				normalizedPath := spi.NormalizePath(path, workspaceRoot)
   656Ôćĺ				if !contains(paths, normalizedPath) {
   657Ôćĺ					paths = append(paths, normalizedPath)
   658Ôćĺ				}
   659Ôćĺ			}
   660Ôćĺ		}
   661Ôćĺ	}
   662Ôćĺ
   663Ôćĺ	return paths
   664Ôćĺ}
   665Ôćĺ
   666Ôćĺ// contains checks if a string slice contains a value
   667Ôćĺfunc contains(slice []string, value string) bool {
   668Ôćĺ	for _, item := range slice {
   669Ôćĺ		if item == value {
   670Ôćĺ			return true
   671Ôćĺ		}
   672Ôćĺ	}
   673Ôćĺ	return false
   674Ôćĺ}
   675Ôćĺ
   676Ôćĺ// extractUsageFromTokenCount extracts token usage from a token_count event's info.last_token_usage
   677Ôćĺ// Codex CLI emits token_count events with the structure:
   678Ôćĺ//
   679Ôćĺ//	{
   680Ôćĺ//	  "type": "event_msg",
   681Ôćĺ//	  "payload": {
   682Ôćĺ//	    "type": "token_count",
   683Ôćĺ//	    "info": {
   684Ôćĺ//	      "last_token_usage": { "input_tokens": N, "cached_input_tokens": N, "output_tokens": N, "reasoning_output_tokens": N, ... },
   685Ôćĺ//	      "total_token_usage": { ... }
   686Ôćĺ//	    }
   687Ôćĺ//	  }
   688Ôćĺ//	}
   689Ôćĺ//
   690Ôćĺ// We use last_token_usage for per-turn usage (total_token_usage is cumulative).
   691Ôćĺ// Codex CLI uses its own token field names, stored in the Codex-specific fields of Usage.
   692Ôćĺfunc extractUsageFromTokenCount(payload map[string]interface{}) *Usage {
   693Ôćĺ	info, ok := payload["info"].(map[string]interface{})
   694Ôćĺ	if !ok {
   695Ôćĺ		return nil
   696Ôćĺ	}
   697Ôćĺ
   698Ôćĺ	// Use last_token_usage for per-turn metrics (not cumulative)
   699Ôćĺ	lastUsage, ok := info["last_token_usage"].(map[string]interface{})
   700Ôćĺ	if !ok {
   701Ôćĺ		return nil
   702Ôćĺ	}
   703Ôćĺ
   704Ôćĺ	return &Usage{
   705Ôćĺ		// Common fields
   706Ôćĺ		InputTokens:  schema.GetIntFromMap(lastUsage, "input_tokens"),
   707Ôćĺ		OutputTokens: schema.GetIntFromMap(lastUsage, "output_tokens"),
   708Ôćĺ		// Codex CLI specific fields
   709Ôćĺ		CachedInputTokens:     schema.GetIntFromMap(lastUsage, "cached_input_tokens"),
   710Ôćĺ		ReasoningOutputTokens: schema.GetIntFromMap(lastUsage, "reasoning_output_tokens"),
   711Ôćĺ	}
   712Ôćĺ}
   713Ôćĺ
```
</details></tool-use>
