 `./pkg/providers/droidcli/agent_session.go`

```text
     1Ôćĺpackage droidcli
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺimport (
     4Ôćĺ	"encoding/json"
     5Ôćĺ	"fmt"
     6Ôćĺ	"strings"
     7Ôćĺ
     8Ôćĺ	"github.com/specstoryai/getspecstory/specstory-cli/pkg/spi"
     9Ôćĺ	"github.com/specstoryai/getspecstory/specstory-cli/pkg/spi/schema"
    10Ôćĺ)
    11Ôćĺ
    12Ôćĺ// Type aliases for convenience - use the shared schema types
    13Ôćĺtype (
    14Ôćĺ	SessionData  = schema.SessionData
    15Ôćĺ	ProviderInfo = schema.ProviderInfo
    16Ôćĺ	Exchange     = schema.Exchange
    17Ôćĺ	Message      = schema.Message
    18Ôćĺ	ContentPart  = schema.ContentPart
    19Ôćĺ	ToolInfo     = schema.ToolInfo
    20Ôćĺ	Usage        = schema.Usage
    21Ôćĺ)
    22Ôćĺ
    23Ôćĺ// convertTokenUsage converts Droid's token usage structure to the shared Usage type.
    24Ôćĺ// Returns nil if tokenUsage is nil.
    25Ôćĺfunc convertTokenUsage(tokenUsage *fdTokenUsage) *Usage {
    26Ôćĺ	if tokenUsage == nil {
    27Ôćĺ		return nil
    28Ôćĺ	}
    29Ôćĺ	return &Usage{
    30Ôćĺ		InputTokens:              tokenUsage.InputTokens,
    31Ôćĺ		OutputTokens:             tokenUsage.OutputTokens,
    32Ôćĺ		CacheCreationInputTokens: tokenUsage.CacheCreationTokens,
    33Ôćĺ		CacheReadInputTokens:     tokenUsage.CacheReadTokens,
    34Ôćĺ		ThinkingTokens:           tokenUsage.ThinkingTokens,
    35Ôćĺ	}
    36Ôćĺ}
    37Ôćĺ
    38Ôćĺ// GenerateAgentSession converts an fdSession into the shared SessionData schema.
    39Ôćĺfunc GenerateAgentSession(session *fdSession, workspaceRoot string) (*SessionData, error) {
    40Ôćĺ	if session == nil {
    41Ôćĺ		return nil, fmt.Errorf("session is nil")
    42Ôćĺ	}
    43Ôćĺ
    44Ôćĺ	workspaceRoot = strings.TrimSpace(workspaceRoot)
    45Ôćĺ	if sessionRoot := strings.TrimSpace(session.WorkspaceRoot); sessionRoot != "" {
    46Ôćĺ		workspaceRoot = sessionRoot
    47Ôćĺ	}
    48Ôćĺ
    49Ôćĺ	exchanges, lastTimestamp := buildExchanges(session, workspaceRoot)
    50Ôćĺ	if len(exchanges) == 0 {
    51Ôćĺ		return nil, fmt.Errorf("session contains no conversational exchanges")
    52Ôćĺ	}
    53Ôćĺ
    54Ôćĺ	for idx := range exchanges {
    55Ôćĺ		exchanges[idx].ExchangeID = fmt.Sprintf("%s:%d", session.ID, idx)
    56Ôćĺ		ensureExchangeTimestamps(&exchanges[idx])
    57Ôćĺ	}
    58Ôćĺ
    59Ôćĺ	// Apply session-level token usage to the last message of the last exchange.
    60Ôćĺ	// Droid CLI provides aggregate token usage for the entire session, not per-message.
    61Ôćĺ	// Attaching to the last message ensures proper aggregation in telemetry.
    62Ôćĺ	if usage := convertTokenUsage(session.TokenUsage); usage != nil {
    63Ôćĺ		if lastExchange := &exchanges[len(exchanges)-1]; len(lastExchange.Messages) > 0 {
    64Ôćĺ			lastExchange.Messages[len(lastExchange.Messages)-1].Usage = usage
    65Ôćĺ		}
    66Ôćĺ	}
    67Ôćĺ
    68Ôćĺ	created := strings.TrimSpace(session.CreatedAt)
    69Ôćĺ	if created == "" {
    70Ôćĺ		created = exchanges[0].StartTime
    71Ôćĺ	}
    72Ôćĺ	if created == "" {
    73Ôćĺ		created = lastTimestamp
    74Ôćĺ	}
    75Ôćĺ
    76Ôćĺ	updated := strings.TrimSpace(lastTimestamp)
    77Ôćĺ	if updated == "" {
    78Ôćĺ		updated = created
    79Ôćĺ	}
    80Ôćĺ
    81Ôćĺ	data := &SessionData{
    82Ôćĺ		SchemaVersion: "1.0",
    83Ôćĺ		Provider: ProviderInfo{
    84Ôćĺ			ID:      "droid-cli",
    85Ôćĺ			Name:    "Factory Droid CLI",
    86Ôćĺ			Version: "unknown",
    87Ôćĺ		},
    88Ôćĺ		SessionID:     session.ID,
    89Ôćĺ		CreatedAt:     created,
    90Ôćĺ		UpdatedAt:     updated,
    91Ôćĺ		Slug:          session.Slug,
    92Ôćĺ		WorkspaceRoot: workspaceRoot,
    93Ôćĺ		Exchanges:     exchanges,
    94Ôćĺ	}
    95Ôćĺ
    96Ôćĺ	return data, nil
    97Ôćĺ}
    98Ôćĺ
    99Ôćĺfunc buildExchanges(session *fdSession, workspaceRoot string) ([]Exchange, string) {
   100Ôćĺ	var exchanges []Exchange
   101Ôćĺ	var current *Exchange
   102Ôćĺ	var lastTimestamp string
   103Ôćĺ	lastBlockWasUser := false
   104Ôćĺ
   105Ôćĺ	flush := func() {
   106Ôćĺ		if current == nil {
   107Ôćĺ			return
   108Ôćĺ		}
   109Ôćĺ		if len(current.Messages) > 0 {
   110Ôćĺ			if current.StartTime == "" {
   111Ôćĺ				current.StartTime = current.Messages[0].Timestamp
   112Ôćĺ			}
   113Ôćĺ			if current.EndTime == "" {
   114Ôćĺ				current.EndTime = current.Messages[len(current.Messages)-1].Timestamp
   115Ôćĺ			}
   116Ôćĺ			exchanges = append(exchanges, *current)
   117Ôćĺ		}
   118Ôćĺ		current = nil
   119Ôćĺ		lastBlockWasUser = false
   120Ôćĺ	}
   121Ôćĺ
   122Ôćĺ	appendMessage := func(msg Message, timestamp string) {
   123Ôćĺ		if current == nil {
   124Ôćĺ			current = &Exchange{StartTime: timestamp}
   125Ôćĺ		}
   126Ôćĺ		current.Messages = append(current.Messages, msg)
   127Ôćĺ		if timestamp != "" {
   128Ôćĺ			current.EndTime = timestamp
   129Ôćĺ		}
   130Ôćĺ	}
   131Ôćĺ
   132Ôćĺ	for _, block := range session.Blocks {
   133Ôćĺ		ts := strings.TrimSpace(block.Timestamp)
   134Ôćĺ		if ts != "" {
   135Ôćĺ			lastTimestamp = ts
   136Ôćĺ		}
   137Ôćĺ
   138Ôćĺ		if isUserBlock(block) {
   139Ôćĺ			text := cleanUserText(block.Text)
   140Ôćĺ			if text == "" {
   141Ôćĺ				continue
   142Ôćĺ			}
   143Ôćĺ			if !lastBlockWasUser {
   144Ôćĺ				flush()
   145Ôćĺ				current = &Exchange{StartTime: ts}
   146Ôćĺ			}
   147Ôćĺ			msg := Message{
   148Ôćĺ				ID:        strings.TrimSpace(block.MessageID),
   149Ôćĺ				Timestamp: ts,
   150Ôćĺ				Role:      "user",
   151Ôćĺ				Content: []ContentPart{
   152Ôćĺ					{Type: "text", Text: text},
   153Ôćĺ				},
   154Ôćĺ			}
   155Ôćĺ			appendMessage(msg, ts)
   156Ôćĺ			lastBlockWasUser = true
   157Ôćĺ			continue
   158Ôćĺ		}
   159Ôćĺ
   160Ôćĺ		if current == nil {
   161Ôćĺ			current = &Exchange{StartTime: ts}
   162Ôćĺ		}
   163Ôćĺ		lastBlockWasUser = false
   164Ôćĺ
   165Ôćĺ		switch block.Kind {
   166Ôćĺ		case blockText:
   167Ôćĺ			if msg := buildAgentTextMessage(block); msg != nil {
   168Ôćĺ				appendMessage(*msg, ts)
   169Ôćĺ			}
   170Ôćĺ		case blockTool:
   171Ôćĺ			if msg := buildToolMessage(block, workspaceRoot); msg != nil {
   172Ôćĺ				appendMessage(*msg, ts)
   173Ôćĺ			}
   174Ôćĺ		case blockTodo:
   175Ôćĺ			if msg := buildTodoMessage(block); msg != nil {
   176Ôćĺ				appendMessage(*msg, ts)
   177Ôćĺ			}
   178Ôćĺ		case blockSummary:
   179Ôćĺ			if msg := buildSummaryMessage(block); msg != nil {
   180Ôćĺ				appendMessage(*msg, ts)
   181Ôćĺ			}
   182Ôćĺ		}
   183Ôćĺ	}
   184Ôćĺ
   185Ôćĺ	flush()
   186Ôćĺ	return exchanges, lastTimestamp
   187Ôćĺ}
   188Ôćĺ
   189Ôćĺfunc ensureExchangeTimestamps(ex *Exchange) {
   190Ôćĺ	if ex.StartTime == "" && len(ex.Messages) > 0 {
   191Ôćĺ		ex.StartTime = ex.Messages[0].Timestamp
   192Ôćĺ	}
   193Ôćĺ	if ex.EndTime == "" && len(ex.Messages) > 0 {
   194Ôćĺ		ex.EndTime = ex.Messages[len(ex.Messages)-1].Timestamp
   195Ôćĺ	}
   196Ôćĺ}
   197Ôćĺ
   198Ôćĺfunc isUserBlock(block fdBlock) bool {
   199Ôćĺ	return block.Kind == blockText && strings.EqualFold(strings.TrimSpace(block.Role), "user")
   200Ôćĺ}
   201Ôćĺ
   202Ôćĺfunc buildAgentTextMessage(block fdBlock) *Message {
   203Ôćĺ	text := strings.TrimSpace(block.Text)
   204Ôćĺ	if text == "" {
   205Ôćĺ		return nil
   206Ôćĺ	}
   207Ôćĺ	partType := "text"
   208Ôćĺ	if block.IsReasoning {
   209Ôćĺ		partType = "thinking"
   210Ôćĺ	}
   211Ôćĺ	return &Message{
   212Ôćĺ		ID:        strings.TrimSpace(block.MessageID),
   213Ôćĺ		Timestamp: strings.TrimSpace(block.Timestamp),
   214Ôćĺ		Role:      "agent",
   215Ôćĺ		Model:     strings.TrimSpace(block.Model),
   216Ôćĺ		Content: []ContentPart{
   217Ôćĺ			{Type: partType, Text: text},
   218Ôćĺ		},
   219Ôćĺ	}
   220Ôćĺ}
   221Ôćĺ
   222Ôćĺfunc buildToolMessage(block fdBlock, workspaceRoot string) *Message {
   223Ôćĺ	if block.Tool == nil {
   224Ôćĺ		return nil
   225Ôćĺ	}
   226Ôćĺ	toolInfo := convertToolCallToInfo(block.Tool)
   227Ôćĺ	if toolInfo == nil {
   228Ôćĺ		return nil
   229Ôćĺ	}
   230Ôćĺ	formatted := formatToolCall(block.Tool)
   231Ôćĺ	if formatted != "" {
   232Ôćĺ		toolInfo.FormattedMarkdown = &formatted
   233Ôćĺ	}
   234Ôćĺ	toolInfo.Type = toolType(toolInfo.Name)
   235Ôćĺ	if toolInfo.Output != nil {
   236Ôćĺ		if content, ok := toolInfo.Output["content"].(string); ok {
   237Ôćĺ			toolInfo.Output["content"] = strings.TrimSpace(content)
   238Ôćĺ		}
   239Ôćĺ	}
   240Ôćĺ	pathHints := extractPathHints(toolInfo.Input, workspaceRoot)
   241Ôćĺ	return &Message{
   242Ôćĺ		ID:        strings.TrimSpace(block.MessageID),
   243Ôćĺ		Timestamp: strings.TrimSpace(block.Timestamp),
   244Ôćĺ		Role:      "agent",
   245Ôćĺ		Model:     strings.TrimSpace(block.Model),
   246Ôćĺ		Tool:      toolInfo,
   247Ôćĺ		PathHints: pathHints,
   248Ôćĺ	}
   249Ôćĺ}
   250Ôćĺ
   251Ôćĺfunc buildTodoMessage(block fdBlock) *Message {
   252Ôćĺ	if block.Todo == nil || len(block.Todo.Items) == 0 {
   253Ôćĺ		return nil
   254Ôćĺ	}
   255Ôćĺ	formatted := formatTodoUpdate(block.Todo)
   256Ôćĺ	input := map[string]interface{}{
   257Ôćĺ		"items": todoItemsToMap(block.Todo.Items),
   258Ôćĺ	}
   259Ôćĺ	tool := &ToolInfo{
   260Ôćĺ		Name:  "todo_state",
   261Ôćĺ		Type:  "task",
   262Ôćĺ		UseID: fmt.Sprintf("todo_%s", strings.ReplaceAll(block.Timestamp, ":", "")),
   263Ôćĺ		Input: input,
   264Ôćĺ	}
   265Ôćĺ	if formatted != "" {
   266Ôćĺ		tool.FormattedMarkdown = &formatted
   267Ôćĺ	}
   268Ôćĺ	return &Message{
   269Ôćĺ		ID:        strings.TrimSpace(block.MessageID),
   270Ôćĺ		Timestamp: strings.TrimSpace(block.Timestamp),
   271Ôćĺ		Role:      "agent",
   272Ôćĺ		Tool:      tool,
   273Ôćĺ	}
   274Ôćĺ}
   275Ôćĺ
   276Ôćĺfunc buildSummaryMessage(block fdBlock) *Message {
   277Ôćĺ	if block.Summary == nil {
   278Ôćĺ		return nil
   279Ôćĺ	}
   280Ôćĺ	body := strings.TrimSpace(block.Summary.Body)
   281Ôćĺ	if body == "" {
   282Ôćĺ		return nil
   283Ôćĺ	}
   284Ôćĺ	title := strings.TrimSpace(block.Summary.Title)
   285Ôćĺ	if title == "" {
   286Ôćĺ		title = "Summary"
   287Ôćĺ	}
   288Ôćĺ	text := fmt.Sprintf("**%s**\n\n%s", title, body)
   289Ôćĺ	return &Message{
   290Ôćĺ		ID:        strings.TrimSpace(block.MessageID),
   291Ôćĺ		Timestamp: strings.TrimSpace(block.Timestamp),
   292Ôćĺ		Role:      "agent",
   293Ôćĺ		Content: []ContentPart{
   294Ôćĺ			{Type: "thinking", Text: text},
   295Ôćĺ		},
   296Ôćĺ	}
   297Ôćĺ}
   298Ôćĺ
   299Ôćĺfunc convertToolCallToInfo(call *fdToolCall) *ToolInfo {
   300Ôćĺ	if call == nil {
   301Ôćĺ		return nil
   302Ôćĺ	}
   303Ôćĺ	name := strings.TrimSpace(call.Name)
   304Ôćĺ	if name == "" {
   305Ôćĺ		name = "tool"
   306Ôćĺ	}
   307Ôćĺ	useID := strings.TrimSpace(call.ID)
   308Ôćĺ	if useID == "" {
   309Ôćĺ		useID = fmt.Sprintf("tool-%s", strings.ReplaceAll(call.InvokedAt, ":", ""))
   310Ôćĺ	}
   311Ôćĺ	args := decodeInput(call.Input)
   312Ôćĺ	var output map[string]interface{}
   313Ôćĺ	if call.Result != nil {
   314Ôćĺ		content := strings.TrimSpace(call.Result.Content)
   315Ôćĺ		if content != "" || call.Result.IsError {
   316Ôćĺ			output = map[string]interface{}{
   317Ôćĺ				"content": content,
   318Ôćĺ				"isError": call.Result.IsError,
   319Ôćĺ			}
   320Ôćĺ		}
   321Ôćĺ	}
   322Ôćĺ	tool := &ToolInfo{
   323Ôćĺ		Name:   name,
   324Ôćĺ		Type:   toolType(name),
   325Ôćĺ		UseID:  useID,
   326Ôćĺ		Input:  args,
   327Ôćĺ		Output: output,
   328Ôćĺ	}
   329Ôćĺ	if call.RiskLevel != "" {
   330Ôćĺ		summary := fmt.Sprintf("Risk level: %s", call.RiskLevel)
   331Ôćĺ		if strings.TrimSpace(call.RiskReason) != "" {
   332Ôćĺ			summary = fmt.Sprintf("%s ÔÇö %s", summary, strings.TrimSpace(call.RiskReason))
   333Ôćĺ		}
   334Ôćĺ		tool.Summary = &summary
   335Ôćĺ	}
   336Ôćĺ	return tool
   337Ôćĺ}
   338Ôćĺ
   339Ôćĺfunc todoItemsToMap(items []fdTodoItem) []map[string]interface{} {
   340Ôćĺ	result := make([]map[string]interface{}, 0, len(items))
   341Ôćĺ	for _, item := range items {
   342Ôćĺ		result = append(result, map[string]interface{}{
   343Ôćĺ			"description": strings.TrimSpace(item.Description),
   344Ôćĺ			"status":      strings.TrimSpace(item.Status),
   345Ôćĺ		})
   346Ôćĺ	}
   347Ôćĺ	return result
   348Ôćĺ}
   349Ôćĺ
   350Ôćĺfunc extractPathHints(input map[string]interface{}, workspaceRoot string) []string {
   351Ôćĺ	fields := []string{"path", "file_path", "filePath", "dir", "directory",
   352Ôćĺ		"workdir", "cwd", "target"}
   353Ôćĺ	var hints []string
   354Ôćĺ	if input == nil {
   355Ôćĺ		return hints
   356Ôćĺ	}
   357Ôćĺ	for _, field := range fields {
   358Ôćĺ		val, ok := input[field]
   359Ôćĺ		if !ok {
   360Ôćĺ			continue
   361Ôćĺ		}
   362Ôćĺ		switch v := val.(type) {
   363Ôćĺ		case string:
   364Ôćĺ			addPathHint(&hints, v, workspaceRoot)
   365Ôćĺ		case []interface{}:
   366Ôćĺ			for _, entry := range v {
   367Ôćĺ				if s, ok := entry.(string); ok {
   368Ôćĺ					addPathHint(&hints, s, workspaceRoot)
   369Ôćĺ				}
   370Ôćĺ			}
   371Ôćĺ		case json.Number:
   372Ôćĺ			addPathHint(&hints, v.String(), workspaceRoot)
   373Ôćĺ		}
   374Ôćĺ	}
   375Ôćĺ
   376Ôćĺ	// Extract paths from shell commands (redirect targets, file-creating commands)
   377Ôćĺ	// Check both "command" and "cmd" field names for shell tools
   378Ôćĺ	command, _ := input["command"].(string)
   379Ôćĺ	if command == "" {
   380Ôćĺ		command, _ = input["cmd"].(string)
   381Ôćĺ	}
   382Ôćĺ	if command != "" {
   383Ôćĺ		cwd, _ := input["workdir"].(string)
   384Ôćĺ		if cwd == "" {
   385Ôćĺ			cwd, _ = input["cwd"].(string)
   386Ôćĺ		}
   387Ôćĺ		if cwd == "" {
   388Ôćĺ			cwd = workspaceRoot
   389Ôćĺ		}
   390Ôćĺ		shellPaths := spi.ExtractShellPathHints(command, cwd, workspaceRoot)
   391Ôćĺ		for _, sp := range shellPaths {
   392Ôćĺ			addPathHint(&hints, sp, workspaceRoot)
   393Ôćĺ		}
   394Ôćĺ	}
   395Ôćĺ
   396Ôćĺ	return hints
   397Ôćĺ}
   398Ôćĺ
   399Ôćĺfunc addPathHint(hints *[]string, value string, workspaceRoot string) {
   400Ôćĺ	value = strings.TrimSpace(value)
   401Ôćĺ	if value == "" {
   402Ôćĺ		return
   403Ôćĺ	}
   404Ôćĺ	normalized := spi.NormalizePath(value, workspaceRoot)
   405Ôćĺ	for _, existing := range *hints {
   406Ôćĺ		if existing == normalized {
   407Ôćĺ			return
   408Ôćĺ		}
   409Ôćĺ	}
   410Ôćĺ	*hints = append(*hints, normalized)
   411Ôćĺ}
   412Ôćĺ
```

    80Ôćĺ// parseFactorySession converts a Factory Droid JSONL transcript into an fdSession.
    81Ôćĺfunc parseFactorySession(filePath string) (*fdSession, error) {
    82Ôćĺ	file, err := os.Open(filePath)
    83Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
    84Ôćĺ		return nil, fmt.Errorf("droidcli: unable to open session %s: %w", filePath, err)
    85Ôćĺ	}
    86Ôćĺ	defer func() {
    87Ôćĺ		_ = file.Close()
    88Ôćĺ	}()
    89Ôćĺ
    90Ôćĺ	session := &fdSession{Blocks: make([]fdBlock, 0, 64)}
    91Ôćĺ	toolIndex := make(map[string]*fdToolCall)
    92Ôćĺ	var rawBuilder strings.Builder
    93Ôćĺ	var firstUserText string
    94Ôćĺ	var firstTimestamp string
    95Ôćĺ
    96Ôćĺ	scanErr := scanLines(file, func(lineNumber int, line string) error {
    97Ôćĺ		rawBuilder.WriteString(line)
    98Ôćĺ		rawBuilder.WriteByte('\n')
    99Ôćĺ
   100Ôćĺ		trimmed := strings.TrimSpace(line)
   101Ôćĺ		if trimmed == "" {
   102Ôćĺ			return nil
   103Ôćĺ		}
   104Ôćĺ
   105Ôćĺ		var env jsonlEnvelope
   106Ôćĺ		if err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(trimmed), &env); err != nil {
   107Ôćĺ			// Log warning and skip corrupted lines rather than failing entire parse
   108Ôćĺ			slog.Warn("Skipping corrupted JSONL line",
   109Ôćĺ				"file", filepath.Base(filePath),
   110Ôćĺ				"line", lineNumber,
   111Ôćĺ				"error", err)
   112Ôćĺ			return nil
   113Ôćĺ		}
   114Ôćĺ
   115Ôćĺ		switch env.Type {
   116Ôćĺ		case "session_start":
   117Ôćĺ			var event sessionStartEvent
   118Ôćĺ			if err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(trimmed), &event); err != nil {
   119Ôćĺ				slog.Debug("droidcli: skipping malformed session_start event", "error", err, "file", filePath)
   120Ôćĺ				return nil
   121Ôćĺ			}
   122Ôćĺ			session.ID = fallback(session.ID, firstNonEmpty(event.ID, event.Session.ID))
   123Ôćĺ			session.Title = fallback(session.Title, firstNonEmpty(event.Title, event.Session.Title, event.SessionTitle))
   124Ôćĺ			session.CreatedAt = fallback(session.CreatedAt, firstNonEmpty(event.CreatedAt, event.Session.CreatedAt, event.Timestamp))
   125Ôćĺ			session.WorkspaceRoot = fallback(session.WorkspaceRoot, firstNonEmpty(event.CWD, event.WorkspaceRoot, event.Session.CWD, event.Session.WorkspaceRoot))
   126Ôćĺ		case "message":
   127Ôćĺ			var event messageEvent
   128Ôćĺ			if err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(trimmed), &event); err != nil {
   129Ôćĺ				slog.Debug("droidcli: skipping malformed message event", "error", err, "file", filePath)
   130Ôćĺ				return nil
   131Ôćĺ			}
   132Ôćĺ			if firstTimestamp == "" {
   133Ôćĺ				firstTimestamp = normalizeEventTimestamp(event.Timestamp)
   134Ôćĺ			}
   135Ôćĺ			handleMessageEvent(session, &event, toolIndex)
   136Ôćĺ			if strings.EqualFold(event.Message.Role, "user") {
   137Ôćĺ				if firstUserText == "" {
   138Ôćĺ					firstUserText = firstUserContent(event.Message.Content)
   139Ôćĺ				}
   140Ôćĺ			}
   141Ôćĺ		case "todo_state":
   142Ôćĺ			var event todoEvent
   143Ôćĺ			if err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(trimmed), &event); err != nil {
   144Ôćĺ				slog.Debug("droidcli: skipping malformed todo_state event", "error", err, "file", filePath)
   145Ôćĺ				return nil
   146Ôćĺ			}
   147Ôćĺ			if firstTimestamp == "" {
   148Ôćĺ				firstTimestamp = normalizeEventTimestamp(event.Timestamp)
   149Ôćĺ			}
   150Ôćĺ			if len(event.Todos) == 0 {
   151Ôćĺ				return nil
   152Ôćĺ			}
   153Ôćĺ			session.Blocks = append(session.Blocks, fdBlock{
   154Ôćĺ				Kind:      blockTodo,
   155Ôćĺ				Role:      "agent",
   156Ôćĺ				Timestamp: event.Timestamp,
   157Ôćĺ				Todo: &fdTodoState{
   158Ôćĺ					Items: append([]fdTodoItem(nil), event.Todos...),
   159Ôćĺ				},
   160Ôćĺ			})
   161Ôćĺ		case "compaction_state":
   162Ôćĺ			var event compactionEvent
   163Ôćĺ			if err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(trimmed), &event); err != nil {
   164Ôćĺ				slog.Debug("droidcli: skipping malformed compaction_state event", "error", err, "file", filePath)
   165Ôćĺ				return nil
   166Ôćĺ			}
   167Ôćĺ			if firstTimestamp == "" {
   168Ôćĺ				firstTimestamp = normalizeEventTimestamp(event.Timestamp)
   169Ôćĺ			}
   170Ôćĺ			if strings.TrimSpace(event.Summary.Body) == "" {
   171Ôćĺ				return nil
   172Ôćĺ			}
   173Ôćĺ			session.Blocks = append(session.Blocks, fdBlock{
   174Ôćĺ				Kind:      blockSummary,
   175Ôćĺ				Role:      "agent",
   176Ôćĺ				Timestamp: event.Timestamp,
   177Ôćĺ				Summary:   &event.Summary,
   178Ôćĺ			})
   179Ôćĺ		}
   180Ôćĺ
   181Ôćĺ		return nil
   182Ôćĺ	})
   183Ôćĺ	if scanErr != nil {
   184Ôćĺ		return nil, fmt.Errorf("droidcli: failed scanning %s: %w", filePath, scanErr)
   185Ôćĺ	}
   186Ôćĺ
   187Ôćĺ	if session.ID == "" {
   188Ôćĺ		session.ID = strings.TrimSuffix(filepath.Base(filePath), filepath.Ext(filePath))
   189Ôćĺ	}
   190Ôćĺ
   191Ôćĺ	if session.CreatedAt == "" {
   192Ôćĺ		session.CreatedAt = fallback(firstTimestamp, deriveTimestampFromFilename(filePath))
   193Ôćĺ	}
   194Ôćĺ
   195Ôćĺ	session.Slug = slugFromContent(firstUserText, session.Title, session.CreatedAt)
   196Ôćĺ	session.RawData = rawBuilder.String()
   197Ôćĺ
   198Ôćĺ	// Read token usage from the companion .settings.json file
   199Ôćĺ	session.TokenUsage = readSessionSettings(filePath)
   200Ôćĺ
   201Ôćĺ	return session, nil
   202Ôćĺ}
   203Ôćĺ
   204Ôćĺ// readSessionSettings reads the .settings.json companion file for a session
   205Ôćĺ// and extracts token usage data. Returns nil if the file doesn't exist or can't be parsed.
   206Ôćĺfunc readSessionSettings(sessionPath string) *fdTokenUsage {
   207Ôćĺ	settingsPath := settingsPathFromSession(sessionPath)
   208Ôćĺ
   209Ôćĺ	data, err := os.ReadFile(settingsPath)
   210Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
   211Ôćĺ		// Settings file may not exist for older sessions
   212Ôćĺ		slog.Debug("droidcli: settings file not found", "path", settingsPath)
   213Ôćĺ		return nil
   214Ôćĺ	}
   215Ôćĺ
   216Ôćĺ	var settings fdSettings
   217Ôćĺ	if err := json.Unmarshal(data, &settings); err != nil {
   218Ôćĺ		slog.Warn("droidcli: failed to parse settings file", "path", settingsPath, "error", err)
   219Ôćĺ		return nil
   220Ôćĺ	}
   221Ôćĺ
   222Ôćĺ	if settings.TokenUsage == nil {
   223Ôćĺ		slog.Debug("droidcli: no token usage in settings file", "path", settingsPath)
   224Ôćĺ		return nil
   225Ôćĺ	}
   226Ôćĺ
   227Ôćĺ	slog.Debug("droidcli: loaded token usage from settings",
   228Ôćĺ		"path", settingsPath,
   229Ôćĺ		"inputTokens", settings.TokenUsage.InputTokens,
   230Ôćĺ		"outputTokens", settings.TokenUsage.OutputTokens,
   231Ôćĺ		"cacheCreationTokens", settings.TokenUsage.CacheCreationTokens,
   232Ôćĺ		"cacheReadTokens", settings.TokenUsage.CacheReadTokens,
   233Ôćĺ		"thinkingTokens", settings.TokenUsage.ThinkingTokens)
   234Ôćĺ
   235Ôćĺ	return settings.TokenUsage
   236Ôćĺ}
   237Ôćĺ
   238Ôćĺfunc handleMessageEvent(session *fdSession, event *messageEvent, toolIndex map[string]*fdToolCall) {
   239Ôćĺ	role := strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(event.Message.Role))
   240Ôćĺ	if role == "" {
   241Ôćĺ		role = "agent"
   242Ôćĺ	}
   243Ôćĺ	model := strings.TrimSpace(event.Message.Model)
   244Ôćĺ
   245Ôćĺ	for _, block := range event.Message.Content {
   246Ôćĺ		switch block.Type {
   247Ôćĺ		case "text":
   248Ôćĺ			appendTextBlock(session, role, model, event.Timestamp, block.Text, false, event.ID)
   249Ôćĺ		case "reasoning", "thinking", "thought":
   250Ôćĺ			// Thinking content may be in the "thinking" field or "text" field depending on the format
   251Ôćĺ			thinkingText := block.Thinking
   252Ôćĺ			if thinkingText == "" {
   253Ôćĺ				thinkingText = block.Text
   254Ôćĺ			}
   255Ôćĺ			appendTextBlock(session, role, model, event.Timestamp, thinkingText, true, event.ID)
   256Ôćĺ		case "tool_use":
   257Ôćĺ			tool := &fdToolCall{
   258Ôćĺ				ID:         block.ID,
   259Ôćĺ				Name:       block.Name,
   260Ôćĺ				Input:      block.Input,
   261Ôćĺ				RiskLevel:  block.RiskLevel,
   262Ôćĺ				RiskReason: block.RiskLevelReason,
   263Ôćĺ				InvokedAt:  event.Timestamp,
   264Ôćĺ			}
   265Ôćĺ			session.Blocks = append(session.Blocks, fdBlock{
   266Ôćĺ				Kind:      blockTool,
   267Ôćĺ				Role:      role,
   268Ôćĺ				MessageID: strings.TrimSpace(event.ID),
   269Ôćĺ				Timestamp: event.Timestamp,
   270Ôćĺ				Model:     model,
   271Ôćĺ				Tool:      tool,
   272Ôćĺ			})
   273Ôćĺ			if tool.ID != "" {
   274Ôćĺ				toolIndex[tool.ID] = tool
   275Ôćĺ			}
   276Ôćĺ		case "tool_result":
   277Ôćĺ			result := &fdToolResult{
   278Ôćĺ				Content: decodeContent(block.Content),
   279Ôćĺ				IsError: block.IsError,
   280Ôćĺ			}
   281Ôćĺ			if ref := toolIndex[block.ToolUseID]; ref != nil {
   282Ôćĺ				ref.Result = result
   283Ôćĺ			} else {
   284Ôćĺ				session.Blocks = append(session.Blocks, fdBlock{
   285Ôćĺ					Kind:      blockTool,
   286Ôćĺ					Role:      role,
   287Ôćĺ					MessageID: strings.TrimSpace(event.ID),
   288Ôćĺ					Timestamp: event.Timestamp,
   289Ôćĺ					Model:     model,
   290Ôćĺ					Tool: &fdToolCall{
   291Ôćĺ						ID:        block.ToolUseID,
   292Ôćĺ						Name:      "tool_result",
   293Ôćĺ						Result:    result,
   294Ôćĺ						InvokedAt: event.Timestamp,
   295Ôćĺ					},
   296Ôćĺ				})
   297Ôćĺ			}
   298Ôćĺ		}
   299Ôćĺ	}
   300Ôćĺ}
   301Ôćĺ
   302Ôćĺfunc appendTextBlock(session *fdSession, role, model, timestamp, rawText string, reasoning bool, messageID string) {
   303Ôćĺ	text := strings.TrimSpace(rawText)
   304Ôćĺ	if text == "" {
   305Ôćĺ		return
   306Ôćĺ	}
   307Ôćĺ	session.Blocks = append(session.Blocks, fdBlock{
   308Ôćĺ		Kind:        blockText,
   309Ôćĺ		Role:        role,
   310Ôćĺ		MessageID:   strings.TrimSpace(messageID),
   311Ôćĺ		Timestamp:   timestamp,
   312Ôćĺ		Model:       model,
   313Ôćĺ		Text:        text,
   314Ôćĺ		IsReasoning: reasoning,
   315Ôćĺ	})
   316Ôćĺ}
   317Ôćĺ
   318Ôćĺfunc firstUserContent(blocks []contentPayload) string {
   319Ôćĺ	for _, block := range blocks {
   320Ôćĺ		if block.Type != "text" {
   321Ôćĺ			continue
   322Ôćĺ		}
   323Ôćĺ		text := strings.TrimSpace(block.Text)
   324Ôćĺ		text = cleanUserText(text)
   325Ôćĺ		if text != "" {
   326Ôćĺ			return text
   327Ôćĺ		}
   328Ôćĺ	}
   329Ôćĺ	return ""
   330Ôćĺ}
   331Ôćĺ
   332Ôćĺfunc decodeContent(raw json.RawMessage) string {
   333Ôćĺ	if len(raw) == 0 || string(raw) == "null" {
   334Ôćĺ		return ""
   335Ôćĺ	}
   336Ôćĺ	var str string
   337Ôćĺ	if err := json.Unmarshal(raw, &str); err == nil {
   338Ôćĺ		return str
   339Ôćĺ	}
   340Ôćĺ	var arr []map[string]any
   341Ôćĺ	if err := json.Unmarshal(raw, &arr); err == nil {
   342Ôćĺ		var builder strings.Builder
   343Ôćĺ		for _, item := range arr {
   344Ôćĺ			if text, ok := item["text"].(string); ok && strings.TrimSpace(text) != "" {
   345Ôćĺ				if builder.Len() > 0 {
   346Ôćĺ					builder.WriteString("\n")
   347Ôćĺ				}
   348Ôćĺ				builder.WriteString(text)
   349Ôćĺ			}
   350Ôćĺ		}
   351Ôćĺ		return builder.String()
   352Ôćĺ	}
   353Ôćĺ	var obj map[string]any
   354Ôćĺ	if err := json.Unmarshal(raw, &obj); err == nil {
   355Ôćĺ		if text, ok := obj["text"].(string); ok {
   356Ôćĺ			return text
   357Ôćĺ		}
   358Ôćĺ		bytes, err := json.Marshal(obj)
   359Ôćĺ		if err == nil {
   360Ôćĺ			return string(bytes)
   361Ôćĺ		}
   362Ôćĺ	}
   363Ôćĺ	return string(raw)
   364Ôćĺ}
   365Ôćĺ
   366Ôćĺfunc slugFromContent(text string, title string, created string) string {
   367Ôćĺ	if slug := spi.GenerateFilenameFromUserMessage(text); slug != "" {
   368Ôćĺ		return slug
   369Ôćĺ	}
   370Ôćĺ	if slug := spi.GenerateFilenameFromUserMessage(title); slug != "" {
   371Ôćĺ		return slug
   372Ôćĺ	}
   373Ôćĺ	if created != "" {
   374Ôćĺ		return strings.ToLower(strings.ReplaceAll(created, ":", "-"))
   375Ôćĺ	}
   376Ôćĺ	return "factory-session"
   377Ôćĺ}
   378Ôćĺ
   379Ôćĺfunc deriveTimestampFromFilename(path string) string {
   380Ôćĺ	base := strings.TrimSuffix(filepath.Base(path), filepath.Ext(path))
   381Ôćĺ	return base
   382Ôćĺ}
   383Ôćĺ
   384Ôćĺfunc fallback(current, candidate string) string {
   385Ôćĺ	if strings.TrimSpace(current) != "" {
   386Ôćĺ		return current
   387Ôćĺ	}
   388Ôćĺ	return strings.TrimSpace(candidate)
   389Ôćĺ}
   390Ôćĺ
   391Ôćĺfunc firstNonEmpty(values ...string) string {
   392Ôćĺ	for _, value := range values {
   393Ôćĺ		if strings.TrimSpace(value) != "" {
   394Ôćĺ			return strings.TrimSpace(value)
   395Ôćĺ		}
   396Ôćĺ	}
   397Ôćĺ	return ""
   398Ôćĺ}
   399Ôćĺ
   400Ôćĺfunc normalizeEventTimestamp(ts string) string {
   401Ôćĺ	return strings.TrimSpace(ts)
   402Ôćĺ}
   403Ôćĺ
   404Ôćĺ// Scanner utilities for reading JSONL files
   405Ôćĺ
   406Ôćĺconst (
   407Ôćĺ	kb                    = 1024
   408Ôćĺ	mb                    = 1024 * kb
   409Ôćĺ	maxReasonableLineSize = 250 * mb
   410Ôćĺ)
   411Ôćĺ
   412Ôćĺvar errStopScan = errors.New("stop scan")
   413Ôćĺ
   414Ôćĺfunc scanLines(reader io.Reader, handle func(lineNumber int, line string) error) error {
   415Ôćĺ	buf := bufio.NewReader(reader)
   416Ôćĺ	lineNumber := 0
   417Ôćĺ
   418Ôćĺ	for {
   419Ôćĺ		line, err := buf.ReadString('\n')
   420Ôćĺ		if err != nil && !errors.Is(err, io.EOF) {
   421Ôćĺ			return err
   422Ôćĺ		}
   423Ôćĺ
   424Ôćĺ		if err == io.EOF && line == "" {
   425Ôćĺ			break
   426Ôćĺ		}
   427Ôćĺ
   428Ôćĺ		lineNumber++
   429Ôćĺ		if len(line) > maxReasonableLineSize {
   430Ôćĺ			return fmt.Errorf("line %d exceeds reasonable size limit (%d MB)", lineNumber, maxReasonableLineSize/mb)
   431Ôćĺ		}
   432Ôćĺ
   433Ôćĺ		line = strings.TrimRight(line, "\n")
   434Ôćĺ		line = strings.TrimRight(line, "\r")
   435Ôćĺ		if line == "" {
   436Ôćĺ			if err == io.EOF {
   437Ôćĺ				break
   438Ôćĺ			}
   439Ôćĺ			continue
   440Ôćĺ		}
   441Ôćĺ
   442Ôćĺ		if handleErr := handle(lineNumber, line); handleErr != nil {
   443Ôćĺ			return handleErr
   444Ôćĺ		}
   445Ôćĺ
   446Ôćĺ		if err == io.EOF {
   447Ôćĺ			break
   448Ôćĺ		}
   449Ôćĺ	}
   450Ôćĺ
   451Ôćĺ	return nil
   452Ôćĺ}
   453Ôćĺ
   454Ôćĺ// Text cleaning utilities
   455Ôćĺ
   456Ôćĺvar systemReminderPattern = regexp.MustCompile(`(?s)`)
   457Ôćĺ
   458Ôćĺfunc cleanUserText(text string) string {
   459Ôćĺ	clean := systemReminderPattern.ReplaceAllString(text, "")
   460Ôćĺ	return strings.TrimSpace(clean)
   461Ôćĺ}
   462Ôćĺ

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./pkg/providers/droidcli/path_utils.go`

```text
     1Ôćĺpackage droidcli
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺimport (
     4Ôćĺ	"fmt"
     5Ôćĺ	"io/fs"
     6Ôćĺ	"os"
     7Ôćĺ	"path/filepath"
     8Ôćĺ	"sort"
     9Ôćĺ)
    10Ôćĺ
    11Ôćĺconst (
    12Ôćĺ	factoryRootDir     = ".factory"
    13Ôćĺ	factorySessionsDir = "sessions"
    14Ôćĺ)
    15Ôćĺ
    16Ôćĺtype sessionFile struct {
    17Ôćĺ	Path     string
    18Ôćĺ	ModTime  int64
    19Ôćĺ	FileName string
    20Ôćĺ}
    21Ôćĺ
    22Ôćĺfunc resolveSessionsDir() (string, error) {
    23Ôćĺ	home, err := os.UserHomeDir()
    24Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
    25Ôćĺ		return "", fmt.Errorf("droidcli: cannot resolve home dir: %w", err)
    26Ôćĺ	}
    27Ôćĺ	dir := filepath.Join(home, factoryRootDir, factorySessionsDir)
    28Ôćĺ	return dir, nil
    29Ôćĺ}
    30Ôćĺ
    31Ôćĺfunc listSessionFiles() ([]sessionFile, error) {
    32Ôćĺ	dir, err := resolveSessionsDir()
    33Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
    34Ôćĺ		return nil, err
    35Ôćĺ	}
    36Ôćĺ	files := make([]sessionFile, 0, 64)
    37Ôćĺ	walker := func(path string, d fs.DirEntry, walkErr error) error {
    38Ôćĺ		if walkErr != nil {
    39Ôćĺ			return nil
    40Ôćĺ		}
    41Ôćĺ		if d.IsDir() {
    42Ôćĺ			return nil
    43Ôćĺ		}
    44Ôćĺ		if filepath.Ext(d.Name()) != ".jsonl" {
    45Ôćĺ			return nil
    46Ôćĺ		}
    47Ôćĺ		info, err := d.Info()
    48Ôćĺ		if err != nil {
    49Ôćĺ			return nil
    50Ôćĺ		}
    51Ôćĺ		files = append(files, sessionFile{
    52Ôćĺ			Path:     path,
    53Ôćĺ			ModTime:  info.ModTime().UnixNano(),
    54Ôćĺ			FileName: d.Name(),
    55Ôćĺ		})
    56Ôćĺ		return nil
    57Ôćĺ	}
    58Ôćĺ	if err := filepath.WalkDir(dir, walker); err != nil {
    59Ôćĺ		if os.IsNotExist(err) {
    60Ôćĺ			return []sessionFile{}, nil
    61Ôćĺ		}
    62Ôćĺ		return nil, fmt.Errorf("droidcli: unable to read sessions dir: %w", err)
    63Ôćĺ	}
    64Ôćĺ	sort.Slice(files, func(i, j int) bool {
    65Ôćĺ		return files[i].ModTime > files[j].ModTime
    66Ôćĺ	})
    67Ôćĺ	return files, nil
    68Ôćĺ}
    69Ôćĺ
    70Ôćĺfunc findSessionFileByID(sessionID string) (string, error) {
    71Ôćĺ	files, err := listSessionFiles()
    72Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
    73Ôćĺ		return "", err
    74Ôćĺ	}
    75Ôćĺ	for _, file := range files {
    76Ôćĺ		candidate := file.FileName
    77Ôćĺ		if candidate == sessionID || trimExt(candidate) == sessionID {
    78Ôćĺ			return file.Path, nil
    79Ôćĺ		}
    80Ôćĺ	}
    81Ôćĺ	return "", nil
    82Ôćĺ}
    83Ôćĺ
    84Ôćĺfunc trimExt(name string) string {
    85Ôćĺ	ext := filepath.Ext(name)
    86Ôćĺ	if ext == "" {
    87Ôćĺ		return name
    88Ôćĺ	}
    89Ôćĺ	return name[:len(name)-len(ext)]
    90Ôćĺ}
    91Ôćĺ
    92Ôćĺ// settingsPathFromSession returns the path to the .settings.json file
    93Ôćĺ// that corresponds to a session JSONL file.
    94Ôćĺ// Example: /path/to/session.jsonl -> /path/to/session.settings.json
    95Ôćĺfunc settingsPathFromSession(sessionPath string) string {
    96Ôćĺ	dir := filepath.Dir(sessionPath)
    97Ôćĺ	base := filepath.Base(sessionPath)
    98Ôćĺ	ext := filepath.Ext(base)
    99Ôćĺ	nameWithoutExt := base[:len(base)-len(ext)]
   100Ôćĺ	return filepath.Join(dir, nameWithoutExt+".settings.json")
   101Ôćĺ}

     1Ôćĺpackage geminicli
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺimport (
     4Ôćĺ	"fmt"
     5Ôćĺ	"html"
     6Ôćĺ	"log/slog"
     7Ôćĺ	"slices"
     8Ôćĺ	"strings"
     9Ôćĺ
    10Ôćĺ	"github.com/specstoryai/getspecstory/specstory-cli/pkg/spi"
    11Ôćĺ	"github.com/specstoryai/getspecstory/specstory-cli/pkg/spi/schema"
    12Ôćĺ)
    13Ôćĺ
    14Ôćĺ// Type aliases for convenience - use the shared schema types
    15Ôćĺtype (
    16Ôćĺ	SessionData  = schema.SessionData
    17Ôćĺ	ProviderInfo = schema.ProviderInfo
    18Ôćĺ	Exchange     = schema.Exchange
    19Ôćĺ	Message      = schema.Message
    20Ôćĺ	ContentPart  = schema.ContentPart
    21Ôćĺ	ToolInfo     = schema.ToolInfo
    22Ôćĺ	Usage        = schema.Usage
    23Ôćĺ)
    24Ôćĺ
    25Ôćĺ// convertTokensToUsage converts Gemini's token structure to the shared Usage type.
    26Ôćĺ// Returns nil if tokens is nil.
    27Ôćĺfunc convertTokensToUsage(tokens *GeminiTokens) *Usage {
    28Ôćĺ	if tokens == nil {
    29Ôćĺ		return nil
    30Ôćĺ	}
    31Ôćĺ	return &Usage{
    32Ôćĺ		InputTokens:   tokens.Input,
    33Ôćĺ		OutputTokens:  tokens.Output,
    34Ôćĺ		CachedTokens:  tokens.Cached,
    35Ôćĺ		ThoughtTokens: tokens.Thoughts,
    36Ôćĺ		ToolTokens:    tokens.Tool,
    37Ôćĺ	}
    38Ôćĺ}
    39Ôćĺ
    40Ôćĺ// GenerateAgentSession creates a SessionData from a GeminiSession
    41Ôćĺ// The session should already be parsed and normalized (messages sorted, warmup trimmed)
    42Ôćĺfunc GenerateAgentSession(session *GeminiSession, workspaceRoot string) (*SessionData, error) {
    43Ôćĺ	slog.Info("GenerateAgentSession: Starting", "sessionID", session.ID, "messageCount", len(session.Messages))
    44Ôćĺ
    45Ôćĺ	if len(session.Messages) == 0 {
    46Ôćĺ		return nil, fmt.Errorf("session has no messages")
    47Ôćĺ	}
    48Ôćĺ
    49Ôćĺ	// Use session's start time as createdAt
    50Ôćĺ	createdAt := session.StartTime
    51Ôćĺ	if createdAt == "" {
    52Ôćĺ		createdAt = session.LastUpdated
    53Ôćĺ	}
    54Ôćĺ
    55Ôćĺ	// Build exchanges from messages
    56Ôćĺ	exchanges, err := buildExchangesFromMessages(session.Messages, workspaceRoot)
    57Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
    58Ôćĺ		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to build exchanges: %w", err)
    59Ôćĺ	}
    60Ôćĺ
    61Ôćĺ	// Assign exchangeId to each exchange (format: sessionId:index)
    62Ôćĺ	for i := range exchanges {
    63Ôćĺ		exchanges[i].ExchangeID = fmt.Sprintf("%s:%d", session.ID, i)
    64Ôćĺ	}
    65Ôćĺ
    66Ôćĺ	slog.Info("GenerateAgentSession: Built exchanges", "count", len(exchanges))
    67Ôćĺ
    68Ôćĺ	// Populate FormattedMarkdown for all tools
    69Ôćĺ	for i := range exchanges {
    70Ôćĺ		for j := range exchanges[i].Messages {
    71Ôćĺ			msg := &exchanges[i].Messages[j]
    72Ôćĺ			if msg.Tool != nil {
    73Ôćĺ				formattedMd := formatToolAsMarkdown(msg.Tool)
    74Ôćĺ				msg.Tool.FormattedMarkdown = &formattedMd
    75Ôćĺ			}
    76Ôćĺ		}
    77Ôćĺ	}
    78Ôćĺ
    79Ôćĺ	sessionData := &SessionData{
    80Ôćĺ		SchemaVersion: "1.0",
    81Ôćĺ		Provider: ProviderInfo{
    82Ôćĺ			ID:      "gemini-cli",
    83Ôćĺ			Name:    "Gemini CLI",
    84Ôćĺ			Version: "unknown",
    85Ôćĺ		},
    86Ôćĺ		SessionID:     session.ID,
    87Ôćĺ		CreatedAt:     createdAt,
    88Ôćĺ		WorkspaceRoot: workspaceRoot,
    89Ôćĺ		Exchanges:     exchanges,
    90Ôćĺ	}
    91Ôćĺ
    92Ôćĺ	return sessionData, nil
    93Ôćĺ}
    94Ôćĺ
    95Ôćĺ// buildExchangesFromMessages groups GeminiMessages into exchanges
    96Ôćĺ// An exchange starts with a user message and includes all subsequent agent messages until the next user message
    97Ôćĺfunc buildExchangesFromMessages(messages []GeminiMessage, workspaceRoot string) ([]Exchange, error) {
    98Ôćĺ	var exchanges []Exchange
    99Ôćĺ	var currentExchange *Exchange
   100Ôćĺ
   101Ôćĺ	for _, msg := range messages {
   102Ôćĺ		switch msg.Type {
   103Ôćĺ		case "user":
   104Ôćĺ			// Start a new exchange
   105Ôćĺ			if currentExchange != nil && len(currentExchange.Messages) > 0 {
   106Ôćĺ				exchanges = append(exchanges, *currentExchange)
   107Ôćĺ			}
   108Ôćĺ
   109Ôćĺ			currentExchange = &Exchange{
   110Ôćĺ				StartTime: msg.Timestamp,
   111Ôćĺ				Messages:  []Message{},
   112Ôćĺ			}
   113Ôćĺ
   114Ôćĺ			// Build user message and handle referenced files extraction
   115Ôćĺ			userMsg, refMsgs := buildUserMessageWithReferences(msg)
   116Ôćĺ			currentExchange.Messages = append(currentExchange.Messages, userMsg)
   117Ôćĺ
   118Ôćĺ			// Add synthetic agent messages for referenced files
   119Ôćĺ			currentExchange.Messages = append(currentExchange.Messages, refMsgs...)
   120Ôćĺ
   121Ôćĺ		case "gemini":
   122Ôćĺ			// Agent message - add to current exchange
   123Ôćĺ			if currentExchange == nil {
   124Ôćĺ				// Create exchange if we don't have one (shouldn't happen normally)
   125Ôćĺ				currentExchange = &Exchange{
   126Ôćĺ					StartTime: msg.Timestamp,
   127Ôćĺ					Messages:  []Message{},
   128Ôćĺ				}
   129Ôćĺ			}
   130Ôćĺ
   131Ôćĺ			// Add messages for agent response (may produce multiple messages for tool calls)
   132Ôćĺ			agentMsgs := buildAgentMessages(msg, workspaceRoot)
   133Ôćĺ			currentExchange.Messages = append(currentExchange.Messages, agentMsgs...)
   134Ôćĺ			currentExchange.EndTime = msg.Timestamp
   135Ôćĺ		}
   136Ôćĺ	}
   137Ôćĺ
   138Ôćĺ	// Add the last exchange if exists
   139Ôćĺ	if currentExchange != nil && len(currentExchange.Messages) > 0 {
   140Ôćĺ		exchanges = append(exchanges, *currentExchange)
   141Ôćĺ	}
   142Ôćĺ
   143Ôćĺ	return exchanges, nil
   144Ôćĺ}
   145Ôćĺ
   146Ôćĺ// buildUserMessageWithReferences creates a user Message and extracts referenced file content
   147Ôćĺ// Returns the user message and any synthetic agent messages for referenced files
   148Ôćĺfunc buildUserMessageWithReferences(msg GeminiMessage) (Message, []Message) {
   149Ôćĺ	content := strings.TrimSpace(msgContent(msg))
   150Ôćĺ
   151Ôćĺ	// Extract referenced file sections from user message
   152Ôćĺ	mainContent, refSections := extractReferencedSections(content)
   153Ôćĺ
   154Ôćĺ	var contentParts []ContentPart
   155Ôćĺ	if mainContent != "" {
   156Ôćĺ		contentParts = append(contentParts, ContentPart{
   157Ôćĺ			Type: "text",
   158Ôćĺ			Text: mainContent,
   159Ôćĺ		})
   160Ôćĺ	}
   161Ôćĺ
   162Ôćĺ	userMsg := Message{
   163Ôćĺ		ID:        msg.ID,
   164Ôćĺ		Timestamp: msg.Timestamp,
   165Ôćĺ		Role:      "user",
   166Ôćĺ		Content:   contentParts,
   167Ôćĺ	}
   168Ôćĺ
   169Ôćĺ	// Build synthetic agent messages for each referenced file section
   170Ôćĺ	var refMsgs []Message
   171Ôćĺ	for _, refContent := range refSections {
   172Ôćĺ		refMsg := buildReferencedFilesMessage(refContent, msg.Timestamp)
   173Ôćĺ		refMsgs = append(refMsgs, refMsg)
   174Ôćĺ	}
   175Ôćĺ
   176Ôćĺ	return userMsg, refMsgs
   177Ôćĺ}
   178Ôćĺ
   179Ôćĺ// buildReferencedFilesMessage creates a synthetic agent message for referenced file content
   180Ôćĺfunc buildReferencedFilesMessage(content string, timestamp string) Message {
   181Ôćĺ	// Format the content with HTML escaping
   182Ôćĺ	formattedContent := formatReferencedFilesMarkdown(content)
   183Ôćĺ
   184Ôćĺ	tool := &ToolInfo{
   185Ôćĺ		Name:  "referenced_files",
   186Ôćĺ		Type:  "read",
   187Ôćĺ		UseID: fmt.Sprintf("ref_%s", timestamp),
   188Ôćĺ		Input: map[string]interface{}{
   189Ôćĺ			"content": content,
   190Ôćĺ		},
   191Ôćĺ		FormattedMarkdown: &formattedContent,
   192Ôćĺ	}
   193Ôćĺ
   194Ôćĺ	return Message{
   195Ôćĺ		Timestamp: timestamp,
   196Ôćĺ		Role:      "agent",
   197Ôćĺ		Tool:      tool,
   198Ôćĺ	}
   199Ôćĺ}
   200Ôćĺ
   201Ôćĺ// formatReferencedFilesMarkdown formats referenced file content for markdown display
   202Ôćĺfunc formatReferencedFilesMarkdown(content string) string {
   203Ôćĺ	if content == "" {
   204Ôćĺ		return ""
   205Ôćĺ	}
   206Ôćĺ	return fmt.Sprintf("\n\n<pre><code>%s</code></pre>\n", html.EscapeString(content))
   207Ôćĺ}
   208Ôćĺ
   209Ôćĺ// buildAgentMessages creates Messages from a Gemini agent message
   210Ôćĺ// Returns multiple messages: one for thoughts, one per tool call, and one for text content
   211Ôćĺ// Token usage is attached to the last message only to avoid double-counting in aggregation
   212Ôćĺfunc buildAgentMessages(msg GeminiMessage, workspaceRoot string) []Message {
   213Ôćĺ	var messages []Message
   214Ôćĺ	usage := convertTokensToUsage(msg.Tokens)
   215Ôćĺ
   216Ôćĺ	// Add thinking content from Thoughts
   217Ôćĺ	if len(msg.Thoughts) > 0 {
   218Ôćĺ		thinkingMsg := buildThinkingMessage(msg)
   219Ôćĺ		messages = append(messages, thinkingMsg)
   220Ôćĺ	}
   221Ôćĺ
   222Ôćĺ	// Add a message for each tool call
   223Ôćĺ	for _, toolCall := range msg.ToolCalls {
   224Ôćĺ		toolMsg := buildToolMessage(msg, toolCall, workspaceRoot)
   225Ôćĺ		messages = append(messages, toolMsg)
   226Ôćĺ	}
   227Ôćĺ
   228Ôćĺ	// Add text content message if present
   229Ôćĺ	textContent := strings.TrimSpace(msgContent(msg))
   230Ôćĺ	if textContent != "" {
   231Ôćĺ		textMsg := Message{
   232Ôćĺ			ID:        msg.ID,
   233Ôćĺ			Timestamp: msg.Timestamp,
   234Ôćĺ			Role:      "agent",
   235Ôćĺ			Model:     msg.Model,
   236Ôćĺ			Content: []ContentPart{
   237Ôćĺ				{Type: "text", Text: textContent},
   238Ôćĺ			},
   239Ôćĺ		}
   240Ôćĺ		messages = append(messages, textMsg)
   241Ôćĺ	}
   242Ôćĺ
   243Ôćĺ	// Attach usage to the last message only to avoid double-counting in aggregation
   244Ôćĺ	if len(messages) > 0 && usage != nil {
   245Ôćĺ		messages[len(messages)-1].Usage = usage
   246Ôćĺ	}
   247Ôćĺ
   248Ôćĺ	return messages
   249Ôćĺ}
   250Ôćĺ
   251Ôćĺ// buildThinkingMessage creates a Message containing thinking content from GeminiThoughts
   252Ôćĺfunc buildThinkingMessage(msg GeminiMessage) Message {
   253Ôćĺ	var thinkingText strings.Builder
   254Ôćĺ	for _, thought := range msg.Thoughts {
   255Ôćĺ		subject := strings.TrimSpace(thought.Subject)
   256Ôćĺ		if subject == "" {
   257Ôćĺ			subject = "Thought"
   258Ôćĺ		}
   259Ôćĺ		description := strings.TrimSpace(thought.Description)
   260Ôćĺ		if description == "" {
   261Ôćĺ			description = "(no description)"
   262Ôćĺ		}
   263Ôćĺ		fmt.Fprintf(&thinkingText, "- **%s** ÔÇö %s\n", subject, description)
   264Ôćĺ	}
   265Ôćĺ
   266Ôćĺ	// Trim trailing newline to avoid double-newline when markdown adds closing tag
   267Ôćĺ	text := strings.TrimSuffix(thinkingText.String(), "\n")
   268Ôćĺ
   269Ôćĺ	return Message{
   270Ôćĺ		ID:        msg.ID,
   271Ôćĺ		Timestamp: msg.Timestamp,
   272Ôćĺ		Role:      "agent",
   273Ôćĺ		Model:     msg.Model,
   274Ôćĺ		Content: []ContentPart{
   275Ôćĺ			{Type: "thinking", Text: text},
   276Ôćĺ		},
   277Ôćĺ	}
   278Ôćĺ}
   279Ôćĺ
   280Ôćĺ// buildToolMessage creates a Message for a single tool call
   281Ôćĺfunc buildToolMessage(msg GeminiMessage, toolCall GeminiToolCall, workspaceRoot string) Message {
   282Ôćĺ	// Convert GeminiToolCall to ToolInfo
   283Ôćĺ	toolInfo := convertToolCall(toolCall)
   284Ôćĺ
   285Ôćĺ	// Extract path hints from tool input
   286Ôćĺ	pathHints := extractPathHintsFromTool(toolCall, workspaceRoot)
   287Ôćĺ
   288Ôćĺ	return Message{
   289Ôćĺ		ID:        toolCall.ID,
   290Ôćĺ		Timestamp: toolCall.Timestamp,
   291Ôćĺ		Role:      "agent",
   292Ôćĺ		Model:     msg.Model,
   293Ôćĺ		Tool:      toolInfo,
   294Ôćĺ		PathHints: pathHints,
   295Ôćĺ	}
   296Ôćĺ}
   297Ôćĺ
   298Ôćĺ// convertToolCall converts a GeminiToolCall to a ToolInfo
   299Ôćĺfunc convertToolCall(toolCall GeminiToolCall) *ToolInfo {
   300Ôćĺ	// Build output from tool results
   301Ôćĺ	var output map[string]interface{}
   302Ôćĺ	if len(toolCall.Result) > 0 && toolCall.Result[0].FunctionResponse != nil {
   303Ôćĺ		output = toolCall.Result[0].FunctionResponse.Response
   304Ôćĺ	}
   305Ôćĺ
   306Ôćĺ	// If no structured output, try ResultDisplay
   307Ôćĺ	if output == nil {
   308Ôćĺ		if display := resultDisplayString(toolCall.ResultDisplay); display != "" {
   309Ôćĺ			output = map[string]interface{}{
   310Ôćĺ				"output": display,
   311Ôćĺ			}
   312Ôćĺ		}
   313Ôćĺ	}
   314Ôćĺ
   315Ôćĺ	return &ToolInfo{
   316Ôćĺ		Name:   toolCall.Name,
   317Ôćĺ		Type:   classifyGeminiToolType(toolCall.Name),
   318Ôćĺ		UseID:  toolCall.ID,
   319Ôćĺ		Input:  toolCall.Args,
   320Ôćĺ		Output: output,
   321Ôćĺ	}
   322Ôćĺ}
   323Ôćĺ
   324Ôćĺ// classifyGeminiToolType maps Gemini tool names to standard tool types
   325Ôćĺ// Valid types: write, read, search, shell, task, generic, unknown
   326Ôćĺfunc classifyGeminiToolType(toolName string) string {
   327Ôćĺ	switch toolName {
   328Ôćĺ	case "read_file", "read_many_files", "web_fetch":
   329Ôćĺ		return "read"
   330Ôćĺ	case "write_file", "replace", "smart_edit":
   331Ôćĺ		return "write"
   332Ôćĺ	case "run_shell_command", "list_directory":
   333Ôćĺ		return "shell"
   334Ôćĺ	case "search_file_content", "google_web_search", "glob":
   335Ôćĺ		return "search"
   336Ôćĺ	case "write_todos":
   337Ôćĺ		return "task"
   338Ôćĺ	case "save_memory", "codebase_investigator", "delegate_to_agent":
   339Ôćĺ		return "generic"
   340Ôćĺ	default:
   341Ôćĺ		return "unknown"
   342Ôćĺ	}
   343Ôćĺ}
   344Ôćĺ
   345Ôćĺ// extractPathHintsFromTool extracts file paths from Gemini tool call args
   346Ôćĺfunc extractPathHintsFromTool(toolCall GeminiToolCall, workspaceRoot string) []string {
   347Ôćĺ	var paths []string
   348Ôćĺ
   349Ôćĺ	// Common path field names for Gemini tools
   350Ôćĺ	pathFields := []string{"file_path", "dir_path", "path"}
   351Ôćĺ
   352Ôćĺ	for _, field := range pathFields {
   353Ôćĺ		if value := inputAsString(toolCall.Args, field); value != "" {
   354Ôćĺ			normalizedPath := spi.NormalizePath(value, workspaceRoot)
   355Ôćĺ			if !slices.Contains(paths, normalizedPath) {
   356Ôćĺ				paths = append(paths, normalizedPath)
   357Ôćĺ			}
   358Ôćĺ		}
   359Ôćĺ	}
   360Ôćĺ
   361Ôćĺ	// Extract paths from shell commands (redirect targets, file-creating commands)
   362Ôćĺ	if command := inputAsString(toolCall.Args, "command"); command != "" {
   363Ôćĺ		cwd := inputAsString(toolCall.Args, "dir_path")
   364Ôćĺ		if cwd == "" {
   365Ôćĺ			cwd = workspaceRoot
   366Ôćĺ		}
   367Ôćĺ		shellPaths := spi.ExtractShellPathHints(command, cwd, workspaceRoot)
   368Ôćĺ		for _, sp := range shellPaths {
   369Ôćĺ			if !slices.Contains(paths, sp) {
   370Ôćĺ				paths = append(paths, sp)
   371Ôćĺ			}
   372Ôćĺ		}
   373Ôćĺ	}
   374Ôćĺ
   375Ôćĺ	return paths
   376Ôćĺ}
   377Ôćĺ
   378Ôćĺ// extractReferencedSections extracts "--- Content from referenced files ---" sections from a message
   379Ôćĺ// Returns the main content (without markers) and the extracted reference sections
   380Ôćĺfunc extractReferencedSections(message string) (string, []string) {
   381Ôćĺ	const marker = "--- Content from referenced files ---"
   382Ôćĺ	var sections []string
   383Ôćĺ	remaining := message
   384Ôćĺ
   385Ôćĺ	for {
   386Ôćĺ		idx := strings.Index(remaining, marker)
   387Ôćĺ		if idx == -1 {
   388Ôćĺ			break
   389Ôćĺ		}
   390Ôćĺ		before := strings.TrimRight(remaining[:idx], "\n ")
   391Ôćĺ		after := remaining[idx+len(marker):]
   392Ôćĺ
   393Ôćĺ		next := strings.Index(after, marker)
   394Ôćĺ		var block string
   395Ôćĺ		if next == -1 {
   396Ôćĺ			block = strings.TrimSpace(after)
   397Ôćĺ			remaining = before
   398Ôćĺ		} else {
   399Ôćĺ			block = strings.TrimSpace(after[:next])
   400Ôćĺ			remaining = strings.TrimSpace(before + after[next:])
   401Ôćĺ		}
   402Ôćĺ
   403Ôćĺ		if block != "" {
   404Ôćĺ			sections = append(sections, block)
   405Ôćĺ		}
   406Ôćĺ	}
   407Ôćĺ
   408Ôćĺ	return strings.TrimSpace(remaining), sections
   409Ôćĺ}
   410Ôćĺ
```
</details></tool-use>

    29Ôćĺ// truncateSessionID shortens a UUID to first5...last5 for display.
    30Ôćĺ// Full IDs are available in --json output; the short form is enough
    31Ôćĺ// to visually distinguish sessions.
    32Ôćĺfunc truncateSessionID(id string) string {
    33Ôćĺ	if len(id) <= 13 {
    34Ôćĺ		return id
    35Ôćĺ	}
    36Ôćĺ	return id[:5] + "..." + id[len(id)-5:]
    37Ôćĺ}
    38Ôćĺ
    39Ôćĺ// CreateWatchCommand dynamically creates the watch command with provider information.
    40Ôćĺ// cloudURL binds to the parent's --cloud-url flag so PersistentPreRunE can apply it.
    41Ôćĺ// localTimeZone and debugDir are passed from the global config/flag values.
    42Ôćĺfunc CreateWatchCommand(cloudURL *string, localTimeZone bool, debugDir string) *cobra.Command {
    43Ôćĺ	registry := factory.GetRegistry()
    44Ôćĺ	ids := registry.ListIDs()
    45Ôćĺ	providerList := registry.GetProviderList()
    46Ôćĺ
    47Ôćĺ	// Build dynamic examples
    48Ôćĺ	examples := `
    49Ôćĺ# Watch all registered agent providers for activity
    50Ôćĺspecstory watch`
    51Ôćĺ
    52Ôćĺ	if len(ids) > 0 {
    53Ôćĺ		examples += "\n\n# Watch for activity from a specific agent"
    54Ôćĺ		for _, id := range ids {
    55Ôćĺ			examples += fmt.Sprintf("\nspecstory watch %s", id)
    56Ôćĺ		}
    57Ôćĺ	}
    58Ôćĺ
    59Ôćĺ	examples += `
    60Ôćĺ
    61Ôćĺ# Watch with custom output directory
    62Ôćĺspecstory watch --output-dir ~/my-sessions`
    63Ôćĺ
    64Ôćĺ	longDesc := `Watch for coding agent activity in the current directory and auto-save markdown files.
    65Ôćĺ
    66ÔćĺUnlike 'run', this command does not launch a coding agent - it only monitors for agent activity.
    67ÔćĺUse this when you want to run the agent separately, but still want auto-saved markdown files.
    68Ôćĺ
    69ÔćĺBy default, 'watch' is for activity from all registered agent providers. Specify a specific agent ID to watch for activity from only that agent.`
    70Ôćĺ	if providerList != "No providers registered" {
    71Ôćĺ		longDesc += "\n\nAvailable provider IDs: " + providerList + "."
    72Ôćĺ	}
    73Ôćĺ
    74Ôćĺ	watchCmd := &cobra.Command{
    75Ôćĺ		Use:     "watch [provider-id]",
    76Ôćĺ		Aliases: []string{"w"},
    77Ôćĺ		Short:   "Watch for coding agent activity with auto-save",
    78Ôćĺ		Long:    longDesc,
    79Ôćĺ		Example: examples,
    80Ôćĺ		Args:    cobra.MaximumNArgs(1), // Accept 0 or 1 argument (provider ID)
    81Ôćĺ		RunE: func(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {
    82Ôćĺ			config.EnsureDefaultProjectConfig()
    83Ôćĺ			slog.Info("Running in watch mode")
    84Ôćĺ
    85Ôćĺ			registry := factory.GetRegistry()
    86Ôćĺ
    87Ôćĺ			// Read flags from the command
    88Ôćĺ			debugRaw, _ := cmd.Flags().GetBool("debug-raw")
    89Ôćĺ			useLocalTimezone, _ := cmd.Flags().GetBool("local-time-zone")
    90Ôćĺ			useUTC := !useLocalTimezone
    91Ôćĺ			jsonOutput, _ := cmd.Flags().GetBool("json")
    92Ôćĺ			outputDir, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("output-dir")
    93Ôćĺ			flagDebugDir, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("debug-dir")
    94Ôćĺ			noCloudSync, _ := cmd.Flags().GetBool("no-cloud-sync")
    95Ôćĺ			onlyCloudSync, _ := cmd.Flags().GetBool("only-cloud-sync")
    96Ôćĺ			provenanceEnabled, _ := cmd.Flags().GetBool("provenance")
    97Ôćĺ			noTelemetryPrompts, _ := cmd.Flags().GetBool("no-telemetry-prompts")
    98Ôćĺ
    99Ôćĺ			// Apply debug dir override from flag if provided
   100Ôćĺ			if flagDebugDir != "" {
   101Ôćĺ				spi.SetDebugBaseDir(flagDebugDir)
   102Ôćĺ			}
   103Ôćĺ
   104Ôćĺ			// Setup output configuration
   105Ôćĺ			config, err := utils.SetupOutputConfig(outputDir, flagDebugDir)
   106Ôćĺ			if err != nil {
   107Ôćĺ				return err
   108Ôćĺ			}
   109Ôćĺ
   110Ôćĺ			// Ensure history directory exists for watch mode
   111Ôćĺ			if err := utils.EnsureHistoryDirectoryExists(config); err != nil {
   112Ôćĺ				return err
   113Ôćĺ			}
   114Ôćĺ
   115Ôćĺ			// Initialize project identity (needed for cloud sync)
   116Ôćĺ			cwd, err := os.Getwd()
   117Ôćĺ			if err != nil {
   118Ôćĺ				slog.Error("Failed to get current working directory", "error", err)
   119Ôćĺ				return err
   120Ôćĺ			}
   121Ôćĺ			if _, err := utils.NewProjectIdentityManager(cwd).EnsureProjectIdentity(); err != nil {
   122Ôćĺ				// Log error but don't fail the command
   123Ôćĺ				slog.Error("Failed to ensure project identity", "error", err)
   124Ôćĺ			}
   125Ôćĺ
   126Ôćĺ			// Check authentication for cloud sync
   127Ôćĺ			CheckAndWarnAuthentication(noCloudSync)
   128Ôćĺ
   129Ôćĺ			// Validate that --only-cloud-sync requires authentication
   130Ôćĺ			if onlyCloudSync && !cloud.IsAuthenticated() {
   131Ôćĺ				return utils.ValidationError{Message: "--only-cloud-sync requires authentication. Please run 'specstory login' first"}
   132Ôćĺ			}
   133Ôćĺ
   134Ôćĺ			// Start provenance engine if enabled (used in later phases for event correlation)
   135Ôćĺ			provenanceEngine, provenanceCleanup, err := provenance.StartEngine(provenanceEnabled)
   136Ôćĺ			if err != nil {
   137Ôćĺ				return err
   138Ôćĺ			}
   139Ôćĺ			defer provenanceCleanup()
   140Ôćĺ
   141Ôćĺ			providerIDs := registry.ListIDs()
   142Ôćĺ			if len(providerIDs) == 0 {
   143Ôćĺ				return fmt.Errorf("no providers registered")
   144Ôćĺ			}
   145Ôćĺ			if len(args) > 0 {
   146Ôćĺ				providerIDs = []string{args[0]}
   147Ôćĺ			}
   148Ôćĺ
   149Ôćĺ			// Collect provider names for analytics
   150Ôćĺ			providers := make(map[string]spi.Provider)
   151Ôćĺ			for _, id := range providerIDs {
   152Ôćĺ				if provider, err := registry.Get(id); err == nil {
   153Ôćĺ					providers[id] = provider
   154Ôćĺ				} else {
   155Ôćĺ					return fmt.Errorf("no provider %s found", id)
   156Ôćĺ				}
   157Ôćĺ			}
   158Ôćĺ			var providerNames []string
   159Ôćĺ			// Get all provider names from the providers map
   160Ôćĺ			for _, provider := range providers {
   161Ôćĺ				providerNames = append(providerNames, provider.Name())
   162Ôćĺ			}
   163Ôćĺ			analytics.SetAgentProviders(providerNames)
   164Ôćĺ
   165Ôćĺ			// Track watch command activation
   166Ôćĺ			analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventWatchActivated, nil)
   167Ôćĺ
   168Ôćĺ			// Create context for graceful cancellation (Ctrl+C handling)
   169Ôćĺ			// This allows providers to clean up resources when user presses Ctrl+C
   170Ôćĺ			ctx, cancel := signal.NotifyContext(context.Background(), os.Interrupt, syscall.SIGTERM)
   171Ôćĺ			defer cancel()
   172Ôćĺ
   173Ôćĺ			// Start filesystem watcher for provenance correlation if enabled (uses signal context for Ctrl+C)
   174Ôćĺ			fsCleanup, err := provenance.StartFSWatcher(ctx, provenanceEngine, cwd)
   175Ôćĺ			if err != nil {
   176Ôćĺ				return err
   177Ôćĺ			}
   178Ôćĺ			defer fsCleanup()
   179Ôćĺ
   180Ôćĺ			if !log.IsSilent() && !jsonOutput {
   181Ôćĺ				fmt.Println()
   182Ôćĺ				agentWord := "agents"
   183Ôćĺ				if len(providerNames) == 1 {
   184Ôćĺ					agentWord = "agent"
   185Ôćĺ				}
   186Ôćĺ				fmt.Println("­čĹÇ Watching for activity from " + agentWord + ": " + strings.Join(providerNames, ", "))
   187Ôćĺ				fmt.Println("   Press Ctrl+C to stop watching")
   188Ôćĺ				fmt.Println()
   189Ôćĺ			}
   190Ôćĺ
   191Ôćĺ			// Track sessions we've seen to suppress initial-scan output.
   192Ôćĺ			// Existing sessions found at startup get their markdown refreshed
   193Ôćĺ			// but don't produce output ÔÇö only new activity does.
   194Ôćĺ			var seenMu gosync.Mutex
   195Ôćĺ			seenSessions := make(map[string]bool)
   196Ôćĺ
   197Ôćĺ			// Session callback for watch mode output
   198Ôćĺ			sessionCallback := func(providerID string, sess *spi.AgentChatSession) {
   199Ôćĺ				// Check if markdown file already exists to determine if this is an update or creation
   200Ôćĺ				fileFullPath := session.BuildSessionFilePath(sess, config.GetHistoryDir(), useUTC)
   201Ôćĺ				_, fileExistsErr := os.Stat(fileFullPath)
   202Ôćĺ				fileExists := fileExistsErr == nil
   203Ôćĺ
   204Ôćĺ				// Process the session (write markdown and sync to cloud)

   212Ôćĺ					// the sync command, so we just log and continue.

   220Ôćĺ				// Suppress output for existing sessions seen for the first time (initial scan).

   227Ôćĺ					return
   228Ôćĺ				}

   230Ôćĺ				// Output formatted line to stdout for watch mode

   234Ôćĺ					if !fileExists {
   235Ôćĺ						action = "created"
   236Ôćĺ					}
   237Ôćĺ
   238Ôćĺ					// Get timestamps from session data

   240Ôćĺ					endTime := startTime
   241Ôćĺ					if sess.SessionData != nil && sess.SessionData.UpdatedAt != "" {
   242Ôćĺ						endTime = sess.SessionData.UpdatedAt
   243Ôćĺ					}
   244Ôćĺ
   245Ôćĺ					// Count messages by role
   246Ôćĺ					userPrompts := 0
   247Ôćĺ					agentActivity := 0
   248Ôćĺ					if sess.SessionData != nil {
   249Ôćĺ						for _, exchange := range sess.SessionData.Exchanges {
   250Ôćĺ							for _, msg := range exchange.Messages {
   251Ôćĺ								if msg.Role == schema.RoleUser {
   252Ôćĺ									userPrompts++
   253Ôćĺ								} else {
   254Ôćĺ									agentActivity++
   255Ôćĺ								}
   256Ôćĺ							}
   257Ôćĺ						}
   258Ôćĺ					}
   259Ôćĺ
   260Ôćĺ					// Output the formatted line
   261Ôćĺ					if jsonOutput {
   262Ôćĺ						record := map[string]interface{}{
   263Ôćĺ							"timestamp":          time.Now().Format(time.RFC3339),
   264Ôćĺ							"action":             action,
   265Ôćĺ							"session_id":         sess.SessionID,
   266Ôćĺ							"start_time":         startTime,
   267Ôćĺ							"end_time":           endTime,
   268Ôćĺ							"provider":           providerID,
   269Ôćĺ							"markdown_size":      markdownSize,
   270Ôćĺ							"total_user_prompts": userPrompts,
   271Ôćĺ							"agent_activity":     agentActivity,
   272Ôćĺ						}
   273Ôćĺ						if !onlyCloudSync {
   274Ôćĺ							record["markdown_file"] = fileFullPath
   275Ôćĺ						}
   276Ôćĺ						_ = json.NewEncoder(os.Stdout).Encode(record)
   277Ôćĺ					} else {
   278Ôćĺ						emoji := "ÔÖ╗´ŞĆ"
   279Ôćĺ						if action == "created" {
   280Ôćĺ							emoji = "ÔťĘ"
   281Ôćĺ						}
   282Ôćĺ						activityWord := "activities"
   283Ôćĺ						if agentActivity == 1 {
   284Ôćĺ							activityWord = "activity"
   285Ôćĺ						}
   286Ôćĺ						promptWord := "prompts"
   287Ôćĺ						if userPrompts == 1 {

   289Ôćĺ						}

Lines 323-325 (new): Telemetry flags on watch command
- (139) ÔÜá´ŞĆ These flags are registered on the watch command but never parsed in the early manual arg parsing in `main.go` (lines 1211-1270). The watch command reads them via cobra flags on line 97, but the early parsing that sets up telemetry `Init` won't see flags passed to `specstory watch --telemetry-endpoint ...`. Since telemetry `Init` happens before cobra runs, watch-specific telemetry flags may not work correctly. The sync and run commands work because their flags are also parsed manually in main.

---

## Top 5 Most Important Improvements

1. **Watch command telemetry flags may not work** (observation 139): The early manual flag parsing in `main.go` that initializes telemetry doesn't distinguish which subcommand is being run. But the watch command registers telemetry flags independently via cobra. Telemetry `Init()` runs before cobra parses flags, so `specstory watch --telemetry-endpoint localhost:4317` may not properly initialize telemetry. Verify this works end-to-end.

2. **`ProcessSingleSession` has 9 parameters** (observation 96): This function signature is unwieldy. Consider an options struct to improve readability and make it easier to add future parameters without changing all call sites.

3. **Duplicate `TokenUsage` structs** (observation 55): `telemetry.TokenUsage` and `schema.Usage` are structurally near-identical. The telemetry package could potentially use `schema.Usage` directly or create a type alias, eliminating the field-by-field mapping in `countExchangeTokens` and `countSessionTokens`.

4. **`countSessionTokens` manual field aggregation is fragile** (observation 71): Adding a new token type to `TokenUsage` requires updating aggregation in multiple places (`countExchangeTokens`, `countSessionTokens`, `recordTokenUsage`, `SetSessionSpanAttributes`, `setExchangeSpanAttributes`). An `Add` method on the struct would reduce this maintenance burden.

5. **Run `go mod tidy`** (observation 5): The diagnostic shows `golang.org/x/term should be direct`. This is a simple fix.

## Unit Test Assessment

### New tests added:

- `TestGetIntFromMap` (schema) - Ôťů Well-designed, non-tautological, data-driven
- `TestBuildAgentMessage_Usage` (claudecode) - Ôťů Tests real JSON-to-struct conversion
- `TestExtractUsageFromTokenCount` (codexcli) - Ôťů Tests nested map traversal safety
- `TestGenerateAgentSession_WithTokenUsage` (codexcli) - Ôťů Good integration test
- `TestConvertTokensToUsage` (geminicli) - Ôťů Tests field mapping and nil safety
- `TestExtractToolInfo` (telemetry) - Ôťů Thorough edge case coverage
- `TestExtractUserPromptText` (telemetry) - Ôťů Good coverage
- `TestExtractModel` (telemetry) - Ôťů Tests skip-empty logic
- `TestCountSessionTools` (telemetry) - Ôťů Tests cross-exchange aggregation
- `Test_countExchangeTokens` (telemetry) - Ôťů Excellent per-provider coverage
- `TestCountSessionTokens` (telemetry) - Ôťů Tests aggregation
- `Test_computeExchangeStats` (telemetry) - Ôťů End-to-end stats computation
- `TestComputeSessionStats` (telemetry) - Ôťů Tests nil safety and aggregation

All tests are:
- **Not tautological** - They test real logic (type coercion, deduplication, aggregation, nil safety)
- **Well-designed** - Data-driven table tests throughout
- **Reliable** - No external state dependencies, no flakiness risks

### Missing tests that would add value:

- **`telemetry.go`**: `parseEndpoint` has interesting logic (bare host:port, http, https URL parsing) that would benefit from a table test. This is the kind of combinatorial logic that catches real bugs.
- **`telemetry.go`**: `parseResourceAttributes` parsing logic would benefit from edge case tests (malformed pairs, empty values, whitespace).
- **Droid CLI**: `convertTokenUsage` and `readSessionSettings` have no direct tests. The settings file reading logic (file not found, parse error, missing tokenUsage) is non-trivial.
- **Droid CLI**: `settingsPathFromSession` path derivation should have a simple test to catch regressions.

```md
# Plan: Eliminate duplicate TokenUsage struct

## Context

PR #177 introduced two structurally identical structs for token usage:
- `schema.Usage` in `pkg/spi/schema/types.go` (lines 85-105) ÔÇö the canonical type used by all providers
- `telemetry.TokenUsage` in `pkg/telemetry/telemetry.go` (lines 605-625) ÔÇö a duplicate used only for metric recording

Both have identical field names and types. The only difference is JSON struct tags on `schema.Usage`, which are irrelevant for telemetry (never JSON-serialized). The providers already use type aliases for schema types (e.g., `type Usage = schema.Usage`). The telemetry package should follow the same pattern.

## Changes

### 1. `pkg/telemetry/telemetry.go` ÔÇö Remove duplicate struct

Delete the `TokenUsage` struct definition and its doc comment (lines 599-625). The `recordTokenUsage` function signature uses `TokenUsage` but since it's in the same package as the alias, it resolves automatically.

### 2. `pkg/telemetry/stats_helpers.go` ÔÇö Add type alias

Add a type alias near the top of the file (after imports), following the same pattern used by provider packages:

\```go
// TokenUsage is a type alias for schema.Usage, used for telemetry metric recording.
type TokenUsage = schema.Usage
\```

`stats_helpers.go` already imports `schema`, so no import changes needed. All existing code (`countExchangeTokens`, `countSessionTokens`, `SessionStats.TokenUsage`, `ExchangeStats.TokenUsage`, etc.) continues to work unchanged because a Go type alias makes the two types interchangeable.

### No other files change

- `stats_helpers_test.go` ÔÇö All `TokenUsage{...}` literals still work since it's an alias
- `telemetry.go` ÔÇö `recordTokenUsage(... usage TokenUsage)` resolves via same-package visibility
- Provider files ÔÇö Unchanged, they use `schema.Usage` / their own aliases

## Verification

\```zsh
go build -o specstory
go test -v ./pkg/telemetry/...
go test -v ./...
golangci-lint run
\```

```

     1Ôćĺ// Package telemetry provides OpenTelemetry trace and metric initialization for the SpecStory CLI.
     2Ôćĺ// It follows the same idempotent-init pattern as pkg/analytics: first call to Init wins,

     9Ôćĺ	"fmt"

    29Ôćĺfunc telemetryLogger() *slog.Logger {

    31Ôćĺ}
    32Ôćĺ
    33Ôćĺconst (
    34Ôćĺ	// defaultEndpoint is the OTLP gRPC collector address used when
    35Ôćĺ	// OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT is set but Options.Endpoint is empty.
    36Ôćĺ	defaultEndpoint = "localhost:4317"
    37Ôćĺ
    38Ôćĺ	// metricExportInterval is how often metrics are exported to the collector.
    39Ôćĺ	metricExportInterval = 10 * time.Second
    40Ôćĺ)
    41Ôćĺ
    42Ôćĺ// Options configures telemetry initialisation.
    43Ôćĺtype Options struct {
    44Ôćĺ	ServiceName string // OTel service.name resource attribute (default "specstory-cli")
    45Ôćĺ	Endpoint    string // OTLP gRPC collector address (default "localhost:4317")
    46Ôćĺ	Enabled     bool   // When false, Init is a no-op and the global no-op provider is used
    47Ôćĺ}
    48Ôćĺ
    49Ôćĺvar (
    50Ôćĺ	initOnce       sync.Once
    51Ôćĺ	traceProvider  *sdktrace.TracerProvider
    52Ôćĺ	meterProvider  *sdkmetric.MeterProvider
    53Ôćĺ	meter          metric.Meter
    54Ôćĺ	metricsEnabled bool

    65Ôćĺ	outputTokensTotal metric.Int64Counter
    66Ôćĺ
    67Ôćĺ	// Token usage metrics (Claude Code specific)

    69Ôćĺ	cacheReadTokens     metric.Int64Counter
    70Ôćĺ

    73Ôćĺ	reasoningOutputTokens metric.Int64Counter
    74Ôćĺ

    86Ôćĺ
    87Ôćĺ// parseResourceAttributes parses OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES env var into attribute.KeyValue slice.
    88Ôćĺ// Format: "key1=value1,key2=value2"
    89Ôćĺfunc parseResourceAttributes() []attribute.KeyValue {
    90Ôćĺ	envVal := os.Getenv("OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES")
    91Ôćĺ	if envVal == "" {
    92Ôćĺ		return nil
    93Ôćĺ	}
    94Ôćĺ
    95Ôćĺ	var attrs []attribute.KeyValue
    96Ôćĺ	pairs := strings.Split(envVal, ",")
    97Ôćĺ	for _, pair := range pairs {
    98Ôćĺ		pair = strings.TrimSpace(pair)
    99Ôćĺ		if pair == "" {
   100Ôćĺ			continue
   101Ôćĺ		}
   102Ôćĺ		kv := strings.SplitN(pair, "=", 2)
   103Ôćĺ		if len(kv) == 2 {
   104Ôćĺ			key := strings.TrimSpace(kv[0])
   105Ôćĺ			value := strings.TrimSpace(kv[1])
   106Ôćĺ			if key != "" {
   107Ôćĺ				attrs = append(attrs, attribute.String(key, value))
   108Ôćĺ			}
   109Ôćĺ		}
   110Ôćĺ	}
   111Ôćĺ	return attrs
   112Ôćĺ}
   113Ôćĺ
   114Ôćĺ// parseEndpoint normalises an OTLP endpoint string into a bare host:port suitable
   115Ôćĺ// for otlptracegrpc.WithEndpoint and a flag indicating whether TLS should be disabled.
   116Ôćĺ//
   117Ôćĺ// Accepted formats:
   118Ôćĺ//
   119Ôćĺ//	"localhost:4317"              Ôćĺ host="localhost:4317",  insecure=true
   120Ôćĺ//	"http://localhost:4317"       Ôćĺ host="localhost:4317",  insecure=true
   121Ôćĺ//	"https://collector.example:4317" Ôćĺ host="collector.example:4317", insecure=false
   122Ôćĺ//	""                            Ôćĺ host=defaultEndpoint,  insecure=true
   123Ôćĺfunc parseEndpoint(raw string) (host string, insecure bool) {
   124Ôćĺ	if raw == "" {
   125Ôćĺ		return defaultEndpoint, true
   126Ôćĺ	}
   127Ôćĺ
   128Ôćĺ	u, err := url.Parse(raw)
   129Ôćĺ	if err != nil || u.Host == "" {
   130Ôćĺ		// Not a URL ÔÇö treat the whole string as host:port (bare address).
   131Ôćĺ		return raw, true
   132Ôćĺ	}
   133Ôćĺ
   134Ôćĺ	// Parsed successfully as a URL with a scheme.
   135Ôćĺ	host = u.Host
   136Ôćĺ	insecure = u.Scheme != "https"
   137Ôćĺ	return host, insecure
   138Ôćĺ}
   139Ôćĺ
   140Ôćĺ// Init configures the OTel tracing and metrics subsystem. Thread-safe and idempotent ÔÇö only the
   141Ôćĺ// first call takes effect. When Enabled is false the global no-op provider remains
   142Ôćĺ// active, so callers can emit spans/events and record metrics safely with zero overhead.
   143Ôćĺfunc Init(ctx context.Context, opts Options) error {
   144Ôćĺ	var initErr error
   145Ôćĺ	initOnce.Do(func() {
   146Ôćĺ		if !opts.Enabled {
   147Ôćĺ			telemetryLogger().Info("Telemetry disabled, using no-op provider")
   148Ôćĺ			return
   149Ôćĺ		}
   150Ôćĺ
   151Ôćĺ		// Route OTel SDK errors (export failures, connection issues) through slog
   152Ôćĺ		// so they appear in debug logs alongside our own telemetry messages.
   153Ôćĺ		otel.SetErrorHandler(otel.ErrorHandlerFunc(func(err error) {
   154Ôćĺ			telemetryLogger().Warn("OTel SDK error", "error", err)
   155Ôćĺ		}))
   156Ôćĺ
   157Ôćĺ		serviceName := opts.ServiceName
   158Ôćĺ		if serviceName == "" {
   159Ôćĺ			serviceName = "specstory-cli"
   160Ôćĺ		}
   161Ôćĺ
   162Ôćĺ		// Parse the endpoint to extract a bare host:port for WithEndpoint and
   163Ôćĺ		// determine TLS mode from the scheme. OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT is
   164Ôćĺ		// conventionally a full URL (e.g. "http://localhost:4317"), but
   165Ôćĺ		// WithEndpoint expects just "host:port".
   166Ôćĺ		host, insecure := parseEndpoint(opts.Endpoint)
   167Ôćĺ
   168Ôćĺ		// Create shared resource for both traces and metrics.
   169Ôćĺ		// Use resource.New() with detectors to pick up OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES env var.
   170Ôćĺ		res, err := resource.New(ctx,
   171Ôćĺ			resource.WithFromEnv(),      // OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES and OTEL_SERVICE_NAME
   172Ôćĺ			resource.WithTelemetrySDK(), // telemetry.sdk.* attributes
   173Ôćĺ			resource.WithHost(),         // host.* attributes
   174Ôćĺ			resource.WithAttributes(attribute.String("service.name", serviceName)), // explicit service name (can override env)
   175Ôćĺ		)
   176Ôćĺ		if err != nil {
   177Ôćĺ			initErr = fmt.Errorf("create OTel resource: %w", err)
   178Ôćĺ			return
   179Ôćĺ		}
   180Ôćĺ
   181Ôćĺ		// Log the resource attributes for debugging
   182Ôćĺ		telemetryLogger().Debug("Resource attributes created",
   183Ôćĺ			"attributes", res.Attributes(),
   184Ôćĺ			"OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES", os.Getenv("OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES"),
   185Ôćĺ		)
   186Ôćĺ
   187Ôćĺ		// Initialize tracing
   188Ôćĺ		if err := initTracing(ctx, host, insecure, res); err != nil {
   189Ôćĺ			initErr = err
   190Ôćĺ			return
   191Ôćĺ		}
   192Ôćĺ
   193Ôćĺ		// Initialize metrics
   194Ôćĺ		if err := initMetrics(ctx, host, insecure, res); err != nil {
   195Ôćĺ			// Roll back tracing initialization to avoid half-initialized state
   196Ôćĺ			telemetryLogger().Warn("Metrics init failed, rolling back tracing", "error", err)
   197Ôćĺ			if traceProvider != nil {
   198Ôćĺ				if shutdownErr := traceProvider.Shutdown(ctx); shutdownErr != nil {
   199Ôćĺ					telemetryLogger().Warn("Failed to shutdown trace provider during rollback", "error", shutdownErr)
   200Ôćĺ				}
   201Ôćĺ				traceProvider = nil
   202Ôćĺ				// Use no-op provider instead of nil per OTel documentation
   203Ôćĺ				otel.SetTracerProvider(noop.NewTracerProvider())
   204Ôćĺ			}
   205Ôćĺ			initErr = err
   206Ôćĺ			return
   207Ôćĺ		}
   208Ôćĺ
   209Ôćĺ		metricsEnabled = true
   210Ôćĺ
   211Ôćĺ		// Parse OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES and store as common metric attributes.
   212Ôćĺ		// This ensures resource attributes appear as metric tags in backends like Datadog
   213Ôćĺ		// that may not automatically promote resource-level attributes to metric tags.
   214Ôćĺ		commonMetricAttrs = parseResourceAttributes()
   215Ôćĺ		if len(commonMetricAttrs) > 0 {
   216Ôćĺ			telemetryLogger().Debug("Parsed OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES for metrics",
   217Ôćĺ				"count", len(commonMetricAttrs),
   218Ôćĺ				"attributes", commonMetricAttrs,
   219Ôćĺ			)
   220Ôćĺ		}
   221Ôćĺ
   222Ôćĺ		telemetryLogger().Info("Telemetry initialised",
   223Ôćĺ			"endpoint", host,
   224Ôćĺ			"insecure", insecure,
   225Ôćĺ			"serviceName", serviceName,
   226Ôćĺ		)
   227Ôćĺ	})
   228Ôćĺ
   229Ôćĺ	return initErr
   230Ôćĺ}
   231Ôćĺ
   232Ôćĺ// initTracing sets up the trace provider and exporter.
   233Ôćĺfunc initTracing(ctx context.Context, host string, insecure bool, res *resource.Resource) error {
   234Ôćĺ	exporterOpts := []otlptracegrpc.Option{
   235Ôćĺ		otlptracegrpc.WithEndpoint(host),
   236Ôćĺ	}
   237Ôćĺ	if insecure {
   238Ôćĺ		exporterOpts = append(exporterOpts, otlptracegrpc.WithInsecure())
   239Ôćĺ	}
   240Ôćĺ
   241Ôćĺ	exporter, err := otlptracegrpc.New(ctx, exporterOpts...)
   242Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
   243Ôćĺ		return fmt.Errorf("create OTLP trace exporter: %w", err)
   244Ôćĺ	}
   245Ôćĺ
   246Ôćĺ	traceProvider = sdktrace.NewTracerProvider(
   247Ôćĺ		sdktrace.WithBatcher(exporter),
   248Ôćĺ		sdktrace.WithResource(res),
   249Ôćĺ	)
   250Ôćĺ	otel.SetTracerProvider(traceProvider)
   251Ôćĺ
   252Ôćĺ	return nil
   253Ôćĺ}
   254Ôćĺ
   255Ôćĺ// initMetrics sets up the meter provider, exporter, and metric instruments.
   256Ôćĺfunc initMetrics(ctx context.Context, host string, insecure bool, res *resource.Resource) error {
   257Ôćĺ	exporterOpts := []otlpmetricgrpc.Option{
   258Ôćĺ		otlpmetricgrpc.WithEndpoint(host),
   259Ôćĺ	}
   260Ôćĺ	if insecure {
   261Ôćĺ		exporterOpts = append(exporterOpts, otlpmetricgrpc.WithInsecure())
   262Ôćĺ	}
   263Ôćĺ
   264Ôćĺ	exporter, err := otlpmetricgrpc.New(ctx, exporterOpts...)
   265Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
   266Ôćĺ		return fmt.Errorf("create OTLP metric exporter: %w", err)
   267Ôćĺ	}
   268Ôćĺ
   269Ôćĺ	meterProvider = sdkmetric.NewMeterProvider(
   270Ôćĺ		sdkmetric.WithResource(res),
   271Ôćĺ		sdkmetric.WithReader(sdkmetric.NewPeriodicReader(exporter,
   272Ôćĺ			sdkmetric.WithInterval(metricExportInterval),
   273Ôćĺ		)),
   274Ôćĺ	)
   275Ôćĺ	otel.SetMeterProvider(meterProvider)
   276Ôćĺ
   277Ôćĺ	meter = meterProvider.Meter("specstory-cli")
   278Ôćĺ
   279Ôćĺ	// Initialize metric instruments
   280Ôćĺ	if err := initMetricInstruments(); err != nil {
   281Ôćĺ		return fmt.Errorf("create metric instruments: %w", err)
   282Ôćĺ	}
   283Ôćĺ
   284Ôćĺ	return nil
   285Ôćĺ}
   286Ôćĺ
